title: Creative Strategy & Insight Lead
description:
At Yazen Health, we revolutionize obesity treatment. As the largest digital obesity clinic in Sweden and one of the fastest-growing companies in Europe, we're at the forefront of the obesity drug revolution, expanding our impact across the continent. We are passionate about improving the lives of our patients through caregivers, data-driven insights, and innovative technology.

**Purpose of the Role**
-----------------------


The purpose of this role is to expertly transform user insights, market data, trends, observations, and competitive analysis into concrete ideas across both marketing and product development. These ideas should, in turn, drive faster growth and higher customer satisfaction. By combining analytical capability with creativity, the role drives the development of concepts, experiences, and messaging that create both business and user value.


The role operates hands-on as part of the marketing team, ensuring that insights do not remain at the recommendation stage but are translated into implemented solutions.

### **Key Responsibilities**

**Strategic Analysis and Insight Work**

* Analyze quantitative data to identify patterns, opportunities, and risks
* Conduct competitive and market analyses
* Drive user and behavioral research
* Formulate and analyze hypotheses
* Connect insights to business and product objectives

**Market Intelligence and Brand Insight**

* Conduct ongoing market and trend monitoring within marketing, culture, technology, and behavior
* Track competitor positioning and activity over time
* Own brand tracking and interpret brand development
* Measure and analyze campaign results and communication effectiveness
* Translate learnings into recommendations and new creative directions
* Create presentations to share insights with teams, management, and the board

**Creative Development**

* Collaborate with creatives to develop campaign and communication concepts
* Develop foundations for storytelling and creative directions
* Write or contribute to creative briefs
* Actively participate in ideation and production processes
* Provide external agencies with insights and strategic input

**Product and Experience Development**

* Contribute to concept development for product features and UX
* Sketch, prototype, or otherwise help concretize solutions
* Participate in design and development sprints

**Experimentation and Performance Measurement**

* Continuously measure, evaluate, and refine Yazen’s marketing efforts
* Initiate and design tests
* Ensure learning and knowledge transfer within the marketing department and across other departments

### **Key Competencies**

**Analytical Skills**

* Strong numerical literacy and data interpretation skills
* Ability to identify deep correlations and behavioral patterns
* Experience in brand and campaign measurement
* Hypothesis-driven approach to work

**Creative and Linguistic Skills**

* Storytelling and concept development
* Excellent ability to translate insights into ideas
* Creative thinking across both product and communication

**Media and Marketing**

* Seamlessly switch between analysis and creation
* Combine logic and intuition
* Communicate insights in an inspiring way that drives action
* Strong knowledge of media channels and digital marketing, including platforms such as Meta and Google

**Success Metrics**
-------------------

**Success is measured through:**

* Implemented concepts and marketing improvements
* Impact on user behavior and business goals
* Brand development over time
* Campaign performance and learning outcomes
* The organization’s use of your insights in business decisions


More concretely: Your work should lead to more people perceiving Yazen’s marketing as relevant, resulting in higher CTR, more direct traffic, and ultimately more patients.

**About Yazen**
---------------


Yazen was founded in 2021 and is a Swedish digital healthcare provider registered with the Swedish Health and Social Care Inspectorate (IVO), with patients and operations across Europe. Our goal is to help people overcome overweight and obesity through a modern, evidence-based approach that combines medical treatment with digital technology and personalised support.


Our mission relies on a strong, cross-functional team. At Yazen, we’re not only home to doctors, dietitians, psychologists and physiotherapists, we also work with experts in areas such as technology, data analysis, design, product development, marketing and communications.


We’re expanding fast across Europe and was recently ranked #2 fastest-growing company in Europe by Sifted’s 2025 Startup Europe Leaderboard — and the #1 in the Nordics and Benelux with a revenue growth of nearly 80x in just two years. And also been awarded the “best weight loss treatment of the year in Europe 2025” by the international journal Healthcare Business review.


Join the mission to transform healthcare with Yazen health.

title: Customer Activation Manager - Lifeplan
description:
**Who are Lifeplan?**
---------------------


Want to make a real difference to people’s future? At Lifeplan, Sweden’s largest digital pension advisor, we help individuals make smarter decisions about one of their most important investments - their pension. Through a unique combination of advanced technology, research-driven analysis and fully independent advice, we provide tailored pension advice based on each individual’s life situation and goals. Our ambition is simple: to make it easy to do the right thing, and help people maximise the value of their pension savings over time.


Lifeplan is a sister company to Benifex, a global SaaS company within employee benefits and total rewards. We share offices and work closely together, giving you the opportunity to be part of a smaller, specialist company while also benefiting from the expertise, network and development opportunities of an international tech organisation.

**Why should you apply?**
-------------------------

* Play a key role in shaping how employees in Sweden experience and engage with Lifeplan, directly influencing activation, usage and perceived value of a growing digital service.
* Take on a highly hands-on role with real ownership, autonomy and the opportunity to build and refine activation journeys end to end.
* Work in a fast-moving, cross-functional environment where your ideas, insights and execution genuinely make an impact.
* Join a team that values data-driven decision-making, creativity and pragmatic problem-solving in equal measure.
* Help people make smarter decisions about their pension - fully independent.

### **Great benefits:**


️ Guaranteed work-life balance with a hybrid working model.


ITP1 pension.


️ Lifeplan.


Access to the Benifex benefits portal.


Generous wellness allowance.


️ 30 vacation days / year.


Referral bonuses.


Enhanced parental pay.


Volunteer Days – two paid days annually to give back to the community.

**Role Overview**
-----------------

As a Customer Activation Manager within Lifeplan, you will own and develop how the Lifeplan service communicates with and activates end users – employees of our customer companies. Your mission is to increase activation, engagement and long-term usage through relevant, measurable and engaging communication across the entire user journey. This role is highly operational and hands-on, with a strong focus on behavioural change, from first exposure to recurring use. You will work closely with commercial, product, customer success and marketing teams in a cross-functional and fast-paced environment.

### **Responsibilities**

* Own and continuously develop all end-user communication for the Lifeplan service across channels.
* Plan, produce and execute communication and activation initiatives.
* Own and optimise the end-user journey from an activation and communication perspective.
* Work hands-on with key channels, including the benefits portal, email communication, Lifeplan.se, webinars and information campaigns.
* Create engaging communication assets, including copy and simpler visual materials, or brief and quality-assure work produced by others.
* Generate insights from user data and translate them into concrete improvements and actions.
* Monitor, analyse and optimise performance using tools such as Google Analytics and Hotjar.
* Support Account Managers and Customer Success in client dialogues related to employee activation..
* Test, evaluate and help establish new activation and communication channels.

**What are we looking for?**
----------------------------

* Around 2–5+ years of experience working with activation, user journeys and conversion within B2C, e-commerce, product marketing or digital marketing.
* Hands-on experience with funnels, user behaviour analysis and performance follow-up.
* Proven ability to create content independently, including copy and basic visual materials.
* High digital proficiency and the ability to quickly learn new tools, systems and platforms.
* A hands-on, proactive approach with a strong sense of ownership from idea to delivery.
* Creative judgement combined with resilience and the ability to navigate ambiguity in a fast-changing environment.
* Fluency in Swedish and English.

### **Bonus points for:**

* Knowledge of UX/UI principles or web analytics.
* Experience with WordPress and/or Elementor.
* Basic skills in design tools such as Photoshop, Illustrator or similar.
* Experience working with financial products or services.

**Our interview process**
-------------------------


We understand the need to have a fast and efficient process, the below will all be completed in the shortest time possible.


Initial call with the Talent team.


Interview with a peer.


Final interview with the hiring manager.


References.  

  

We want to make the application process as simple and fair as possible. That’s why we don’t ask for a cover letter for this role. Instead, you’ll find a few short questions in the application form. Your answers will help us understand your experience and skills in a more direct and relevant way.

*Please let us know if you need any reasonable adjustments for interviews by replying to the email you will receive after you apply.*
company_description: Benefex is the company behind OneHub, the award-winning employee experience platform.

title: E-commerce Performance Analyst - Stockholm
description:
We are seeking a Marketing Analyst to support and improve e-commerce performance by driving online sales, boosting conversion rates, and elevating the customer experience across multiple markets. The role focuses on optimizing product assortments, pricing strategies, promotional activities, and the overall user journey, while also supporting local teams in deploying and using the e-commerce platform effectively.


You will work hands-on with data—analyzing performance, building dashboards, and uncovering insights to enhance marketing effectiveness. A key part of the role is understanding customer behavior, segmenting audiences, and contributing to stronger retention and customer lifetime value.


You will collaborate closely with both global and regional teams to ensure alignment between strategy and execution. Success in this role requires a structured, analytical mindset, a strong focus on results, and the ability to communicate clearly in an international environment.

**Qualifications**

* Bachelor’s degree in marketing, business, analytics, or a related field
* 5+ years of experience in marketing analytics, e-commerce, or business analysis
* Strong analytical skills with the ability to translate data into actionable insights
* Experience working in international or cross-market environments

**Technical skills**

* Tools: Google Analytics, Tableau, Power BI, Excel
* Data: SQL, data visualization, statistical analysis
* E-commerce: funnel analysis, user experience (UX), conversion rate optimization (CRO)

**Start Date & Application:**


Start Date: 2026-05-01


End Date: 2027-05-01


Application Deadline: 2026-04-24


Remote Work: hybrid


Location: Stockholm


Contact Person: 0790 062 711


Selections and interviews are ongoing!

Although we are a relatively new player, we have already gained the trust of many of Sweden's largest companies and operate both nationally and internationally. With bases in Sweden and Spain, we offer a unique combination of local expertise and global reach. Our strong network and deep industry insights make us the obvious partner for companies looking to stay ahead in their recruitment efforts.

title: Product Manager
description:
**About the Role:**  

As a Product Manager working with the technology at IO Interactive, you will play a central role in shaping the road map, feature set and delivering the vision for our proprietary game engine, Glacier, that for 2 decades has contributed to shaping the game development world.


As part of the Product group, you will collaborate closely with engineering and production teams to ensure the tooling, Editor and engine evolves to meet and exceed the needs of our AAA game development teams, while innovating world class features and usability.

**What you will do:**

* Be part of the Glacier Product group, owning and maintaining the product vision, road map, and backlog for the Glacier Game Engine, ensuring alignment with the company’s game development, goals and strategies.
* Work closely with engineering teams to define, prioritize, and deliver engine features, improvements, and technical innovations.
* Help envision and design industry defining UX and UI. Define the user stories, acceptance criteria, and technical requirements for implementation.
* Act as liaison between game teams, and the engine development team to gather requirements and ensure the engine supports creative and technical needs, as well as our goals and visions for the technology.
* Drive cross-functional collaboration to ensure smooth integration of engine improvements into the game development pipeline.
* Continuously assess market trends, competitor technologies, and industry advancements to guide the evolution of the Glacier engine.
* Champion the needs of developers and content creators by advocating for an optimal user experience and workflow efficiency.
* Communicate progress, risks, and updates to stakeholders, ensuring transparency and alignment across teams.

**Who you are:**

* Experience as a Product Manager, or related role within the game industry, ideally with experience in game engine development.
* A strong understanding of usability in game engines and game development pipelines.
* Natural curiosity for technologies and solutions.
* Passion for UX, innovation and driving technical excellence in game development tools and technology.
* Excellent analytical and problem-solving skills, with the ability to balance technical and creative needs.
* Strong organizational skills and experience managing complex projects in a creative environment.
* Exceptional communication and stakeholder management skills.

**Why Join Us?**

* Work on industry leading technology that powers world-class AAA games.
* Ensure the success of games with millions of players.
* Collaborate with the industry's top-tier talent in a highly creative and technical environment.
* Shape the technology of tomorrow with Glacier.
* Enjoy a culture of innovation, ownership and empowerment.


If you’re passionate about driving the development of next-generation usability, game engine technology and enabling game teams to create outstanding experiences, we’d love to hear from you!

**BE IMPACTFUL!**

 **Who we are:**

  

IO Interactive is an independent videogame development and publishing company with studios in Copenhagen, Malmö, Barcelona, Istanbul and Brighton. As the creative force behind some of the most talked-about multiplatform video games in the last decade, we are committed to creating unforgettable characters and experiences – all powered by our award-winning, proprietary Glacier technology.


IOI is a studio that values in-person collaboration. Being together helps us focus our collective energy on our immediate goals. For us, being both in-office as well as connected across our studios helps us integrate our teams faster, strengthen relationships, and improve knowledge-sharing. We believe that the more time we spend together, the more quality and progress we achieve for our games and players.


We know that to achieve those goals, we need courage, talented people and a great working environment – and we do our utmost to have all of that. Across our multiple studios, we’re working on several projects. Crucially though, we’re all one team. We value the work and impact that each person brings to the table and we actively encourage new ideas, whilst listening to your insights along the way.


We have a dedicated team of People Managers, who look after you as an individual and as an employee. With more than 40 nationalities, we know that everyone is different and we are proud to have a reputation for being a friendly workplace with highly-talent people.


Learn more about our Glacier engine.

title: UX/UI Designer Intern
description:
**XR Solutions** 




**UX/UI Designer Intern — XR / AR Platform (Remote)** 




  





**About us** 




 We build augmented reality systems for industrial clients. Our software runs on factory floors and in production environments, guiding technicians through maintenance, inspection, and operations on real machinery. The common thread across our work: AR content has to stay precisely locked to real-world equipment, reliably, in environments that weren't designed for it.
 



  





**The role** 




 This is not a “support” design role.
 



  





 You will take ownership of the UX/UI for our XR glasses platform — designing interfaces that technicians rely on in real working environments. This includes everything from step-by-step workflows to live AR collaboration tools and real-time data overlays.
 



  





 You’ll work across the full design process, from early research to production-ready design, in close collaboration with product and engineering.
 



  





 Remote to start, with the option to move hybrid later.
 



  





**What you’ll do** 



* Own the UX/UI design process end-to-end (research → concept → prototype → delivery)
* Design for XR environments (spatial UI, voice, gestures, eye tracking)
* Conduct user research and usability testing with real industrial users
* Build and evolve design systems in Figma
* Work closely with developers (Unity) to bring designs into production



  





**What we’re looking for** 



* Strong working experience in Figma (you know your way around systems, not just screens)
* Experience building and maintaining design systems
* Ability to work independently and make decisions without constant direction
* Clear, structured thinking and attention to detail



  





**Nice to have** 



* Experience with AR / XR / spatial design
* Experience working with Unity or similar environments



  





**Important to know** 



* This is an
 **unpaid internship**
* High-performing interns are considered for a
 **paid role**



  





 We aim to make this worth your time:
 



 You’ll work on a live product, solve real problems, and gain experience in a space most designers don’t get access to early in their careers.
 



  





**What you’ll gain** 



* Hands-on experience designing for XR hardware
* Exposure to industrial use cases (not just consumer apps)
* A strong, real-world portfolio project
* Potential pathway to a full-time role



  





 Interested? Send us your CV. We'd love to hear from you.

title: UX/UI Designer with Frontend Development Skills
description:
At Evolution AB / Nolimit City, we create world-class gaming products with bold, uncompromising design and unmatched attention to detail. We're looking for a UX/UI Designer who doesn't just stop at the design phase — you also bring your ideas to life in code.
 



  





 You'll join a cross-functional product team with full ownership over the solutions you design, working on innovative and highly interactive user experiences seen by players around the world. You’ll collaborate closely with engineers to bring your ideas to life—creating products that are both beautiful and usable. Depending on your experience, you might implement parts of the frontend yourself or work alongside developers to ensure your vision is realized in the final product.
 



  





**What You'll Do** 



* Lead UX and UI design efforts for new and existing products — from user flows and wireframes to high-fidelity mockups.
* Translate your designs into functional, responsive, and accessible frontend components using React (Next.js) and TypeScript.
* Partner with developers and stakeholders to iterate on solutions, run experiments, and refine interfaces based on user feedback and performance data.
* Build and maintain components in a shared design system, ensuring consistency and scalability across products.
* Advocate for user-centered design throughout the product development process.



  





**You Might Be a Great Fit If You** 



* Have a strong background in UX/UI design, with a portfolio showcasing thoughtful, elegant interfaces and interaction design.
* Are fluent in modern design tools like Figma, and enjoy prototyping and testing user flows.
* Know how to write clean, maintainable frontend code using React and TypeScript.
* Are comfortable working with developers and understand how design decisions impact performance and implementation.
* Care deeply about usability, accessibility, and the overall user experience.
* Enjoy working in a fast-paced, collaborative environment where experimentation is encouraged.



  





**Bonus Points** 



* Experience with Next.js, Redux Toolkit, or Headless CMSs like Strapi.
* Familiarity with A/B testing, analytics, and data-driven design decisions.
* An understanding of game or entertainment product design patterns.



  





**Technologies You'll Touch** 



* Figma (or other tools you prefer) / Design Systems
* React / Next.js
* TypeScript / JavaScript
* Redux Toolkit
* CSS / Tailwind CSS
* Strapi (Headless CMS)
* Git (GitHub Actions)



  





**Who we are** 




 You don't need to know everything from day one. If you're a designer who loves to get your hands dirty in code, and you're passionate about crafting exceptional user experiences, we'd love to meet you.
 



  





 Join one of Sweden's fastest-growing companies and help shape the future of interactive entertainment.
 



  





 Nolimit City, Stockholm based development team. We provide you with your choice of OS and IDE.
 



 Apply on LinkedIn, or send your application to hr-sweden@nolimitcity.com
 



 http://www.nolimitcity.com

title: UI Designer
description:
**Craft:**
 Games Design & Production
   

  

**Job Description:**
 Are you ready to take our players on an incredible journey? Do you aspire to create the world’s best mobile games? We are seeking UI talent to help us level up and ensure our games are as inclusive and engaging as possible. You’ll drive our team forward to deliver unforgettable experiences that delight players across the world
   

  

 Your role within our Kingdom
   

  

 As a talented UI Designer, you’ll work closely with UX and game designers, user researchers, developers, game artists and technical artists. Collaborating with other specialists in your feature team, UI lead and producers, you will work on the effective and optimised user interface systems and new playercentric features for Candy Crush. You are following your passion for interaction and communication design and strive to learn more about it applying these design principles in practice.
   

  

 As a member of the Candy team you’ll participate in a cross-location collaboration. We believe your communication and organisation skills will help you to champion our cooperation on features and information exchange among the teams.
   

  

 Skills to create Thrills
   

  

* You have experience in UI design
* You have a well-developed sense of visual aesthetics
* You understand the need of assets optimisation and keen on technical constraints
* You can apply interaction and communication design to your work
* You are a proactive and reliable team player
* You have good communication and organizational skills
* You are willing to expand your professional knowledge


 Bonus Points
   

  

* Experience in UI design for games, mobile games as a plus
* Experience in UI implementation with game engines
* Skills in animation, motion design and/or special effects
* Interested in typography and iconography
* Experience working with design specs
* Experience working in an agile project environment
* A portfolio demonstrating all aspects of your skill, including any relevant personal projects, is required.


**About King**
 With a mission of
 *Making the World Playful* 
 , King is a leading interactive entertainment company with more than 20 years of history of delivering some of the world’s most iconic games in the mobile gaming industry, including the world-famous Candy Crush franchise, as well as other mobile game hits such as
 *Farm Heroes Sag* 
 a. King games are played by more than 200 million monthly active users. King, part of Microsoft (NASDAQ: MSFT), has Kingsters in Stockholm, Malmö, London, Barcelona, Berlin, Dublin, San Francisco, New York, Los Angeles and Malta. More information can be found at King.com or by following us on LinkedIn, @lifeatking on Instagram, or @king\_games on X.

title: Product Designer
description:
**TL;DR** 
 - We’re looking for world-class product designers to help shape Lovable. You’ll lead projects end-to-end, collaborating closely with engineering. We expect a broad range of design skills, and exceptional taste. You’ll join a team at the forefront of AI, enabling anyone to create software.
   

  

**Why Lovable?**
 Lovable lets anyone and everyone build software with plain English. From solopreneurs to Fortune 100 teams, millions of people use Lovable to transform raw ideas into real products - fast. We are at the forefront of a foundational shift in software creation, which means you have an unprecedented opportunity to change the way the world works. Over 2 million people in 200+ countries already use Lovable to launch businesses, automate work, and bring their ideas to life. And we’re just getting started.
   

  

 We’re a small, talent-dense team building a generation-defining company from Stockholm. We value extreme ownership, high velocity and low-ego collaboration. We seek out people who care deeply, ship fast, and are eager to make a dent in the world.
   

  

**What We’re Looking For**
* A track record of working in high performing, fast-paced startup environments
* A portfolio showcasing successful product work loved by users and produced in high-velocity teams
* Talent for simplifying complicated user journeys into intuitive experiences
* Strong prototyping abilities with emphasis on clear visual communication
* Fluency with design systems and technical implementations
* Outstanding command of visual design, UI patterns, and interaction principles
* High aptitude for shipping and learning extraordinarily quickly
* Bonus: You ship to production, perhaps with a little help from AI
* Bonus: Experience designing AI products


**What You’ll Do**
**In one sentence:** 
 Design Lovable, making it the most Lovable piece of software ever.
   

  

* Craft detailed user flows and high-fidelity mockups for new features
* Own design projects from conception to delivery, collaborating with engineering or ideally implementing yourself with AI (we'll train you)
* Be scrappy and hands on with any design assets needed
* Establish scalable design processes that uphold quality standards
* Champion quick wins and impactful improvements
* Contribute to improving the design quality of Lovable's AI
* Help set the bar for design quality and the culture for how design works at Lovable


**How We Hire**
* Fill in a short form then jump on an initial exploratory call.
* We'll send you a quick take-home asking to present your best work over a loom video presentation.
* Join us for a round of interviews to discuss your experience in more depth
* Join us for trial work lasting 1-2 days remote or on-site. We'll see how you tick and you get to meet the team and explore whether joining Lovable feels right for you.


**Important Note** 
 :
   

  

* Please submit your application in English. It’s our company language so you’ll be speaking lots of it if you join.
* We treat all candidates equally - if you’re interested please apply through our careers portal.

title: Experience Innovation Internship
description:
Above is now looking for a talented Experience Innovation intern to join us in either our Malmö or Stockholm studios starting August or September 2026. For the best experience on both sides, and to really get to know each other, we prefer an internship duration of 5-6 months. This is a great opportunity for you to develop your skills and get to know more about agency life!
   

  

 You will get the opportunity to work with multi-disciplinary project teams on a wide variety of design & innovation projects for some of the world's most exciting clients. We believe in creating a culture where you, as an individual, can take responsibility for your work - but we also take care of each other as we navigate ambiguity, tackle challenging problems, and grow as a team.
   

  

**What We Are Looking For**
 You might be an interaction designer with a passion for technology, a design technologist with a strong UX sensibility, or something in between. We are more interested in your perspective and way of working than your formal background. These are the things we are looking for when reviewing candidates:
   

  

* An inspiring design portfolio; strong conceptual thinking, good ideas, and a healthy dose of creativity
* A holistic, medium-agnostic approach to design challenges, comfortable moving between digital interfaces, physical interactions, and everything in between
* A hands-on mentality; you reach for a prototype early and often, across a broad range of fidelities and mediums, from Figma and Arduino to CAD, 3D printing, and a healthy relationship with duct tape and glue guns
* Technical curiosity and familiarity with (emerging) prototyping tools and technologies, from electronics and code to generative AI tools and agentic workflows; you use them as a springboard for exploration and problem-solving
* Aesthetic sensibility balanced with a thoughtful, user-centered approach
* Ability to adapt your methods and process to the needs of the project
* A humble, self-driven and optimistic attitude; a fast learner with a genuine willingness to grow
* A team player with solid verbal and visual communication skills


**A Bit About Above**
 At Above we are devoted to creating value in people’s everyday lives. We are experts in breaking down boundaries between the physical and the digital with the fusion of hardware and software through products and services. We work with the full stack: from strategic concepting all the way through to manufacturing.
   

  

 One of our core philosophies is that we believe in prototyping early and often and bringing design and technology together from the very beginning. If our designers can understand and make technology decisions, while our engineers can grasp and influence the user experience, then we can truly find a meaningful collaboration that results in relevant products & services people love to use.
   

  

 We work with amazing international brands, local Scandinavian heroes, and a fantastic collection of startups. We’re a team of warm, welcoming, dedicated professionals that love to build cool stuff. In everything we do, we strive for a world-class result and we believe you share that mindset.
   

  

**Join our team**
 Please submit your portfolio and short motivation statement. Interviews are happening on a rolling basis. Applications without a portfolio will not be considered. Our internships are always paid, and we are open to offering support with visa & work permit processes for successful international candidates.
   

  

 If you have any questions regarding the job posting, please contact Romy Koppert, Experience Designer — reachable at romy.koppert@above.se; or Rocio Rey, Design Technologist — reachable at rocio.reyaloe@above.se, both in our Malmö studio.
   

  

 We’re looking forward to hearing from you!

title: Global Retail Experience Creative Designer
description:
Marimekko is a Finnish lifestyle design company renowned for its original prints and colors. The company’s product portfolio includes high-quality clothing, bags and accessories as well as home décor items ranging from textiles to tableware. When Marimekko was founded in 1951, its unparalleled printed fabrics gave it a strong and unique identity. In 2025, the company's net sales totaled EUR 190 million and comparable operating profit margin was 17.1 percent. Globally, there are over 170 Marimekko stores, and online store serves customers in 39 countries. The key markets are Northern Europe, the Asia-Pacific region and North America. The Group employs about 490 people. The company’s share is quoted on Nasdaq Helsinki Ltd. www.marimekko.com
 
 Marimekko is a Finnish lifestyle design company renowned for its original prints and colors. The company’s product portfolio includes high-quality clothing, bags and accessories as well as home décor items ranging from textiles to tableware. When Marimekko was founded in 1951, its unparalleled printed fabrics gave it a strong and unique identity. In 2025, the company's net sales totaled EUR 190 million and comparable operating profit margin was 17.1 percent. Globally, there are over 170 Marimekko stores, and online store serves customers in 39 countries. The key markets are Northern Europe, the Asia-Pacific region and North America. The Group employs about 490 people. The company’s share is quoted on Nasdaq Helsinki Ltd. www.marimekko.com
 


  


 We are looking for a creative and ambitious
 


  


**GLOBAL RETAIL EXPERIENCE CREATIVE DESIGNER** 



  


 to join our Retail Experience team based in Helsinki and Stockholm.
 


  


 The Retail Experience team is responsible for ensuring a global consistent and cohesive Marimekko brand and retail experience in all offline touchpoints by steering direction and creating guidelines for conceptual store design, in-store campaign, Pop Up and window design, and Visual merchandising. As a part of the Global Marketing and PR department, the Retail Experience team works in close collaboration with many company functions including design, sales, and the creative concept function.
 


  


 As our
 **Global Retail Experience Creative Designer** 
 your main responsibility is to ensure the global store campaign designs and other spatial creative concept designs that caters to global own retail stores, partner stores and wholesale.
 


  


 This is a full-time fixed-term parental leave cover from 10.08.2026 – 19.08.2027, in which you will report to Marimekko’s Global Retail Experience Manager and be based in Stockholm, Sweden.
 


  


**Main responsibilities:** 



  

  
* Following the high-level campaign concept & visuality, responsible for the creative window and in-store set design of 360 omnichannel seasonal campaigns.
  
* Responsible for creating and implementing the concept framework and creative set design for all seasonal (and other) in-store campaign activations and in-store consumer facing events for global own retail stores, wholesale, and partner stores.
  
* Responsible for the creative design and implementation of the seasonal pop-up experience that caters to global retail, wholesale, and partners.
  
* Responsible for the creative campaign/concept designs related to innovation works and other growth projects for retail.
  
* Project manage projects related to creative in-store concepts, windows & campaigns, and act as main contact towards both internal and external partners on related matters.
  


  


**In order to succeed in the role, you have:** 



  

  
* A proven professional Visual Merchandiser experience, minimum 5 years
  
* Previous experience working from a global position in visual merchandising, campaign set-up design or similar designer role catering to implementing global retail experience
  
* A proven track record in creating visual presentations, designs and display mock up’s working with suitable tools (e.g., Sketch-Up, Adobe creative suit, Power point)
  
* The ability to see the big picture and work with an international mindset
  
* Strong experience and understanding of the fashion and design industries
  
* A results-driven and commercial mindset
  
* Creative ideas and the ability to communicate these ideas, both verbally and visually, to others
  
* Ability to work cross functionally with other key stakeholders
  
* Strong organizational skills
  
* Fluency In English, both verbal and written
  
* Excellent communication and presentation skills
  


  


 At Marimekko we encourage people to be themselves and value diversity. We believe in fairness and doing things together, using common sense and finding joy in our work. If you connect with these values and have the right background, we might be able to offer you a unique opportunity to work in an exciting, international environment with one of the most iconic lifestyle brands.
 


  


 If all this sparks your interest and you feel like you are the one, we are looking for, please send your application including your CV and cover letter with salary expectation via our career site at http://company.marimekko.com/careers. We will start the interviews already during the application period so please, let us hear from you as soon as possible but no later than on
 **10.05.2026.** 
 For more information about the role, please contact Jennie Wahlström, Global Retail Experience Manager by email: jennie.wahlstrom@marimekko.com
 


  


*Marimekko's culture and working environment are founded on equality, inclusion and cherishing diversity. Marimekko welcomes and encourages everyone regardless of their national origin, ethnicity, sexual orientation, gender identity, disability, religion or other personal characteristic to apply. Recruitment is always based on business need, and the candidates are evaluated on relevant knowledge, skills and experience as well as motivation. Marimekko is ranked as the 7th Most Attractive Employer in Finland amongst business professionals according to Universum’s ranking. Marimekko is also the 5th most attractive employer in Finland amongst business students. Read more about the Universum’s ranking on their website.*

title: Product Manager - Implio
description:
****Our Mission****
 Besedo is a global tech company delivering
 **Trust & Safety solutions** 
 for online marketplaces worldwide. Each year, we review and moderate more than
 **500 million pieces of user-generated content** 
 and block over
 **40 million fraud attempts** 
 , helping platforms remain safe and trusted for millions of users.
   

  

 Headquartered in
 **Stockholm** 
 ,
 **Sweden** 
 , Besedo employs
 **300+ people across 5 international offices** 
 .
   

  

 Our SaaS platform
 **Implio** 
 combines advanced
 **AI (deep learning, NLP, computer vision)** 
 with intuitive human moderation tools and analytics. The result: a streamlined, powerful solution that helps businesses reduce risks, protect users, and build safer digital experiences.
   

  

 Learn more about Implio in our video and explore Besedo on our website.
   

  

****Your Challenge****
 Besedo is looking for a Product Manager to work on and scale
 **Implio** 
 , our core moderation platform. Reporting directly to the CTO, this
 **Stockholm‑based hybrid role** 
 is not a feature‑focused product role. You’ll work at the intersection of:
   

  

* ML and LLM systems
* Client‑facing product
* Adversarial environments (fraud, abuse, spam)


 The role focuses on turning a complex, evolving problem space into a coherent and scalable product system.
   

  

****What you`ll drive****
* The end‑to‑end automation moderation workflow within Implio
* Balancing:
+ Automation (ML)
+ Agentic systems (LLMs)
+ 3rd party integrations

* Core product surfaces, including:
+ Decisioning logic
+ Policy systems
+ Client‑facing controls and transparency


**Key Responsibilities**
* Help define how Implio evolves from rule‑based systems to ML‑driven and agentic systems
* Contribute to product strategy through practical decision‑making (not slide decks)
* Establish clarity around what the product should address and what sits outside scope
* Work closely with partners across Besedo to align product direction with:
+ Operational realities
+ Model capabilities
+ Client needs


****System Design & Coherence****
* Approach moderation as a system, not a set of individual features, covering:
+ Policies
+ Signals
+ Decisions
+ Feedback loops

* Support consistency across:
+ ML & LLM outputs
+ Human decisions
+ Client expectations


**Metrics & Feedback Loops**
* Take responsibility for core metrics such as:
+ Precision and recall
+ Cost per moderated item
+ Latency and SLA adherence

* Help build reliable ground‑truth and feedback pipelines
* Focus on metrics that reflect real‑world outcomes rather than surface‑level reporting


**What This Role Focuses On**
* Thinking in flows, trade‑offs, and constraints rather than individual features
* Comfort working with ambiguity, including:
+ Noisy data
+ Subjective or evolving definitions of “truth”

* An adaptive approach as fraud and abuse patterns continue to change


**What This Role Is Not**
* Not a roadmap coordination role
* Not a backlog‑only delivery role
* Not focused purely on UX or growth


**The expertise you’ve built**
**5+ years of experience** 
 in product management and experience in at least one of the following areas:
   

  

* ML‑powered or data‑driven products
* Trust & Safety or moderation systems
* Fraud, risk, or abuse platforms
* High‑scale B2B SaaS environments


 Experience from adjacent domains or non‑linear career paths is welcome.
   

  

 Besedo values diverse perspectives and experiences. If this role sounds interesting, but your background doesn’t match every requirement listed, you’re still encouraged to apply.

title: AI & Automation Intern
description:
**About Us**
 Velory is transforming how companies buy, manage, and reuse IT. Our platform automates the entire IT lifecycle from procurement to end-of-life helping companies operate smarter and save both time and money.
   

  

 A core part of Velory is our network of IT retailers. They are not just partners they are essential to how we deliver value.
   

  

 Through Velory, customers purchase hardware via IT retailers, making them a critical part of our product and delivery. At the same time, retailers are a powerful growth engine. By reselling Velory as part of their offering, they bring new customers, new revenue, and help us scale across markets.
   

  

 We’ve already proven that this model works. Now, we’re scaling it across Europe.
   

  

 We’re looking for someone who wants to take ownership of that journey building strong relationships, driving initiatives forward, and creating long-term value together with our customers and partners.
   

  

****What You Will Do****
 Are you curious about AI, automation and how technology can improve the way companies work every day? Do you enjoy solving problems, testing new ideas, and working hands-on in a fast-moving environment? Then this could be the perfect opportunity for you.
   

  

 We’re looking for an
 **AI & Automation Intern** 
 to join our team in Stockholm. This is a unique opportunity to combine practical operations work with AI-driven innovation, helping us improve both internal processes and customer experience.
   

  

**AI & Automation**
* Identify repetitive tasks and opportunities for automation across support and operations
* Build and maintain simple AI-powered tools, workflows, and internal solutions
* Explore and test new AI technologies to improve efficiency and user experience
* Help create reporting and insights from a support and operations perspective


**Support & Customer Experience**
* Assist with customer support tasks such as tickets, onboarding and admin requests
* Understand customer needs and recurring pain points through daily interactions
* Use support learnings to improve processes and automation initiatives


**Content & Operations**
* Create and update help center articles, guides and internal documentation
* Support operational workflows and internal coordination tasks
* Improve how information is structured and shared internally and externally


**Quality and testning**
* Ensure quality and consistency across support responses and content
* Test new product features, automations and AI solutions before launch
* Identify issues and suggest practical improvements


**Required Skills**
* A hands-on and solution-oriented mindset
* Strong interest in AI, automation, and modern workflows
* Comfort working with both technical tools and operational tasks
* Structured way of working with attention to detail
* Good communication skills in English
* Ability to work independently while collaborating with others
* Fluency in English, both written and spoken.
* Excellent communication and interpersonal skills.
* Ability to work independently and as part of a team.
* Eagerness to learn and a proactive attitude.


****Who You Are****
 To excel in this role, you should embody Velory's core values and bring a creative, innovative spirit to our team:
   

  

* Show ownership: Look at the big picture and take the initiative to contribute where needed.
* Manage speed: Eliminate obstacles to maintain a high, sustainable pace.
* Represent quality: Aim high, sweat the details, and iterate.
* Earn trust: Be communicative, transparent, and follow through on commitments.
* Deliver wow: Go beyond expectations in a creative and unexpected way.


**What We Offer**
* A unique opportunity to grow and learn in a fast-paced scale-up environment.
* Hands-on experience in a fast-paced and innovative environment.
* A collaborative and inclusive work culture.
* Flexible work arrangements.
* Located in the vibrant city of Stockholm.


****Join Us****
 At Velory, you’ll be more than just an intern – you'll be a key player in our mission to revolutionize the digital landscape. If you’re ready to bring your creativity, skills, and passion to our team, we’d love to hear from you!

title: Design Lead
description:
**TL;DR —** 
*A.Engineer is a product that works. Now we need it to feel world-class. Own the entire design surface including product, user experience, and brand.* 




  





**ABOUT A.ENGINEER** 




 A.Engineer is an agentic AI platform that automates the manual work of structural and civil engineering. In contrast to many AI solutions, A.Engineer does not give answers, it does the job. Calculations, fully automated agentic workflows, and report generation, inside a single intelligent workspace. Engineers work faster without sacrificing control: every AI step is fully auditable, and every output is verified by a professional engineer.
 



 We are a start-up born inside Tyréns Group's innovation programme Tyréns NEXT, combining the resources and domain depth of one of Europe's leading engineering consultancies with the speed and ambition of a founding team. We launched across Europe in late 2025 and are now aiming to scale the business globally.
 



 Research shows that 40–80% of engineering work is still manual. A.Engineer will change that.
 



  





 www.a.engineer
 



  





**THE OPPORTUNITY** 





 A.Engineer has already customers and users. Engineers are using it, saving hours every week, and starting to tell their colleagues about it. What we do not yet have is a product that looks and feels so good that is just delight every user, sells itself and spreads organically. That is what you will build. As Design Lead you own everything: the UI/UX, the design system, and the A.Engineer brand. You will raise the visual and experiential standard of the product from MVP to world-class and you will do it working directly with the rest of the core team.
 




  





**WHAT YOU'LL DO** 



* Take full ownership of product design, from user research and information architecture to interaction design and polished, pixel-perfect UI.
* Build and own the A.Engineer design system: component library, design tokens, and documentation used by engineers every day.
* Define and evolve the brand: visual identity, typography, colour, motion, and tone of voice across every touchpoint.
* Work side by side with engineering in sprint cycles you ship, you do QA, you care about what actually makes the difference.
* Conduct user interviews with engineers and translate complex domain feedback into intuitive, elegant design solutions.



  





**WHAT WE'RE LOOKING FOR** 



* 5+ years of product design at a B2B SaaS or technical product company. You have shipped complex interfaces used by professionals.
* A portfolio that shows both design craft and taste for world class UX, ideally for data-intensive or generative AI products.
* Hands-on experience building scalable design systems, not just contributing to an existing one.
* Comfortable moving from whiteboard to modern design tools to working prototype without needing a handoff from anyone.
* High ownership mentality: you see something broken, you fix it. You don't wait to be asked.
* Bonus: experience in AI native design tools



  





**WHAT WE OFFER** 



* Complete creative ownership: product, brand, and design system are yours to build and evolve.
* A seat at the table: direct access to the core team and a real voice in product strategy.
* The chance to define the visual and experiential identity of a category-defining product.
* Hybrid working from Stockholm.
* A mission worth caring about: AEC sector is generating 35-40% of the global emissions and engineering is one of the last professions still drowning in manual work.



  





**HOW WE HIRE** 



* 1. Apply Apply here or send your CV + a short note on why this role fits you to aengineer@tyrens.se
* 2. Intro call 30-45 min with the venture lead: we want to understand what drives you.
* 3. Skills & Culture interview A focused conversation on your craft and how you approach hard problems.
* 4. Offer Fast decisions. We respect your time.



  





*We review applications on a rolling basis and if moving forward we are aiming to respond within 2 business days.* 




  





 ...
 



 About Tyréns NEXT
 



*A.Engineer is a product developed and owned by Tyréns Group, one of Europe’s leading engineering consultancies with more than 3000 employees. Tyréns NEXT is the innovation and digital development arm of the Tyréns Group. Tyréns NEXT combines advanced technology with sustainable design thinking and develops next generation tools that support a smarter and more resilient built environment.* 




  





*Tyréns Group is an Equal Opportunity Employer* 




*At Tyréns Group, we believe great teams are built on diversity of thought and experience. We’re proud to be an equal opportunity employer and committed to creating an inclusive, high-performance culture where everyone can do their best work. We welcome people of all backgrounds and don’t discriminate based on race, color, religion, national origin, gender, gender identity or expression, sexual orientation, age, disability, veteran status, or any other characteristic protected by law* 
 .

title: Service Desk Agent, Solna
description:
At PostNord, IT plays a central role in keeping our operations running smoothly - and we are now looking for a Service Desk Agent who wants to play a key role in delivering high‑quality IT support. In this role, you make a real difference every day by helping users, troubleshooting issues, and ensuring our digital tools work as they should.
   

  

 If you are motivated by delivering great service, enjoy a dynamic environment, and want to be part of our continued digital journey, this could be the right opportunity for you!
   

  

**About The Role**
 As a Service Desk Agent, you are the primary point of contact between our users and suppliers/supporting teams. You troubleshoot, guide, and resolve IT-related incidents and inquiries to keep business operations running efficiently. The role includes ensuring good user experience, maintaining clear communication, and following incidents through to full resolution.
   

  

 You will join a team that values collaboration, structure, and a customer-first mindset. This is a great role for someone who is communicative, responsible, and naturally able to build trustful relationships.
   

  

 The position is based in Solna (Sweden).
   

  

**Key Responsibilities**
* Provide efficient and user-friendly IT support to PostNord employees
* Deliver an excellent user experience in every interaction
* Troubleshoot and resolve incidents related to applications, systems, and hardware
* Document, follow up, and ensure full resolution of incidents
* Coordinate tasks and collaborate with other IT functions when needed
* Contribute to improving processes, routines, and ways of working
* Ensure compliance with laws, regulations, policies, and internal guidelines


 We believe you have experience of IT support or another service-oriented role, and you feel confident working with digital tools and systems. You work in a structured way, adapt easily to changing needs, and stay calm even in high-pressure situations.
   

  

 You communicate clearly, solve problems proactively, and take responsibility from start to finish. You are reliable, flexible, and comfortable taking initiative. Above all, you genuinely enjoy helping others and creating a positive user experience every time.
   

  

**We offer you**
**About**
 We are a modern, customer-oriented company that cares as much about our employees as we do about our customers. With us, you are offered a varied job in an international environment with constant new challenges and quick decisions. In addition to fair employment conditions according to collective agreements, we offer you:
   

  

* Flexible hybrid workplace. Watch the film about our office.
* Great development opportunities
* Great insurance and occupational pension terms
* Wellness allowance & opportunity to train at Arken's gym and indoor swimming pool
* Employee benefits through PostNord Plus - PostNord´s own personnel foundation


**About Us**
 PostNord is the leading supplier of communication and logistics solutions to, from, and within the Nordic region. We ensure the provision of a postal service to households and businesses in Sweden and Denmark. We aim to make everyday life easier and more sustainable for everyone who lives and works in the Nordic region. We are in a constant transformation and work consistently to develop both our offer and our employees, all to achieve our vision of being The favourite carrier of the Nordics. We are PostNord - a fantastic company to work and grow with. Read more at group.postnord.com
   

  

**Apply**
 Welcome to submit your application. The selection is ongoing, so please apply as soon as possible. As part of the recruitment process, certain positions may require a background check. If you progress to a stage where a background check is necessary, you will be informed in advance. If you have any questions or concerns, please email susan.frimodt@postnord.com.
   

  

 We look forward to hearing from you!
   

  

 Read more about our union representatives

title: Principal Game Designer (Core Gameplay) - Hole.io
description:
**About Voodoo**
 Founded in 2013, Voodoo is a tech company that creates mobile games and apps with a mission to entertain the world. Gathering 800 employees, 7 billion downloads, and over 200 million active users, Voodoo is the #3 mobile publisher worldwide in terms of downloads after Google and Meta. Our portfolio includes chart-topping games like Mob Control, Hole.io, Paper.io2, alongside popular apps such as BeReal and Wizz.
   

  

 This position is fully remote as long as you are willing to work in CET hours, or Barcelona-based.
   

  

**Team**
 Our Gaming team is made up of hybrid-casual, casual, and mid-core experts. Our 'Core' games team supports internal and external studios worldwide in creating, developing, and launching new hit games, whilst our 'Live' games team focuses on delivering higher engagement on our existing and successful games.
   

  

 Joining our Gaming team means collaborating with industry experts to build the tools and infrastructure that power the next generation of hit games. You will be a key partner to our game studios, enabling them to build, iterate, and launch games more efficiently.
   

  

 You will be joining one of our Live Studios, working on
 **Hole.io,** 
 one of Voodoo's top games.
   

  

**Role**
 Note: This role is focused on hands-on gameplay design and quality, not team management.
   

  

 We’re seeking a talented and seasoned Principal Game Designer who is deeply passionate about casual games and laser-focused on creating the next big hit. With extensive experience in the industry, you'll play a pivotal role in delivering fun to millions of players. As the driving force behind the game's success, you'll ensure the game reaches the highest standards of quality and innovation.
   

  

* Own the quality bar for core mechanics, moment-to-moment interaction, and overall game feel
* Design, prototype, and refine new gameplay features and mechanics that expand the core Hole.io loop
* Iterate new and existing features & parameters until achieving final quality game feel e.g. friction, bounce, suction force, camera & movement easing curves, etc.
* Partner closely with engineers to implement and iterate on Unity-based gameplay systems that perform well on mobile devices
* Collaborate with level designers to ensure gameplay mechanics integrate smoothly with open 3D environments
* Identify opportunities to improve player engagement, retention, and session satisfaction through gameplay changes
* Lead rapid prototyping and iteration cycles, validating ideas through playtesting, AB tests and data analysis
* Define best practices and design guidelines for gameplay systems and interaction design
* Work with product and analytics teams to translate player data and experimentation results into gameplay improvements
* Champion simplicity, clarity, and delight in every interaction


**Profile**
* 7 years of experience in gameplay design, with proven track record in F2P mobile games
* Experience owning core gameplay systems from concept through launch and live ops
* Deep understanding of game feel, player control responsiveness, and interaction design
* Strong intuition for simple mechanics with high player satisfaction
* Experience designing systems driven by physics interactions, player movement, and environmental gameplay
* Ability to balance accessibility for casual audiences with meaningful gameplay depth
* Strong hands-on experience with Unity and solid understanding of its physics systems & collisions
* Experience working with A/B testing and data-driven informed decision making
* Communication skills in English, both written and verbal
* Deep collaboration mindset, including excellent interpersonal and communication skills, and a positive & humble mindset towards receiving, acting on, and giving feedback
* Accountability, independence, and responsibility when given ownership over your work
* Eager to become more efficient way and to improve yourself day after day


**Nice-to-have**
* Experience improving core loop retention through gameplay iteration
* Comfortable prototyping gameplay directly in engine and collaborating closely with engineers.


**Benefits**
 Competitive salary and other benefits according to the country you reside.

title: CRO Specialist till ICA Banken
description:
Vill du vara med och forma hur vi arbetar med digital analys, konverteringsoptimering och experimentering i en bank med ett av Sveriges starkaste varumärken?
   

  

 ICA Banken befinner sig mitt i en spännande digital tillväxtresa och söker nu en CRO Specialist som vill ta ett tydligt ägarskap för vårt arbete med optimering, datadrivna insikter och affärseffekt. Här får du möjlighet att göra verklig skillnad – för både kunder och affär.
   

  

**Om jobbet**
 I rollen som CRO Specialist arbetar du med analys av användarbeteende i ICA Bankens digitala kanaler, främst webb och app. Ditt uppdrag är att identifiera affärsnära insikter och driva optimeringsinitiativ som förbättrar kundupplevelsen och ökar konvertering.
   

  

 Du planerar, genomför och följer upp A/B-tester och andra experiment. Med ett strukturerat och datadrivet arbetssätt identifierar du tillväxtmöjligheter, prioriterar initiativ och säkerställer att rätt åtgärder genomförs – hela vägen från insikt till effekt.
   

  

 Rollen innebär ett nära samarbete med produkt-, utvecklings-, UX- och CX-team, där du fungerar som länken mellan data, kundbeteende och affär. Du arbetar både operativt och strategiskt – från att sätta upp och kvalitetssäkra tracking, analysera data i GA4 och BigQuery, till att ta fram dashboards i Data Studio och presentera tydliga rekommendationer till relevanta stakeholders.
   

  

 Du blir en del av vårt digitala analysteam men har ett uttalat ansvar för ICA Bankens CRO- och experimenteringsarbete. En viktig del av rollen är också att sprida kunskap i organisationen och bidra till att vidareutveckla vårt gemensamma arbetssätt kring optimering, experimentering och growth.
   

  

 Tjänsten är hybrid och du kan jobba både hemifrån och på plats i Solna på vårt huvudkontor. Då vi är ett socialt team med mycket kontakter ut i organisationen så ser vi ändå gärna att kontoret är det primära valet.
   

  

**Är du den vi söker?**
 För att lyckas i rollen ser vi gärna att du har:
   

  

* några års erfarenhet inom digital analys
* erfarenhet av A/B-testning och arbete med CRO
* god kunskap i Google Analytics 4
* erfarenhet av Google Tag Manager
* vana att skapa dashboards, exempelvis i Data Studio
* erfarenhet av att arbeta datadrivet med insikter och rekommendationer


 Det är meriterande om du även har
   

  

* grundläggande kunskaper i SQL och arbete i BigQuery
* erfarenhet av olika CRO-verktyg och experimenteringsplattformar
* erfarenhet av att arbeta nära produkt- och utvecklingsteam


 Som person är du analytisk och affärsdriven med ett starkt intresse för hur data kan skapa verkligt kund- och affärsvärde. Du är självgående, tar ansvar för dina initiativ och trivs i en roll där du får driva arbetet framåt. Du kommunicerar insikter på ett pedagogiskt och tydligt sätt och är bekväm med att presentera för olika typer av stakeholders. Ditt arbetssätt är strukturerat och målinriktat, och du uppskattar att arbeta mot tydliga mål och uppföljning.
   

  

 Rollen kräver att du behärskar engelska obehindrat i tal och skrift samt att du kan kommunicera på svenska.
   

  

**Därför ska du välja ICA**
 Varje dag är en härlig utmaning på ICA Banken & ICA Försäkring. Varför det? Jo, för att hela vår bransch håller på att förändras. Och den förändringen öppnar för spännande utmaningar där gamla invanda sätt att jobba utmanas. Det betyder också att vi måste hålla oss i konstant utveckling. På riktigt. Både som individer och som verksamhet. Vi behöver föra samman innovation och digitalisering i en härlig kombination, där vi tillsammans kan hitta de där smarta och praktiska lösningarna som kunderna knappt vet om att de behöver. Än.
   

  

 Läs mer om livet på ICA här.
   

  

**Vad händer nu?**
 Skicka in din ansökan så snart som möjligt, vi gör löpande urval och annonsen kan stängas tidigare. Sista dag för ansökan är den 20 Maj 2026.
   

  

 Vid frågor kring tjänsten är du välkommen att kontakta ansvariga rekryterare Bojana Mijocevic tel. 076 695 15 33 eller Annie Milesson, Manager Sales & Analytics, tel. 070 255 08 10.
   

  

 ICA ska spegla våra kunder och samhället, vi strävar därför efter att anställa människor med olika bakgrund, kompetenser, kunskap och erfarenheter. Vi värnar om goda arbetsmiljöförhållanden med mål om helt rökfria arbetsplatser. Om roller kräver det så behöver du genomgå tester, bakgrundskontroller och drogtestning innan anställning.
   

  

 Läs mer om hur det är att jobba på ICA.

title: Android Engineer
description:
At Svea Solar, we have a clear vision – to fix the planet. As Sweden’s and one of Europe’s leading players in energy technology, we are driving the energy transition with solar power and smart energy solutions. ⚡
 



  





 We’re now expanding our app team with a
 *n* 
**Android Engineer** 
 . Are you ready to join the Power Shift?
 



  





**About the role & the team:** 




  





 As our
 **Android Enginee** 
 r, you will be working with our new, customer facing Android App. The app helps our customers to optimize their energy consumption, as well as contribute to a more sustainable world!
 



  





 Our Android App is built with Kotlin and Jetpack Compose and connects to a backend owned by the App team. The app is using the latest and greatest framework from Google, with a minimum version requirement that is currently Android
 



  





 You will be working closely with our Product Manager, Android Staff Engineer and the rest of the app team consisting of a designer and engineers specialized in iOS and Backend development. You will collaborate with the team to define and implement solutions from our roadmap. Discover more about the team by listening to this interview.
 



  





*We follow a collaboration-first policy, working* 
***three days***
*a week from our* 
***Alvik office.***




  





**Your key responsibilities:** 




  




* Collaborate with product managers, UX/UI designers, and backend engineers to define application requirements and specifications
* Write clean, maintainable, and efficient code following industry best practices and design patterns.
* Conduct code reviews and provide constructive feedback to ensure code quality and adherence to standards
* Troubleshoot and resolve application issues, ensuring high performance and responsiveness
* Stay up-to-date with the latest development trends, tools, and technologies, and evaluate their applicability to our projects.
* Contribute to documentation and provide insights on application architecture and design choices.



  





**Are we a match?** 




**We’re looking for you who...** 




  




* Value
 **team** 
 success over personal success and thrive in a collaborative dynamic environment.
* Are fluent in English - our organizational language.
* Ha
 **s** 
 at least
 **3 years** 
 of professional experience working with
 
 Kotlin and a strong passion for the Android development ecosystem.
* You know how to write readable, idiomatic, and maintainable Kotlin and are willing to follow already defined coding guidelines and workflows
* You have released at least one app on the Google Play store or have a project in the works that you can tell us about.



  





 🌍 Life as a Power Shifter -
 **What do we offer you** 




  





**The opportunity to make an impact** 
 – your work directly contributes to fixing the planet and driving the energy
 
 transition.
 



**A value-driven workplace** 
 – read more about our
 
 values here
 
 .
 



**The chance to own your results** 
 – grow, take responsibility, and power up as both we and the energy industry evolve.
 



**Diversity and inclusivity** 
 – different perspectives drive innovation. Here, you can be yourself and contribute with your experiences, and ideas.
 



**Employment benefits** 
 – occupational pension, 30 days of vacation, wellness allowance, parkin
 **g, and more.** 




**Flexibility/ hybrid work** 
 – work up to two days a week from home.
 



  






 Want to see what life at Svea Solar really looks like? Follow us on Instagram: @LifeAtSveaSolar
 




  





**⚡Who are we** 




  





 As Sweden’s - and one of Europe’s - leading providers of energy tech and solar, we help our customers optimize their energy use with smart, connected solutions. From solar panels to heat pumps, batteries, EV chargers, and software, we’re shaping the future of energy
 **.** 
 We call it
 **The Power Shift** 
 . And the ones driving it?
 **Power Shifters** 
 .
 



  





**About our recruitment process** 



* With structured interviews and assessments through
 
 Alva Labs
 
 , we make sure our recruitment process is fair, inclusive, and unbiased - because diversity is key to innovation!
* Read more about our
 
 Recruitment process here
 
 .



  




* 👉
 **Ready to become a Power Shifter?** 
 We review applications on a rolling basis, so don’t wait to send yours in!

title: Lead iOS Developer till ICA Banken
description:
Vi på ICA Banken arbetar ständigt med att utveckla nya smarta och användarvänliga lösningar som förenklar våra kunders vardag. Våra mobila appar är vår viktigaste kundkanal och nu söker vi en Lead iOS Developer som vill ta ett tekniskt helhetsansvar och driva vår app vidare. Vi står inför flera större initiativ där appen moderniseras och skalas upp, och som Lead Developer får du en nyckelroll i denna resa.
   

  

**Om jobbet som Lead Developer**
 Som Lead iOS developer har du det övergripande tekniska ansvaret för iOS-appen. Det handlar bl a om att ansvara för appens övergripande arkitektur, driva modernisering, refaktorisering, teknisk skuld samt säkerställa att appen följer designprinciper och säkerhetskrav.
   

  

 Vår app utvecklas i SwiftUI och vi delar även viss logik med Android via Kotlin Multiplatform (KMP).
   

  

 Vi är ett sammansvetsat agilt team med produktägare, UX/UI och testare som brinner för bankens digitala utveckling. Vi samarbetar också tätt med våra near-shore konsulter i Bosnien. Vår arbetsplats kännetecknas generellt av en familjär stämning där vi är måna om att alla får fram sina idéer och åsikter. Att aktivt dela med sig av sin kunskap och hjälpa varandra är viktigt för oss.
   

  

**Är du den vi söker?**
 Vi letar efter dig som har djup erfarenhet av modern iOSutveckling och ett starkt intresse för att driva arkitektur, kvalitet och långsiktig teknisk riktning. Du har flera års erfarenhet som senior apputvecklare och behärskar Swift, SwiftUI, MVVM, modularisering och concurrency på en nivå som gör dig trygg i att fatta tekniska beslut. Ditt dagliga arbete innefattar också nyutveckling och förvaltning av appkod där du värdesätter robust, välskriven kod och lämnar ifrån dig testade, hållbara lösningar.
   

  

 Du har även:
   

  

* Gedigen erfarenhet av CI/CDflöden i GitHub
* Förståelse för säkerhetskrav i mobilbank, som secure storage och Keychain
* Förmåga att analysera krascher, prestanda och loggar via exempelvis Firebase och Xcode
* Erfarenhet av designsystem och komponentbibliotek, gärna via Figma


 Det är meriterande om du har en bakgrund från bank-, finans- eller annan reglerad miljö samt erfarenhet av AI-stödda utvecklingsprocesser.
   

  

 Som person är du driven, nyfiken, har ett genuint intresse av utveckling och arkitektur. Du förkovrar dig gärna i nya trender. Du ser det också som naturligt att dela med dig av kunskap och coachar andra för ett bra samarbete.
   

  

**Därför ska du välja ICA**
 Varje dag är en härlig utmaning på ICA Banken & ICA Försäkring. Varför det? Jo, för att hela vår bransch håller på att förändras. Och den förändringen öppnar för spännande utmaningar där gamla invanda sätt att jobba utmanas. Det betyder också att vi måste hålla oss i konstant utveckling. På riktigt. Både som individer och som verksamhet. Vi behöver föra samman innovation och digitalisering i en härlig kombination, där vi tillsammans kan hitta de där smarta och praktiska lösningarna som kunderna knappt vet om att de behöver. Än.
   

  

 Läs mer om livet på ICA här.
   

  

**Vad händer nu?**
 Välkommen med din ansökan senast den  30/04 /2026. Vi uppmuntrar dig att skicka in en ansökan så snart som möjligt , då urvalet sker löpande och annonsen kan komma att stängas tidigare än sista ansökningsdag.
   

  

 Har du några frågor gällande tjänsten är du välkommen att kontakta ansvarig chef: Marino Peretic, 070 219 55 05. Har du frågor om rekryteringsprocessen, vänligen kontakta ansvarig rekryterare Bojana Mijocevic på te. 076 695 15 33
   

  

 ICA ska spegla våra kunder och samhället, vi strävar därför efter att anställa människor med olika bakgrund, kompetenser, kunskap och erfarenheter. Tester kan förekomma i processen. Vi värnar om goda arbetsmiljöförhållanden med mål om helt rökfria arbetsplatser och tillämpar även drogtestning i samband med rekryteringen.

title: SAP Integrationskonsult
description:
SAP BTP, integrationer och andra spännande teknikmöjligheter, här är du som bäst!
   

  

 Vårt team av utvecklare har bred kunskap inom SAP BTP (Business Technology Platform) och Fiori och söker nu fler kollegor främst inom integrationsområdet.
   

  

 Som SAP Integrationsexpert kommer du att arbeta direkt med våra kunder för att designa, implementera och stödja integrationslösningar som kopplar samman SAP- och icke-SAP-system. Du kommer att arbeta nära kunden för att förstå och analysera deras integrationsbehov och utveckla skräddarsydda lösningar med hjälp av SAP BTP Integration Suite.
   

  

 Om du har en bakgrund inom rådgivning eller konsulting och brinner för att hjälpa företag att optimera sina integrationslösningar är detta din chans att göra en verklig skillnad!
   

  

 Bli en del av vårt dynamiska team och hjälp oss att driva innovation och framgång.
   

  

**Om Stretch Evolve**
 Med slutanvändaren i fokus och innovation som drivkraft skapar vi framtiden. Vi utgår från SAP:s Cloud lösningar, guidar och coachar våra kunder genom hela den utvecklande livscykeln. Tillsammans har vi kompetensen, erfarenheten och dessutom en extra spets inom S/4HANA, SAP BTP, Fiori, SAP Analytics Cloud, UX och förändringsledning, vilket gör att vi kan säkerställa största möjliga utväxling för våra kunder i de initiativ vi är involverade i. Här kan du göra skillnad!
   

  

 Nyfiken på att bli en del av vårt SAP team?
   

  

**Vi Tror Att Du**
* har praktisk erfarenhet av att designa, bygga och testa integrationer mellan SAP och andra system/applikationer för både on-premise och hybrida Cloud lösningar
* har erfarenhet av att integrationsmonitorering, felhantering och lösa problem kopplat till integrationslösningar
* har minst 3 års erfarenhet av SAP Integration Suite, fd SAP CPI (Cloud Platform Integration)
* har erfarenhet av REST API:er, API utveckling, API Management
* har minst 1 års erfarenhet av att leda och driva integrationsprojekt
* är självgående, analytisk, strukturerad, proaktiv, lösningsorienterad
* erfarenhet av att arbeta direkt med kunder och en förmåga att skapa starka kundrelationer
* behärskar svenska språket


**Någon eller några av nedan erfarenheter hjälper dig att lyckas i denna roll:**
* Erfarenhet av SAP PO/PI/XI
* Relevanta SAP-certifieringar, såsom SAP Certified Application Associate - SAP Integration Associate, är en fördel


 Vi ser fram emot din ansökan!
   

  

 Hälsar teamet på Stretch Evolve

title: Drifttekniker IT-system
description:
IT/OT
  
  

Hos Uppsala Vatten är IT en förutsättning för att vi ska kunna leverera samhällsviktiga tjänster som dricksvatten, avloppsrening, biogas och avfallshantering. Våra system är avgörande för att verksamheten ska fungera – och du blir en viktig del i att säkerställa att de gör det, varje dag.
  
Vi befinner oss i en spännande utvecklingsfas där digitalisering och moderna IT-lösningar står i fokus. Här får du arbeta nära både teknik och verksamhet, i en roll där du bidrar till stabil drift, hög tillgänglighet och en trygg IT-miljö.
  
  

Om tjänsten
  
Som drifttekniker IT-system blir du en del av IT-sektionen och IT-driftsgruppen, som består av cirka 25 medarbetare. Du arbetar i ett team om 7 personer tillsammans med ytterligare en drifttekniker och rapporterar till IT-driftschef.
  
Du utgår från våra lokaler i Librobäck i Uppsala, med möjlighet till visst distansarbete utifrån verksamhetens behov.
  
Rollen är operativ och varierad, med fokus på drift, stabilitet och löpande förbättringar av vår IT-miljö.
  
Du arbetar nära den dagliga driften och är en viktig del i att säkerställa att våra system fungerar stabilt och effektivt.
  
  

**Du kommer bland annat att:**  

* Drifta, övervaka och underhålla servrar och applikationer
* Felsöka, ge support och hantera driftstörningar
* Installera mjukvara och genomföra säkerhetsuppdateringar
* Hantera konto- och behörighetsadministration
* Arbeta med backup och återställning
* Underhålla och utveckla teknisk dokumentation
* Bidra till att förbättra och optimera IT-miljön utifrån prestanda och säkerhet


Kvalifikationer
  
Vi söker dig som har en god teknisk grund och trivs i en roll där du får kombinera problemlösning, struktur och samarbete.
  
Du har minst tre års aktuell och dokumenterad erfarenhet av arbete med IT-system och support, samt en god förståelse för ITIL och IT-förvaltning (t.ex. PM3).
  
  

**Du har erfarenhet och goda kunskaper inom:**  

* Windows Server och Active Directory


Samt grundläggande kunskaper inom IT-säkerhet, MS SQL, M365 och nätverk.
  
  

Du är van att arbeta strukturerat och dokumenterat i ärendehanteringssystem, och har en god förmåga att prioritera, hålla en hög servicenivå och lösa problem effektivt. Du arbetar självständigt men trivs i samarbete med andra, och har lätt för att kommunicera och skapa förståelse i olika sammanhang.
  
Du uttrycker dig obehindrat på både svenska och engelska i tal och skrift. B-körkort (manuell) är ett krav.
  
  

Meriterande är kunskap inom exempelvis VMware, Linux, Veeam, SCCM, SCOM, MS SQL och M365.
  
Vi lägger stor vikt vid dina personliga egenskaper och tror att du är nyfiken, lösningsorienterad och gillar att få saker att fungera – både tekniskt och i samarbetet med andra. Hos oss är våra värderingar viktiga – vi är lyhörda, framsynta och nyfikna, och vi hoppas att du känner igen dig i det.
  
  

Ansökan
  
Vi gör löpande urval och intervjuer, så skicka in din ansökan så snart som möjligt, dock senast 2026-05-17. Med hänvisning till GDPR tar vi inte emot ansökningar via mail.
  
  

För mer information om tjänsten kontakta
  
**Rekryterande chef Mikael Sundén, IT-driftschef:** mikael.sunden@uppsalavatten.se
  
**Ansvarig rekryterare Therese Näs, HR partner:** Therese.nas@uppsalavatten.se
  
Vi hanterar rekryteringsprocessen internt och undanber oss vänligen men bestämt kontakt från rekryterings- och bemanningsföretag.
  
  

Övrig information
  
En stor del av vår verksamhet klassas som samhällsviktig verksamhet eftersom vi försörjer Sveriges fjärde största stad med dricksvatten. För denna tjänst kommer säkerhetsprövning med registerkontroll att genomföras före anställning. Du ska även vara beredd att krigsplaceras inom ramen för Uppsala Vatten och Avfalls roll i totalförsvaret. Uppsala Vatten tillämpar 6 månaders provanställning.
  
  

Om Uppsala Vatten
  
Välkommen till Uppsala Vatten och Avfall AB. Vårt mål är att aktivt bidra till ett hållbart samhälle. Det gör vi genom att ständigt utveckla nya resurssmarta lösningar och uppmuntra till återvinning och återbruk. Vi ger Uppsala dricksvatten, renar avloppsvatten och tar hand om regnvatten.
