 , you’ll sit at the heart of how Legora scales its product. You’ll help us turn complexity into clarity by solving stakeholder alignment challenges, enabling cross‑functional collaboration at scale, and ensuring our teams can ship high‑quality AI products — fast and smoothly.
   

  

 This is a front‑row role at the edge of our product and release engine. You’ll work closely with Product, Engineering, Design, Marketing, Customer Enablement, and Client Support to ensure launches land smoothly, insights flow back into product decisions, and operational friction never slows us down.
   

  

 You’ll also be hands‑on with AI‑driven problem solving: using modern AI tools, building and defining agents, and designing systems that help teams make better decisions and move faster. If you enjoy connecting dots across teams, designing scalable systems, and being the person who makes complex things work — this role is for you.
   

  

**What You Will Be Doing**
* Own product operations at scale: create clarity across fast‑moving teams by defining processes, rituals, and tooling that keep Product, Engineering, and Go‑to‑Market aligned as we grow.
* Be the connective tissue between teams: proactively identify stakeholder misalignment, surface trade‑offs, and drive resolution across Product, Engineering, Marketing, Customer Enablement, and Client Support.
* Operate at the front edge of releases: coordinate complex, multi‑track launches; manage timelines, dependencies, and communications; and ensure every release is impactful, predictable, and well‑understood across the company.
* Solve problems with AI: leverage AI tools and analytics to uncover insights, automate workflows, and build or define agents that help teams scale decision‑making, triage issues, and learn faster from customers.
* Translate signal into action: synthesize data, feedback, and operational insights into clear narratives that shape roadmaps, priorities, and product strategy.
* Drive product excellence: partner with Product to define success metrics, track adoption and product health, and recommend improvements grounded in both qualitative and quantitative insights.
* Design scalable systems: build and continuously improve processes for release management, incident handling, feedback loops, and cross‑functional execution.
* Lead through ambiguity: manage high‑severity incidents and escalations, advocate for tech‑debt reduction, and help teams focus on the highest‑impact problems.


**What We’re Looking For**
* A strong generalist with 2–6 years of experience, ideally with a background in Computer Science, Business, Data, or similar — and a deep interest in product, systems thinking, and how organizations scale.
* Demonstrated ability to manage complex stakeholder landscapes, influence without authority, and drive alignment across multiple teams.
* Comfort working with data and AI‑powered tools: experience with SQL and analytics platforms is a nice to have, but curiosity about using AI agents and automation to solve operational problems is a must have.
* A builder’s mindset: you enjoy designing processes from scratch, iterating quickly, and improving systems over time.
* Clear, confident communicator who can turn messy inputs into structured plans, decisions, and narratives.
* Thrives in ambiguity, moves fast with a bias for action, and cares deeply about making teams and products more effective.


**Legora is an Equal Opportunity Employer**
 At Legora, we believe great teams are built on diversity of thought and experience. We’re proud to be an equal opportunity employer and committed to creating an inclusive, high-performance culture where everyone can do their best work. We welcome people of all backgrounds and don’t discriminate based on race, color, religion, national origin, gender, gender identity or expression, sexual orientation, age, disability, veteran status, or any other characteristic protected by law.

title: Projektledare inom tekniska system till Stockholm-Arlanda Airport
description:
Nu söker vi en projektledare som vill vara med och utveckla framtidens bagagesystem, en tekniskt avancerad och säkerhetskritisk del av flygplatsens infrastruktur.
   

  

 Vi bygger framtidens flygplatser genom att leda, driva och genomföra investeringsprojekt som bidrar till Sveriges tillväxt och infrastruktur. Avdelning Projekt ansvarar för att genomföra strategiska investeringar i och kring våra flygplatser och säkerställer att projekten genomförs effektivt, samordnat och med rätt kompetens.
   

  

**Vad innebär rollen?**
 Som projektmedarbetare inom bagagesystem blir du en viktig del av projekt där teknik, säkerhet och verksamhet möts. Du bidrar aktivt till projekt kopplade till utveckling, ombyggnation och modernisering av våra bagageanläggningar. Rollen innebär att ta ansvar för egna leveranser, samarbeta tätt med projektledare och tekniska specialister samt driva frågor framåt. Beroende på projektens dignitet har du rollen som projektledare eller delprojektledare. Arbetet omfattar allt från mindre förbättringsåtgärder till större investeringsprojekt i befintliga anläggningar.
   

  

 Du kommer att arbeta nära både interna funktioner och externa leverantörer, bland annat maskinleverantörer, konsulter och entreprenörer. Du säkerställer att tekniska lösningar uppfyller krav inom säkerhet, arbetsmiljö och funktion samtidigt som projektens mål för tid, kostnad och kvalitet nås.
   

  

 Arbetet omfattar bland annat projektering i samarbete med maskinleverantörer, koordinering av installationer och ombyggnationer i befintliga industrianläggningar. Genom dialog med övrig verksamhet säkerställer du att lösningarna fungerar i drift. Du bidrar även till utvecklingen av framtidens bagagesystem där digitalisering, IT/OT-integration och höga säkerhetskrav är centrala delar.
   

  

 Du arbetar nära en operativ flygplatsmiljö, i huvudsak på Arlanda flygplats, där resor till andra av Swedavias flygplatser kan förekomma.
   

  

**Vem är du?**
 Vi söker dig som har:
   

  

* Några års erfarenhet av arbete i projektform, exempelvis som projektledare, delprojektledare, eller teknisk projektmedarbetare i projekt med teknisk inriktning
* Erfarenhet av ombyggnationer i befintliga anläggningar och av att arbeta i projekt tillsammans med tekniska leverantörer, exempelvis maskinleverantörer
* Erfarenhet av projektdeltagande i större eller mindre projekt och samarbete med flera olika kompetenser i projekten är en naturlig del av din bakgrund
* Grundläggande kunskap om regelverk kopplade till maskinanläggningar, exempelvis maskindirektivet eller maskinförordningen samt CE-märkning
* Goda kunskaper i svenska och engelska i tal och skrift


 Det är meriterande om du har:
   

  

* Erfarenhet från arbete i industrianläggningar eller tekniska system
* Förståelse för frågor kopplade till drift och hur tekniska anläggningar fungerar i en operativ verksamhet


 För att lyckas i rollen är du en strukturerad och lösningsorienterad person som trivs i en tekniskt komplex miljö. Du har god problemlösningsförmåga och är van att hantera frågor där teknik, säkerhet och verksamhet kombineras.
   

  

 Du är en tydlig kommunikatör som bygger förtroende i samarbetet med både kollegor, leverantörer och övrig verksamhet. Rollen kräver att du är en prestigelös lagspelare som driver frågor framåt samtidigt som du skapar samsyn i projekten.
   

  

**Vad erbjuder vi dig?**
 Hos oss får du möjlighet att arbeta i en organisation som driver några av Sveriges mest komplexa infrastruktursatsningar. Du blir en del av en enhet där samarbete, kompetens och utveckling står i fokus.
   

  

 Swedavia driver och utvecklar tio flygplatser i Sverige och bidrar till den tillgänglighet landet behöver för resande, affärer och möten. Samtidigt arbetar vi målmedvetet för att vara världsledande i utvecklingen av klimatsmarta och hållbara flygplatser. Hos oss möter du hela världen. Vi är övertygade om att mångfald och olika perspektiv bidrar till bättre lösningar och en starkare organisation.
   

  

 Vid frågor om tjänsten är du välkommen att kontakta Shima Ghitouri, shima.ghitouri@swedavia.se.
   

  

**Sista ansökningsdag är den 26 april, urval sker löpande och annonsen kan stängas tidigare så tveka inte att söka redan idag!**
**Hur är det att arbeta på Swedavia?**
 Vårt fokus är att möjliggöra hållbart resande och uppmuntra nytänkande för att skapa en välkomnande, trygg och inkluderande arbetsgemenskap där du kan växa och göra verklig skillnad – läs mer här! Jobba hos oss | Om Swedavia
   

  

 För en objektiv och rättvis rekrytering använder vi arbetspsykologiska tester som en del av urvalsprocessen.
   

  

 Då flygplatser är en säkerhetsklassad verksamhet genomgår samtliga kandidater som går vidare i rekryteringsprocessen en bakgrundskontroll. För vissa tjänster även en säkerhetsprövning. Swedavia är även en drogfri arbetsplats med nolltolerans mot droger. Drogtester genomförs före anställning och sker slumpmässigt under anställningen.

title: Data Scientist - Company Planning and Execution (CPE)
description:
Join our Company Planning and Execution (CPE) team at Spotify and help shape how we turn strategy into action across the company. The CPE team’s mission is to continuously improve how we develop Spotify as a product and a business to unlock the company strategy. We design and evolve the systems, processes, and insights that help Spotify plan, and execute at scale, ensuring every team can focus on delivering value to millions of users around the world.
   

  

 As a Data Scientist, you will work at the intersection of data, strategy, and operations. You will use analytical techniques to uncover insights that guide how Spotify plans, prioritizes, and drives execution. You will also explore ways to integrate AI and automation into our workflows and operating model to support smarter and more efficient ways of working.
   

  

 With access to Spotify’s extensive data ecosystem, you will transform complex information into clear, actionable insights that inform decision-making across teams. Your curiosity and analytical skills will help identify opportunities for improvement and shape how we measure progress and impact.
   

  

 You will collaborate with analysts, data scientists, engineers, and business partners across Spotify. Continuous learning and experimentation are part of our culture. This role offers the opportunity to grow your craft, contribute to meaningful strategic work, and help refine how Spotify executes at scale.
   

  

 What You'll Do
   

  

* Collaborate with data scientists, analysts, engineers, and business teams to deliver analysis and insights that improve how Spotify executes its strategy
* Build and maintain reliable data models, pipelines, and dashboards that bring together information from across Spotify’s ecosystem
* Create scalable and interactive reports and visualizations that turn data into clear insights and actionable recommendations
* Translate business questions and user needs into analytical approaches that uncover opportunities, inform priorities, and guide decision-making
* Apply analytical techniques, including statistical models and machine learning, to identify trends and generate insights that improve how we work
* Integrate AI and automation into data workflows and planning tools to make processes more efficient and intelligent
* Contribute to improving our data foundations, documentation, and analytical best practices within the CPE team
* Develop structured narratives and recommendations that help teams understand the “why” behind the data and guide their next steps


 Who You Are
   

  

* You have experience analyzing large datasets and translating them into actionable insights
* You are curious and creative, with a focus on accuracy and clarity in your work
* You have experience turning large, complex datasets into clear insights, recommendations, and stories
* You enjoy working with technical and business teams to turn data into impact
* You are comfortable working in a cloud-based data environment such as BigQuery and using modern data tooling like dbt
* You are proficient in SQL and Python, and have experience building dashboards with tools like Tableau or Looker
* You have a quantitative background in Computer Science, Statistics, Engineering, or a related field
* Experience with operational or work management data is a plus


 Where You'll Be
   

  

* This role will be based in London OR Stockholm
* We offer you the flexibility to work where you work best! There will be some in person meetings, but still allows for flexibility to work from home.


 Spotify is an equal opportunity employer. You are welcome at Spotify for who you are, no matter where you come from, what you look like, or what’s playing in your headphones. Our platform is for everyone, and so is our workplace. The more voices we have represented and amplified in our business, the more we will all thrive, contribute, and be forward-thinking! So bring us your personal experience, your perspectives, and your background. It’s in our differences that we will find the power to keep revolutionizing the way the world listens.
   

  

 At Spotify, we are passionate about inclusivity and making sure our entire recruitment process is accessible to everyone. We have ways to request reasonable accommodations during the interview process and help assist in what you need. If you need accommodations at any stage of the application or interview process, please let us know - we’re here to support you in any way we can.
   

  

 Spotify transformed music listening forever when we launched in 2008. Our mission is to unlock the potential of human creativity by giving a million creative artists the opportunity to live off their art and billions of fans the chance to enjoy and be passionate about these creators. Everything we do is driven by our love for music and podcasting. Today, we are the world’s most popular audio streaming subscription service.

title: Quality and Compliance Consultant - GDP/GMP
description:
**Job Description** 




  





 The Quality and Compliance Consultant – GDP/GMP Specialist position is responsible for supporting the management of compliance and quality assurance related projects and providing consulting and contract services to clients to address quality and regulatory / GDP/GMP issues, as needed. This position will be assigned to quality assurance and regulatory / GxP compliance projects within the company. The specific facet of GxP project scopes (e.g., GMP, GCP, GLP, etc.) that the individual can be aligned with to support will be dictated by the practical job experience and training reflected in their CV.
 



  





**Essential Functions** 




  




* Represent the company in assigned areas of quality assurance and regulatory / GxP.
* Provide consultation and support the management of projects within the CQA business practice.
* Keep pace with the regulatory and technological changes in the CQA field and develop subject matter expertise to take advantage of those opportunities to increase the company’s effectiveness.
* Be a critical team member who contributes to the implementation and successful execution of risk-based and phase appropriate GxP projects.
* Participate in the sales process as required and identify scope and effort required to successfully address client needs.
* Perform key projects as a Deputy Responsible Person
* Support marketing efforts by promoting CQA services through the development of social media content and blogs.
* Promote continual improvement regarding customer satisfaction with emphasis on CQA consulting services.
* As applicable, provide CQA specific training to clients and associates within other business units.
* Provide support to clients and all functional units of ProPharma as GxP issues such as deviations and non-conformances arise.
* Provides consultation for the implementation of proper CAPA to resolve deviations and non-conformances. Also, is responsible for ensuring compliance of company operations to quality principles and participation in the development of quality systems through SOP writing and training.
* Directly engage with employees at all levels to educate on compliance and quality assurance to drive continuous improvement.
* It is anticipated that this position will maintain a percentage of billable project work as determined on a quarterly basis.
* Other duties as assigned.



  





**Experience Requirements** 




  




* Bachelor’s degree, or similar college degree, in a scientific discipline as a minimum
* A graduate degree (MSc / PhD) in a scientific discipline is preferred.
* Minimum 2-4 years relevant experience in quality assurance within the life-sciences sector
* Must have demonstrated experience working in GDP Quality Assurance
* Fluency in English and Swedish
* Strong working knowledge of EU GMP / GDP regulations.



  





**Necessary Skills and Abilities** 




  




* Ability to earn and maintain a client’s confidence through appropriate planning, organizing, controlling, and execution of a project.
* Willingness and ability to travel as required.
* Ability to interact in a professional and positive manner with clients and co-workers through strong interpersonal and communication skills.
* Effective written and oral communication skills; ability to write, type, express or exchange ideas; ability to convey information / instructions accurately in English and Swedish
* Quality orientation and high attention to detail.
* Strong analytical skills.



  





**Additional Information** 




 We celebrate our differences and strive to create a workplace where each person can be their authentic self. We are committed to diversity, equity, and inclusion. Employees are encouraged to unleash their innovative, collaborative, and entrepreneurial spirits. With a holistic approach as an Equal Opportunity Employer, we provide a safe space where all employees feel empowered to succeed.
 



  





 All applications to roles at ProPharma are personally reviewed by a member of our recruitment team. We do not rely on AI screening tools to support our hiring process. You will always receive an outcome to your application so that you have an answer from us - whether you're successful or not.
 



  





 Whilst ProPharma supports remote working, we also recognise the value that comes from in person collaboration. As such, we encourage any new hires that are based within a reasonably short commute of one of our offices to work on a hybrid basis and spend some time working from that office location, as agreed with your manager. All applications will be treated on their own merit and candidates will not be at any advantage or disadvantage based on their proximity to an office.
 







 \*\*\*ProPharma Group does not accept unsolicited resumes from recruiters/third parties. Please, no phone calls or emails to anyone regarding this posting.\*\*\*

title: Administratör för Arbetsmarknadsenheten, Huddinge kommun
description:
Arbetsmarknadsenheten, Gymnasie- och arbetsmarknadsförvaltningen söker ytterligare en stjärna till enhetens AME team mottagning.
   

  

 Välkommen till enheten som arbetar med kommunens samtliga arbetsmarknadspolitiska åtgärder. Dels med att upprätta planeringar mot självförsörjning, bedriva insatser, aktiviteter, utredningar om arbetsförmåga och genomför flertalet olika anställningar för såväl unga som vuxna kommun medborgare.
   

  

 Arbetsplatsen kännetecknas av gott samarbete, engagemang, driv och ett öppet klimat där vi värdesätter varandras kunskap. Vi strävar gemensamt efter att ständigt utveckla vårt arbete för att nå våra mål för att fler ska nå arbete och studier där AME team mottagning och det administrativa arbete är en adekvat del av kommunens uppdrag om att förmedla god service. Arbetsuppgifter för dig som Administratör.
   

  

**Om arbetet**
 Arbetsuppgifterna varierar och innefattar bland annat;
   

  

* Inköp, beställningar och kontakt med leverantörer
* Granskning och kontering av fakturor
* Personaladministration, schema, intyg och sjukfrånvaro
* Introduktion av nyanställda
* Deltagare administration, inklusive upprättande av subventionerade anställningar
* Sammanställa rapporter om ekonomi, utfall av insatser i samband med subventionerade anställningar samt löpande statistik.
* Ansvara för enhetens administrativa fastighetsfrågor. Upprättande, administration och uppföljning av hyresavtal, felanmälningar och hantering av larmsystem samt behörigheter för fastigheter där enheten bedriver sina verksamheter
* Post och e-postlådehantering
* Ansvarig för enhetens inventarier, IT produkter samt tekniska stödfunktioner.


 Du kommer ha löpande kontakt med chefer, personal och andra interna/externa parter. I ditt arbete ingår att leda och stötta enhetens olika team med att säkerställa goda arbetsflöden om anställningar, ersättningar och föra en god kommunikation med arbetsplatser samt kommuninvånare. Arbetet sker med verksamhetens olika administrativa system såsom Heroma, Proceedo, W3D3. Erfarenhet av att hantera dessa eller liknande system, alternativt dokumenterad god förmåga att ta till sig liknande arbetsuppgifter är därför meriterande. Då enheten har ett teambaserat arbetssätt ingår även du som administratör som en resurs för att arbeta för att nå de gemensamt uppsatta mål för enheten. I arbetet kommer du att få möta spännande uppdrag, många människor och delta vid enhetens aktiviteter.
   

  

**Om dig**
 Vi söker dig som har eftergymnasial administrativ utbildning eller annan utbildning som arbetsgivaren finner relevant. Vi ser gärna att du har tidigare erfarenhet av subventionerade anställningar, att du har arbetat och hanterat anställningar om subventionerade ersättningar via Arbetsförmedlingen. Ytterligare ser vi det meriterande om du har tidigare erfarenhet av vanligt förekommande personal administration för hantering av ersättningar, semester, sjukskrivningar, support arbete för chefer inom enheten samt kommunens verksamheter. Slutligen är det meriterande om du har tidigare erfarenhet av ett arbete från styrelser inom bostad, föreningar, bibliotek, servicecenter, receptionist mfl.
   

  

**Varför Huddinge?**
 För att vi ska kunna utföra vårt uppdrag är du som medarbetare i Huddinge kommun det viktigaste vi har. Därför erbjuder vi en rad förmåner för ett hållbart arbetsliv och för att underlätta din vardag: https://www.huddinge.se/arbete-och-karriar/arbeta-i-huddinge-kommun/#Formaner
   

  

**Facklig kontaktperson**
 För facklig kontaktperson för tjänsten se Facklig kontaktinformation
   

  

**Upplysningar**
 Vid frågor om tjänsten, vänligen kontakta Sara Häggström Enhetschef: sara.haggstrom@huddinge.se
   

  

 För att vi ska kunna hantera alla ansökningar på bästa sätt ber vi dig att söka direkt via våra utannonserade tjänster. Vi tar inte emot spontana ansökningar via e-post.
   

  

 Vi tillämpar löpande rekrytering och gör ur urval samt intervjuer löpande.
   

  

 Välkommen in med din ansökan!
   

  

 Om arbetsplatsen
   

  

 Värderar du närhet, att växa och skapa de bästa förutsättningarna för alla som bor och verkar i Huddinge kommun? Då erbjuder vi mängder av karriärmöjligheter i en välfungerande och växande kommun med både natur och storstadspuls runt hörnet. Hos oss känner du dig trygg, delaktig och stolt när vi med kraft gör skillnad, varje dag. I Huddinge kommun arbetar vi för att skapa ett hållbart samhälle, där natur, teknik och god service samspelar. Huddinge är en stor Stockholmskommun med cirka 6 400 medarbetare och fler än 110 000 invånare.
   

  

 Om du har skyddade personuppgifter ber vi dig att kontakta den kontaktpersonen som finns angiven i annonsen.
   

  

 Huddinge kommun arbetar för att vara en trygg, rättssäker och professionell verksamhet. Som en del av vår rekryteringsprocess kan vi därför komma att genomföra bakgrundskontroller och begära registerutdrag i slutskedet av vissa rekryteringar. Om du blir aktuell för detta får du tydlig information och möjlighet att lämna ditt samtycke innan kontrollen genomförs.
   

  

 Facklig kontaktperson
   

  

 För facklig kontaktperson för tjänsten se Facklig kontaktinformation
   

  

 Anställningens omfattning
   

  

**Anställningsform:** 
 Tillsvidareanställning
   

  

**Omfattning:** 
 Heltid
   

  

 Ansökan
   

  

**Ansök senast:** 
 2026-05-07
   

  

**Referensnummer:** 
 C313976
   

  

 Anställning
   

  

**Antal annonserade arbetstillfällen:** 
 1
   

  

 Vi undanber oss alla erbjudanden om annonsering och rekryteringshjälp i samband med denna annons.

title: Head of IT Finance & HR (m/f/d) – flexible within Europe
description:
Walter is recruiting for a
   

  

**Head of IT Finance & HR (m/f/d) – flexible within Europe**
**About Walter**
 For more than 100 years, Walter has stood for competence and quality in the field of machining technology. The company was founded in 1919 by Richard Walter and has its headquarters in Tübingen, Germany. The wide portfolio includes precision tools for milling, turning, grooving, drilling and threading, as well as customer special tools and digital solutions along the value chain. Walter has a global presence with customers in more than 80 countries and about 3 800 employees.
   

  

 At Walter, we continue our Digital Transformation journey, focusing on technology innovation, process automation, complexity reduction and digital experience. The Walter division belongs to the Machining business area (BA) at Sandvik. Walter’s Digital Transformation & IT team collaboration with Machining BA IT team develops towards leveraging fully the combined strengths of all Machining BA’s divisions, and its increasing number of shared digital & IT platforms driving agility, efficiency and incremental business value creation.
   

  

 We’re looking for an experienced and agile leader to join our Digital Transformation & IT team (DT&IT) and to drive the execution of our divisional strategy in the primary areas of IT Finance and HR. Other activities related to Sustainability and/or Compliance could be considered as well in this portfolio of responsibilities.
   

  

 We offer you an exciting digital arena, where customer focus, innovation and collaboration are part of our culture.
   

  

**Your mission**
 In alignment with Machining business area IT team, you elaborate and execute on Walter’s IT strategy supporting our Finance and HR business partners and enabling their short- and long-term goals. You’re responsible for maintaining and delivering on our Finance & HR IT roadmap towards maximizing value creation. With your team, you consult with and bring ideas to our Finance and HR business teams acting as their trusted IT Business Partner in all aspects of digital technologies including the effective usage of ERP and other integrated digital products.
   

  

**Included in your mission is to:**
* Ensure the delivery as per plan of various projects from ideation to go-live.
* Coordinate internal and external project resources.
* Run existing platforms with support from other Walter DT&IT team and group level teams.
* Drive, jointly with business stakeholders, processes harmonization and automation.
* Lead and develop a global team of internal SAP (S/4HANA) FI/CO and other Finance systems experts.
* Coach your team, including leveraging best practices in configuration design and implementation, internally and from sister divisions.
* Inspire your team, including promoting exploration of new features and technologies inclusive of Finance related AI use cases.
* Manage external partnerships.
* Provide guidance and support to the HR business team engaging with Sandvik Group stakeholders of HRIS.
* Lead Mergers and Acquisitions (M&A) related IT finance workstreams and contributing teams to enable integration of synergies inclusive of standard group reporting and compliance activities.
* Contribute to the DT&IT team strategic thinking and strategy steering.


 In this position you report to the CIO and are a member of the Walter Digital Transformation & IT management team. You lead a team of about ten combined direct reports and contractors across Germany, Czech Republic, Romania and France. Travelling to Walter Global headquarters in Tübingen, Germany, is wished monthly.
   

  

**Your profile**
 As a good leader, you’re characterized by strong interpersonal and engagement skills – making you great at onboarding teams on a strategic roadmap, sharing a vision and communicating and collaborating closely with the business. You have a high sense of responsibility, service and proactivity, while at the same time being creative, agile and curious. With strong intercultural competence, you easily interact with a high number of stakeholders in our complex environment. Add the following qualifications and you have what it takes to really thrive in this role:
   

  

* You have a university degree in computer science, business administration, engineering or a related discipline with an information technology focus or comparable practical business experience.
* More than 10 years of SAP Finance experience (ideally S/4HANA), including at least 5 years in a managerial role.
* Experience of integrating best-of-breed 3rd party finance solutions (e.g. T&E, Vendor management) with the SAP ERP core.
* You bring a deep understanding of structured and process-oriented application design.
* Proven ability to implement Application Lifecycle and Business Process Management using SAP Solution Manager.
* You contribute your expertise by documenting and analyzing business requirements for SAP-based implementations.
* Strong competence in documenting and analyzing business requirements for SAP-based implementations.
* You have experience in managing a DevOps environment
* With very good spoken and written English skills you can inspire others with your ideas and vision.


**Our Benefits**
 Walter offers you a modern working environment with flexible working hours, mobile working, a wide range of health measures and company pension schemes. We place great importance on enabling our employees to develop professionally and personally. Safety in the workplace is very important to us and we actively support diversity and inclusion measures.
   

  

**Our company and culture** 
  

  

 At Walter, we bring pioneering metal and machining solutions to the world of manufacturing – covering areas such as turning, drilling, threading and milling. We’re proud of the “Engineering Kompetenz” we offer our broad range of customers in every stage of their machining processes, and the way we collaborate to help them excel in performance, process reliability and productivity. When it comes to our people, we strongly believe that diversity of experience, perspective and background forms the best foundation for achieving great results. Visit our LinkedIn or Facebook to get to know us and our products further.
   

  

  

  

**Application** 
  

  

 Please submit your application no later than April 24th, 2026. Read more about Walter Tools and apply by visiting the career section on walter-tools.com (Job ID: R0089561).
   

  

 Please apply with your complete application documents (letter of motivation, CV and references).
   

  

 For more information about this exciting job and to learn more about our recruitment process, please contact HR Services
   

  

 hrservices-germany@sandvik.com

title: Software Engineer - AI Focus
description:
**About Mynt**
 Mynt is an all-in-one corporate card and spend management platform on a mission to reinvent business banking. By combining smart software with cards and payments infrastructure, we remove manual, time-consuming admin from how companies manage spending.
   

  

 We’re growing fast across the Nordics and have secured significant funding to support our continued expansion in Sweden and internationally.
   

  

 Mynt is a tech-first, product-driven company where teams are empowered to solve real problems and build things that matter. We’re a licensed e-money institution, card issuer, and payment processor, operating under the supervision of the Swedish Financial Supervisory Authority. Through strong partnerships with leading players such as Fortnox and Nordea — and many more on the way — our solutions are now live across all Nordic countries.
   

  

 Joining Mynt means helping shape both a category-defining product and a company that’s still early in its journey. With 100+ colleagues (and growing), we’re building teams that value ownership, momentum, and customer impact.
   

  

**About The Role**
 We are looking for talented developers who are passionate about building high-quality software and excited by the opportunities AI brings to modern product development. You thrive in an entrepreneurial environment where you can influence both the product and the company's direction.
   

  

 At Mynt, you will work in a modern codebase using the latest technologies, with a high level of ownership and responsibility from day one. A key part of this role is building AI-powered products, leveraging LLMs, multi-modal models, and the best tools available to create smarter automation, improved decision-making, and entirely new features that wouldn't be possible without AI.
   

  

 You will join an ambitious and experienced team with backgrounds in scale-ups, finance, and consulting. We work in agile sprints, combining close collaboration with a strong sense of individual autonomy.
   

  

 Our backend runs on Java, and you will use it to build robust business logic and scalable APIs that power both our web and mobile applications, working closely with product managers in each domain. Beyond the core platform, you will help shape how we apply LLMs, multi-modal AI, and modern AI tooling across our product, turning experiments into production features that unlock real value for our users.Our development process is rooted in agile principles, clean code, and CI/CD. Testing, TDD, and automation are integral parts of how we ensure quality and maintain speed.
   

  

 You will also contribute to architectural decisions and play a key role in shaping and building new AI-powered capabilities from an early stage, using technologies such as Java, MongoDB, MySQL, Redis, AWS, Docker, and CircleCI.
   

  

**Qualifications**
* Bachelor’s degree in Engineering, Computer Science, or equivalent experience
* At least 1+ years of experience in backend development using Java
* Ability to write clean, maintainable, and well-documented code
* Interest in, or experience with, AI/ML concepts and how they can be applied in product development
* A collaborative mindset with a passion for solving problems as part of a team
* Fluent in Swedish and English


**What we can offer you**
* Be part of an amazing team in a fast-growing scale-up.
* Work closely with a fun, high-performing team.
* Enjoy a flexible working environment with a great office location in central Stockholm.
* Shape your own development and responsibilities based on your passion and interest.


*The position will be filled as soon as we find a suitable candidate. Please reach out to us as soon as possible if you believe this for you!*

title: Data & AI Engineering Program
description:
*Vill du bli en eftertraktad Data & AI Engineer med kompetenser som marknaden letar efter? SALT's Data & AI Engineer Program erbjuder en unik möjlighet att lära dig bygga datadrivna lösningar som hjälper till att förbättra affärsverksamhet. Ta chansen att forma din karriär och bli en nyckelspelare i en bransch där din kompetens verkligen gör skillnad!* 




  





**Vad kan du förvänta dig?** 




 Utbildningen genomförs i hybridformat och vi välkomnar ansökningar från kandidater baserade i Stockholm, Göteborg eller Malmö. Under utbildningstiden utgår du från vårt kontor på Kungsholmen i Stockholm om du är bosatt där, medan deltagare i Göteborg och Malmö deltar på distans. Undervisning sker i huvudsak online, men inkluderar tre obligatoriska träffar i Stockholm, vilket innebär att du behöver kunna resa och övernatta vid dessa tillfällen.
 



  





 Även om delar av utbildningen sker på distans är det viktigt att du har möjlighet att arbeta i Stockholm efter avslutat program. Detta innebär att du behöver vara inställd på, och ha praktiska förutsättningar för, en flytt efter avslutat program.
 



  





 Programmet är intensivt, praktiskt och med stort fokus på att samarbeta och lära tillsammans som grupp. Du lär dig genom att bygga, analysera och lösa verkliga problem tillsammans med andra.
 



  





 Under
 **12 veckor** 
 lär du dig att bearbeta, strukturera och omvandla data till användbar information – och att bygga den infrastruktur som moderna AI-lösningar kräver.
 



  





**Under utbildningen kommer du bland annat lära dig:** 




  




* Programmering i Python, mjukvaruutvecklingspraxis och arbete i cloud-plattformar (Azure)
* Projektplanering, dataflöden och ETL-processer
* Datavisualisering och analys
* Förståelse för datasäkerhet, integritet och regelverk
* Effektiv användning av databaser, AI-baserade verktyg och moderna datalagerlösningar
* Grunderna i maskininlärning och AI-utveckling, samt principer och verktyg för modern generativ AI (GenAI)



  





 Efter avslutad utbildning kommer du som konsult hos SALT att arbeta i uppdrag hos någon av våra kundföretag.
 



  





 Målet är att du därefter blir överrekryterad och direktanställd hos kunden.
 



  





 Observera att programmet är kostnadsfritt. Första lönen utbetalas retroaktivt efter att anställningen påbörjats, en månad efter examen, vilket innebär att du behöver kunna försörja dig under utbildningsperioden.
 



  





**Vem passar programmet för?** 




  





 Du har erfarenhet av mjukvaruutveckling, data, informationssystem, systemimplementationer eller andra tekniknära områden – och vill nu fördjupa dig inom data, AI och molnteknik för att bygga lösningar som driver affären framåt.
 



  





 Det som betyder mest är din motivation att växa in i en teknisk dataroll och din vilja att bidra till att göra verksamheter mer datadrivna. Data och AI blir allt viktigare för företag – och om du vill arbeta i centrum av den utvecklingen är du på rätt väg.
 



  





**Vad gör en Data & AI Engineer?** 




  





 En Data & AI Engineer är en teknisk problemlösare som ser till att data flödar dit den ska och används på rätt sätt. Du bygger dataplattformar, skapar pipelines och lägger grunden för analys, rapportering och AI-lösningar. Vi ser till att du får lära dig de moderna verktygen – allt du behöver ta med dig är affärsförståelse, nyfikenhet och en stark vilja att lära dig. Med affärsförståelse menar vi att du kan se helheten i en verksamhet och förstå hur dina tekniska lösningar skapar konkret värde och bidrar till företagets mål.
 



  





**Kvalifikationer** 




  





**För att vara aktuell för programmet behöver du:** 




  




* Vara flytande i svenska och engelska, både i tal och skrift
* Ha en avslutad eftergymnasial utbildning (universitet eller högskola)
* Ha ett giltigt arbetstillstånd på minst 2 år (från kursens startdatum)
* Vara bosatt i Stockholmsområdet, alternativt vara tillgänglig för flytt till Stockholm efter avslutat program
* Ha 1-5 års relevant arbetslivserfarenhet



  





**Meriterande:** 




  




* Erfarenhet av Python, SQL eller andra databaser
* Erfarenhet av programmering och mjukvaruutveckling
* Tidigare erfarenhet eller utbildning inom IT/systemutveckling/data
* Erfarenhet av att arbeta med AI eller dataanalys



  





 För att lyckas i programmet behöver du vara kommunikativ, proaktiv och samarbetsinriktad. Du trivs med att lösa problem, analysera komplexa frågor och anpassa dig till nya miljöer. En framgångsrik konsult hos SALT kombinerar teknisk kompetens med affärsförståelse, starka mjuka färdigheter och ett professionellt förhållningssätt.
 



  





**Vem står bakom utbildningen?** 




  





 Programmet genomförs av SALT, en ledande aktör inom att bygga morgondagens techkompetens. Sedan 2018 har SALT utbildat nästa generation AI-, data- och mjukvaruingenjörer. SALT ansvarar för projektledning samt hela genomförandet av utbildningen.
 



  





 Utbildningsinnehållet tas fram och levereras i samarbete med Skillio, en ledande aktör inom utbildning och kompetensutveckling inom Data & AI. Skillio har lång erfarenhet av att utbilda framtida Data & AI Engineers.
 



  





 Under utbildningen får du lära dig av instruktörer med aktuell erfarenhet från Data & AI-branschen och får samtidigt tillgång till ett värdefullt nätverk av erfarna experter. Utbildningen har genomgående starkt fokus på praktisk tillämpning och branschrelevans.
 



  





**Övrig information** 




  





**Start:** 
 11 augusti 2026
 



  





**Plats:** 
 Kungsholmen, Stockholm (på plats), alternativt remote från Göteborg eller Malmö
 



  





**Sista ansökningsdag:** 
 30 juni
 



  





 Ta första steget mot din nya karriär och skicka in din ansökan redan idag —
 **vi tillämpar löpande urval.** 




  





*SALT är stolt över att vara en jämlik arbetsgivare som välkomnar individer av alla kön, bakgrunder och erfarenheter. Bli en del av ett företag i teknikens framkant som värdesätter och främjar stor mångfald på arbetsplatsen. Kulturen på SALT kännetecknas av att vara inkluderande, öppen och dynamisk.*

title: People Analytics Analyst | Sweden | Remote
description:
Grafana Labs is a remote-first, open-source powerhouse. There are more than 20M users of Grafana, the open source visualization tool, around the globe, monitoring everything from beehives to climate change in the Alps. The instantly recognizable dashboards have been spotted everywhere from a NASA launch and Minecraft HQ to Wimbledon and the Tour de France. Grafana Labs also helps more than 3,000 companies -- including Bloomberg, JPMorgan Chase, and eBay -- manage their observability strategies with the Grafana LGTM Stack, which can be run fully managed with Grafana Cloud or self-managed with the Grafana Enterprise Stack, both featuring scalable metrics (Grafana Mimir), logs (Grafana Loki), and traces (Grafana Tempo).
   

  

 We’re scaling fast and staying true to what makes us different: an open-source legacy, a global collaborative culture, and a passion for meaningful work. Our team thrives in an innovation-driven environment where transparency, autonomy, and trust fuel everything we do.
   

  

 You may not meet every requirement, and that’s okay. If this role excites you, we’d love you to raise your hand for what could be a truly career-defining opportunity.
   

  

**The Opportunity**
 We are looking for a People Analytics Analyst to join our recently formed People Analytics team and serve as a strategic, data-driven partner to leaders across the business. This role blends strong analytical and technical skills with a consultative, business-facing mindset — someone who loves working with data and using it to influence decisions.
   

  

 This role will partner closely with HR Business Partners, the People Leadership Team (PLT), senior business leaders, and teams across the broader People organization (e.g., Talent Acquisition, L&D, Total Rewards, Workday), translating complex people data into clear insights, narratives, and recommendations. A significant focus of this role will be supporting Sales and Go-To-Market (GTM) organizations, using workforce data to help leaders understand performance, retention, hiring, and organizational effectiveness within revenue-generating teams. You will report to the Director of People Analytics.
   

  

 The People Analytics function is entering its next phase of growth — expanding beyond foundational reporting into deeper insights, standardization, and proactive workforce analytics. This role will play a critical part in shaping how people data is used to understand organizational health, guide strategy, and support leaders in solving real business problems.
   

  

 If you’re excited about being both a hands-on data practitioner and a trusted advisor to the business, particularly in fast-paced, performance-driven environments like Sales, we’d love to hear from you.
   

  

**What You’ll Be Doing**
* Serve as a go-to, business-facing People Analytics expert for People Team Business Partners, the People Leadership Team, and senior business leaders — tracking against organizational health metrics and people plan objectives, always close to the business and its biggest workforce challenges, with a strong focus on supporting Sales and Go-To-Market (GTM) organizations.
* Conduct and deliver ongoing workforce analysis, QBRs, and ad hoc analytics that inform and drive better business decisions.
* Lead data storytelling: translate complex people data into clear, compelling narratives and recommendations tailored to executive and leadership audiences
* Proactively partner with BPs and leaders on strategic areas of focus (e.g., attrition, hiring, performance, mobility, retention, org design), using data to identify trends, risks, and opportunities.
* Bring curiosity and tenacity to connecting data across disparate people systems — uncovering trends, risks, and opportunities across attrition, hiring, performance, mobility, org health, and more
* Develop rapid 'v0.5' analytical solutions from the front lines, then partner with the broader People Analytics team to scale and productionize them
* Leverage AI tools and automation throughout your workflow — from analysis and reporting to insight generation — while applying your expertise to guide, correct, and elevate AI output
* Use data skills, curiosity and People Analytics expertise to develop scalable SQL modeling, business-facing dashboards, automated reporting and AI solutions.
* Drive forward the strategic roadmap of the People Analytics function, including expanding reporting and analytics capabilities, establishing and evolving KPIs, and leading key projects in critical business areas.


**What Makes You a Great Fit**
* Experience in a people analytics, HR analytics, or workforce analytics role with meaningful exposure to business-facing stakeholders
* An endlessly curious analytical mindset — you love connecting data together and seeing what it reveals
* SQL proficiency: writing complex, efficient queries is a regular part of your workflow (BigQuery, Snowflake, or similar)
* Strong AI skills and genuine interest in using AI tools to improve how you work — you proactively seek AI-driven solutions and apply your domain expertise to guide and validate them
* Advanced experience with Excel and/or Google Sheets for analysis, modeling, and quick-turn insights
* Experience with data visualization and BI tools (PowerBI, Tableau, Looker; Grafana BI a plus) with an interest in enabling self-service analytics
* Experience working with people data from HR systems such as Workday, Greenhouse, LMS platforms, or similar
* Strong presentation and storytelling skills — you can translate complex data into clear, compelling insights for non-technical audiences
* Excellent communication and stakeholder management skills; you build trust and credibility with HR partners and business leaders
* Resilience and adaptability — you thrive under pressure, handle competing priorities without losing quality, and treat ambiguity as a challenge rather than an obstacle
* Comfort operating in a growing, evolving analytics function where building, iterating, and scaling are part of the job


**Bonus Points For**
* Experience with dbt or analytics engineering concepts
* Experience helping define analytics strategy, metrics, or reporting standards
* A passion for building — better datasets, cleaner reporting, or more impactful insights


**Compensation & Rewards**
 In Sweden, the compensation range for this role is SEK 687,000 - SEK 824,000. Actual compensation may vary based on level, experience, and skillset as assessed throughout the interview process. All of our roles include Restricted Stock Units (RSUs), giving every team member ownership in Grafana Labs' success. We believe in shared outcomes—RSUs help us stay aligned and invested as we scale globally.
   

  

* Compensation ranges are country specific. If you are applying for this role from a different location than listed above, your recruiter will discuss your specific market’s defined pay range & benefits at the beginning of the process.


**Why You’ll Thrive At Grafana Labs**
* 100% Remote, Global Culture - As a remote-only company, we bring together talent from around the world, united by a culture of collaboration and shared purpose.
* Scaling Organization – Tackle meaningful work in a high-growth, ever-evolving environment.
* Transparent Communication – Expect open decision-making and regular company-wide updates.
* Innovation-Driven – Autonomy and support to ship great work and try new things.
* Open Source Roots – Built on community-driven values that shape how we work.
* Empowered Teams – High trust, low ego culture that values outcomes over optics.
* Career Growth Pathways – Defined opportunities to grow and develop your career.
* Approachable Leadership – Transparent execs who are involved, visible, and human.
* Passionate People – Join a team of smart, supportive folks who care deeply about what they do.
* In-Person onboarding - We want you to thrive from day 1 with your fellow new ‘Grafanistas’ to learn all about what we do and how we do it.
* Balance is Key - We operate a global annual leave policy of 30 days per annum. 3 days of your annual leave entitlement are reserved for Grafana Shutdown Days to allow the team to really disconnect. \*We will comply with local legislation where applicable.


**Equal Opportunity Employer:** 
 We will recruit, train, compensate and promote regardless of race, religion, color, national origin, gender, disability, age, veteran status, and all the other fascinating characteristics that make us different and unique. We believe that equality and diversity builds a strong organization and we’re working hard to make sure that’s the foundation of our organization as we grow.
   

  

*Grafana Labs may utilize AI tools in its recruitment process to assist in matching information provided in CVs to job postings. The recruitment team will continue to review inbound CVs manually to identify alignment with current openings.*
*For information about how your personal data is used once you’ve applied to a job, check out our privacy policy.*

title: Creative Project Manager
description:
We are looking for our next Creative Project Manager to join our Stockholm office!
   

  

 At Precis, we are a group of friendly experts in media buying, analytics & marketing science, creative and technology with a joint mission to help great companies thrive in the digital landscape. We specialise in producing short-form, highly visual, storytelling for digital channels such as SoMe, Display, Out of Home, eCom, email, etc. Some projects are quite small with just a few, shiny deliverables and some are global programs with hundreds or even thousands of units produced.
   

  

 Are you curious to learn more about us? Read more about us here. For insights into what life is like at Precis and a peek at the perks of working with us, visit this page. In our Handbook, you can get a neat summary of who we are, our culture and our offices. In this document, we have summarised what our recruitment process looks like. Take a look!
   

  

 We are committed to building an inclusive and fair workplace that attracts talent and advances its people, regardless of their background, experiences or perspectives. We believe that a diverse set of minds will continue to contribute to our innovative culture and our ability to reinvent ourselves constantly.
   

  

**What You Will Be Doing**
 As a Creative Project Manager, you will be responsible for managing projects from inception to completion for ad-hoc and retainer-based requests. You will be working alongside creative team members (designers, developers, copywriters, etc.) and strategists, all while supported by your fellow team of project managers in the US and Europe. Your typical tasks will include:
   

  

* Managing the end-to-end production process for digital campaigns, including budgeting, scheduling, and team resource allocation - ensuring that projects are delivered on time, within budget, and to the highest standards.
* Establishing new and nourishing existing relationships with clients and external partners.
* Acting as the main point of contact for clients on project-related matters, supporting them with valuable insights to ensure project success.
* Leveraging your and the team’s expertise in interpreting briefs, understanding campaign objectives and requirements, and finding the best way to tackle them.
* Working closely with creative and production teams to facilitate seamless collaboration and a supportive team dynamic.
* Ensuring quality control of your own and others’ work - providing your team with feedback on ideas, concepts, and prototypes, as well as meticulously scanning for typos, misplaced pixels, and anything less than perfect.


**What We Are Looking For**
 We believe that you're a dynamic individual who effortlessly balances technical expertise with exceptional interpersonal skills. You possess a keen eye for detail and organisation, coupled with a natural ability to foster collaboration and communication within diverse teams and with clients alike.
   

  

* Experience: 2+ years in a creative agency or digital studio, with a proven track record of leading through influence rather than just process.
* Strategic Prioritization: Ability to independently navigate ambiguity and prioritize workflows based on business impact.
* Agile Mindset: Solid understanding of Agile methodologies, with the flexibility to adapt these frameworks to maintain project velocity.
* Project Lifecycle Mastery: Proficiency in managing projects end-to-end, from scoping and timelines to execution, and evaluation.
* Strategic Communication: A focus on proactive client partnership and service-oriented problem-solving.
* Technical Skills: Experience with digital advertising platforms (DV360, Meta, Google), diverse ad formats etc.
* Performance Insight: Strong understanding of campaign lifecycles and digital advertising, with an emphasis on performance and media planning.
* Collaborative Leadership: A solutions-driven team player who remains calm under pressure and values collective success over rigid production oversight.
* Creative Excellence: A keen design sensibility and a commitment to delivering high-quality, polished work.


**What We Offer**
*You can read our full offering in our* 
*handbook* 
*.*
* An intense learning environment where you will be able to grow and develop your skills and passions alongside some of the brightest minds in the industry.
* A culture that is built on collaboration, trust and innovation. We value having fun together - that’s why we also have regular afterworks, team events and a yearly festival.
* Transparent salary setting - you can find it below the job description on our website!
* 30 days paid leave, flexible public holidays, parental pay, a solid pension scheme and key insurance. Our different offices also offer different perks such as massage, health care contributions, free book orders, healthy snacks & great coffee, EAP programs and your choice of PC or Mac.
* A diverse environment with a high focus on inclusion and belonging. We speak 46 native languages around Precis, and our internal inclusion score is 4.5 out of 5.
* We update all candidates on their application by email. If you don’t receive an email from us, please check your spam folder.

title: Brand Strategy Internship – Based in Stockholm
description:
Are you fascinated by why people choose one brand over another? Do you love digging into research to find the hidden insight that changes everything? Are you eager to learn how to turn complex business problems into clear, actionable brand directions? This might be your perfect launchpad.
   

  

**Who We Are**
 Kurppa Hosk is a brand and communication agency defining new brand standards. With 200+ employees and offices in Stockholm, Oslo, New York, and Chicago, we’re a diverse team of thinkers and doers creatively solving complex business problems to transform brands and organizations. We work with brave organizations – from early-stage startups to some of the world’s most admired companies and brands. Among our clients are Zalando, Electrolux, Scania, H&M, Nike, Esteé Lauder, Meta, Minecraft, Heart Aerospace, and Alleima.
   

  

 Kurppa Hosk is a founding member of Eidra, a consulting collective made up of best-in-breed specialists ranging from Above (product innovation), Eidra Consulting (management consulting), Curamando (digital marketing), and Umain (tech and digital products), among others.
   

  

**The opportunity**
 We’re continuing to grow our Stockholm team with Brand Strategy interns who would ideally start in mid-August 2026 for a 6-month paid/school credit internship. This is a unique opportunity to learn the craft of brand strategy from the ground up in a hands-on way at a fast-growing agency. Our interns play a key role, supporting our team in both client projects and internal initiatives to strengthen KH’s brand and culture.
   

  

**What You'll Do**
 As a Brand Strategy intern at Kurppa Hosk, you will initially shadow our brand strategists and build up to supporting the delivery of our projects. You will get a behind-the-scenes look at how we solve complex strategic challenges. For example, revitalizing a large, international bank to better meet competition from fintechs – and new customer demands. Or finding a profitable target group for a venture capital-backed start-up – and creating a new brand that attracts it. These are the kinds of projects you will help support, with your primary focus being to learn, assist, and absorb as much knowledge as possible.
   

  

**Main Responsibilities**
* Assist the strategy team with foundational research and data gathering
* Take notes and help structure insights during in-depth interviews with key client stakeholders
* Support the consolidation of research materials and participate in team brainstorms
* Help format and proofread client presentations
* Bring your own fresh perspectives and curiosity to internal discussions


**Who You Are**
 To be successful in this internship, you are curious, structured, and eager to learn. You thrive in fast-paced, creative environments and are ready to pitch in wherever help is needed. You don't need to have all the answers yet – but you need to have the drive to find them. And most of all – you’re a genuinely nice person.
   

  

**Qualifications**
* Currently pursuing or recently completed higher education in business, marketing, engineering, psychology, or another relevant field
* A strong interest in brand strategy, business transformation, and consumer behavior
* Excellent verbal and written communication skills in English (the KH office is English-first)
* Great people skills – you are a good listener, a strong collaborator, and highly receptive to feedback


**What’s In It For You**
 This is a 6-month full-time paid/school-credit internship where you will join a highly creative and collaborative team on exciting projects. Our beautiful, architecture-award-winning office in Stockholm, where we host frequent social events, is located at Grev Tureplan, where we sit together with all other Eidra companies based in Stockholm. We believe in helping people grow; that’s why you will be assigned an internship buddy to guide your self-development, help you navigate the agency world, and take your first steps into the industry.
   

  

**Benefits For Paid Internships Only**
* 30 days paid vacation per calendar year (total days based on length of internship)
* Private health care insurance via Skandia
* ITPX occupational pension via Handelsbanken


**Our values: Grit. Transparency. Essentialism. Karma.**
*(Note: You will learn what these mean in practice as you work alongside us, but they boil down to working hard, being honest, focusing on what matters, and treating everyone with respect).*
 This application is open until May 24, 2026
   

  

 Kurppa Hosk is a brand agency with 200+ employees and offices in Stockholm, Oslo, New York, Chicago and Amsterdam.
   

  

 We are a part of Eidra, a group of top-notch companies specializing in strategy, creativity, and engineering. As a collective we guide leaders in making meaningful and lasting change.

title: Finance Manager
location: Upplands Väsby kommun, Stockholm County, Sweden
description:
**Who we are. What we do.** 




 We are Bystronic – a global technology company passionate about shaping the future of industrial manufacturing. We want to work with people who support us in creating new possibilities for connected sustainable production worldwide.
 



  





 As a leading partner for solutions for sheet metal and material processing, we combine laser cutting technology, press brakes, automation, and software with innovative laser applications for new materials and processes.
 








  





**What you will be doing** 




  





**Business Partnership and Controlling:** 



* Take full ownership to drive the financial performance and results of the local company, based in Sweden with operations spanning six countries (Sweden, Denmark, Finland, Estonia, Latvia, and Lithuania), and to meet budgetary targets in collaboration with Senior Management.
* Drive initiatives such as profitability and net working capital improvements.
* Fully responsible for preparing all monthly and annual financial management reports for its local legal entity.
* Responsible for the preparation of annual budgets and forecasts in consultation with management guidance.
* Analyse financial figures and define corrective measures in collaboration with Senior Management and Global/Regional Finance.



  





**Finance and accounting:** 



* Active business partnering with Senior Management, proactively strong in cost control, strategic insights and direction to the business.
* Ensuring full compliance with all financial and fiscal reporting requirements.
* Optimize and implement financial and tax strategies.
* Manage financing and investment requests and other resource requirements.



  





**Team Lead:** 



* Lead the team towards high performance. Ensure the team delivers the highest standard of departmental and cross departmental teamwork and (internal) customer service.
* Perform personnel actions including performance reviews, salary recommendations, and ensuring appropriate training and development.



  





**IT, vehicles and premises management:** 



* Collaborate with Bystronic Global IT and external IT vendors to support the smooth running of the IT infrastructure and equipment.
* Coordinate maintenance and the efficient running of the premises of the local company.
* Mandate any third parties (facility managers, craftsmen, insurance companies etc.) and manages according to contracts.
* Ensure compliance with software licences and local IT support agreement.



  





  





**Your education & experience** 



* Bachelor’s or Master’s degree in Accounting, Finance, Business Administration, or a related field.
* Professional certification such as CPA or ACCA preferred.
* Extensive experience and strong knowledge of SAP (including, but not limited to, FI/CO, SD, and CO-PA modules).
* Advanced proficiency in Microsoft Excel.
* Minimum of 6 years’ experience in general finance and accounting functions, preferably within the machinery or industrial sector.
* At least 3 years of experience in leading people.
* Good general understanding of legal and compliance matters.
* Fluency in English and Swedish required.
* Proven experience partnering with business leadership to provide proactive, insight-driven financial guidance.



  





  










**What’s in it for you** 



* Competitive salary and performance-based bonus.
* Company car as part of the compensation package.
* Opportunity to play a key role in business decision-making and strategy.
* Collaborative and dynamic work environment.
* Career growth and development opportunities within an international setting.



  





**People power our purpose** 




 Imagine working in an environment that helps move the company to the next level, where your passion, values, and skills are integral to impacting industrial manufacturing and beyond. At Bystronic, this can become your reality. Our people are the edge to drive and nurture our ambitions and continued success. Together we have created a culture where our people are central, inspiring us to make decisions that best serve them and are aligned with our purpose. As much as we are in a technology business, human beings drive real change.
 








**Life at Bystronic** 




 Explore our careers page to learn more about how we work:
 




 https://www.bystronic.com/int/en/career/why-join/employee-stories

title: Administrative Assistant, Global Programmes - Sweden
Engineering Manager - Experimentation
description:
Think it, build it, ship it, tweak it" is at the core of Spotify's product development approach. In the Experimentation product area we are providing Spotify and external customers with Confidence, our platform to quickly and safely iterate through ideas, learn from them and make informed decisions for better products.
   

  

 At Spotify, experimentation touches almost all of our functions from marketing via content management to consumer products, and we’re running several thousands of tests every year. Through confidence, we 're sharing all our findings and practices with more companies as a commercial SaaS product.
   

  

 The team you will manage is a skilled and highly engaged group of engineers that are distributed over Europe. As an Engineering manager, you coach them individually and as a team, maintaining their strong team culture and helping them thrive and and grow. Your technical experience provides mentorship and guidelines to the team, which ensures quality and timeliness of your deliveries. Your leadership promotes creativity, collaboration and courage, which forms a kind and productive team with a high bar for quality and pace of delivery.
   

  

 What You'll Do
   

  

* You will hire, coach and develop the careers of a team of engineers
* You will be responsible for high-quality deliveries
* You will partner with product managers to support with prioritizations and product visions
* You will support the engineering team and work with Staff engineers to formulate the technical strategy needed to deliver on our vision
* You will do hands on engineering work from time to time
* In the end, your primary goal is to support a highly effective engineering team delivering an amazing product


 Who You Are
   

  

* You thrive when developing great people, not just great products and cultivating a strong engineering culture in an agile environment
* You are skilled in collaborating on and developing distributed systems that can scale to millions of users.
* You have experience with data warehouses and data processing at scale
* You have worked on commercial SaaS products in the past and have hands on experience taking features from zero to one
* You are a brave learner and see unfamiliar territories as an opportunity to grow.
* You are a senior individual contributor (or has been) with strong people skills and leadership experience
* You’re passionate about software engineering best practices and love to have an impact on large-scale tech problems
* You care deeply about quality of the products your working and, and hold people to a high standard
* Naturally, you harness AI as a tool that helps you be more effective at your work


 Where You'll Be
   

  

* Based in Stockholm, Sweden
* We offer you the flexibility to work where you work best! There will be some in person meetings, but still allows for flexibility to work from home. We ask that you come in 3 times per week.


 We may use artificial intelligence (AI) tools to support parts of the hiring process, such as reviewing applications, analyzing resumes, or assessing responses. These tools assist our recruitment team but do not replace human judgment. Final hiring decisions are ultimately made by humans. If you would like more information about how your data is processed, please contact us. Find our AI notice here: https://lifeatspotify.com/ai-notice
   

  

 Today, we are the world’s most popular audio streaming subscription service.

title: ENGINEERS & MECHANICS - DAY AND NIGHTSHIFT
description:
Join SAS Line Maintenance at Arlanda Airport and help keep our fleet flying safely and efficiently. We maintain SAS aircraft (A320, A330, A350) and support other customers’ fleets.
   

  

 We are now looking for licensed aircraft engineers and experienced aircraft mechanics for both our day- and nightshifts.
   

  

**About The Role**
 As a Licensed Aircraft Engineer or experienced aircraft mechanic, you’ll be part of a dynamic team ensuring aircraft safety and reliability.
   

  

* Performing planned maintenance up to A-checks, including engine and landing gear replacements.
* Troubleshooting and rectifying faulty systems.
* Recording all activities in IT systems.


 What You Bring
   

  

**Must-have**
* Documented experience.
* Driver’s license.
* Strong English communication skills.
* High IT proficiency.


**Nice-to-have**
* EASA Part-66 License B1.1 and/or B2 with type rating.
* Type rating on A320, A330, and/or A350.
* Documented experience in line maintenance.
* Scandinavian language skills.
* Experience with AMOS.


 Why SAS
   

  

**We Make Your Journey Matter**
* Training: From human factors to type ratings, via SAS Technical Training.
* Career growth: Opportunities across SAS.
* Travel perks: Discounted tickets for you, family, and friends.
* Community: SAS Employee Club activities (skiing, golf, motor sports, and more).
* Benefits: Salary per collective and local agreements, plus access to Benify.


 Application Details
   

  

* Clean criminal record and proof of occupation for the past 5 years required.
* Drug and alcohol test before employment.
* Shift rotation covering 24/7/365.
* Apply via SAS Career Site with relevant documents.
* Questions (not applications): rekryteringsastech@sas.se
* Interviews ongoing. Deadline: 04MAY2026.

title: Systemtekniker Identitets- och åtkomstshantering
company: Swedish Civil Defence and Resilience Agency
description:
Myndigheten för civilt försvar
   

  

*Myndigheten för civilt försvar är den ledande, inriktande och samordnande myndigheten i det civila försvaret. Vi säkerställer att samhället är förberett för kris, höjd beredskap och krig.*
 Vill du göra skillnad och tillsammans med oss arbeta för ett säkrare samhälle? Då kanske du är vår nästa kollega!
   

  

 Som systemtekniker inom identitets- och åtkomstshantering är du en del av EDIT – Enheterna för digitalisering och it på Myndigheten för civilt försvar. Hos oss får du möjligheten att bidra till samhällets informationshantering och beredskap och kommer få arbeta i en grupp med mycket kompetenta kollegor inom it- och digitaliseringsområdet.
   

  

 Ditt ansvar och dina arbetsuppgifter
   

  

 Som systemtekniker hos oss har du en varierande roll där du kommer att arbeta med flera av våra interna system, applikationer och bakomliggande it-infrastrukturtjänster. Du kommer att se till att de fungerar som de ska och uppfyller användarnas behov.
   

  

 Vår applikations- och systemmiljö är mycket varierande. Dina ansvarsområden kan variera över tid beroende på de krav vi ställs inför. Flexibilitet och förmågan att anpassa sig till olika applikationer och tekniska miljöer kommer att vara till stor nytta i rollen.
   

  

 Vi har viss verksamhet 24/7 och du kan därför också bli en del av myndighetens beredskapsorganisation.
   

  

**I Dina Arbetsuppgifter Ingår Bland Annat**
* Du ansvarar tillsammans med ditt team för att applikationer och system inom området identitet- och åtkomstshantering fungerar enligt de krav som finns samt driver åtgärder planerade i förvaltnings- och utvecklingsplaner. Det innebär till exempel att du installerar, uppgraderar, konfigurerar och testar de system du ansvarar för.
* Incidenthantering, felsökning och felavhjälpning.
* Du samverkar inom den egna gruppen, med andra systemtekniker, slutanvändare och våra leverantörer för att lösa problem på ett så snabbt och effektivt sätt som möjligt.
* Du driver självständigt, och deltar i, uppdrag och utvecklingsarbeten inom området identitet- och åtkomstshantering.
* Du bidrar till vår innovationskultur genom omvärldsbevakning och arbetar kontinuerligt för att effektivisera ditt område.
* Du bidrar till att ta fram och förvalta instruktioner, rutiner, systembeskrivningar och annan dokumentation som behövs.


 Dina kunskaper och kompetenser
   

  

**Vi Söker Dig Som Har**
* har en bred grundkompetens inom it och är nyfiken och vill utveckla spetskompetens inom nya områden
* har flerårig erfarenhet av och kunskap inom området identitets- och åtkomsthantering (IAM) gällande design, konfiguration, felsökning och underhåll
* har goda kunskaper i Microsoft Active Directory
* har kunskaper inom scriptspråk, exempelvis Microsoft PowerShell
* har relevant högskoleutbildning eller motsvarande kunskaper och erfarenheter som vi bedömer likvärdiga
* är strukturerad och kan uttrycka dig pedagogiskt och tydligt i skrift
* kommunicerar obehindrat på svenska i tal och skrift


**Det Är Meriterande Om Du Har**
* erfarenhet och kunskap om PhenixIDs produktsuite
* erfarenhet och kunskap om SAML2 och OpenID Connect
* erfarenhet av att arbeta i en organisation med höga IT-säkerhetskrav
* erfarenhet av att arbeta inom offentlig sektor
* erfarenhet av att leda uppdrag eller mindre projekt


 I allt vårt arbete, både internt och externt, ska vi agera utifrån den statliga värdegrunden. Som alla medarbetare och ledare hos oss förväntas du agera utifrån myndighetens förhållningssätt.
   

  

 Förhållningssätten gäller i vardag, kris och krig. De ska ses som en helhet och bygger på varandra; samarbetsinriktad – proaktiv - handlingskraftig.
   

  

 Läs mer om våra förhållningssätt
   

  

 Om anställningen
   

  

 Vi erbjuder dig en anställning tillsvidare på heltid som inleds med en provanställning.
   

  

 Din placeringsort kommer att vara Karlstad eller Stockholm och resor i anställningen förekommer.
   

  

 Beredskapstjänstgöring ingår i arbetet och kan bli aktuellt.
   

  

 Majoriteten av våra anställningar innebär placering i säkerhetsklass. Vanligtvis krävs svenskt medborgarskap. Vid placering i säkerhetsklass kommer säkerhetsprövning med registerkontroll att genomföras före anställning enligt 3 kap i säkerhetsskyddslagen. De flesta medarbetare på Myndigheten för civilt försvar är krigsplacerade.
   

  

 Om oss
   

  

 Vår it- och digitaliseringsverksamhet består i nuläget av ca 60 personer inom avdelningen för verksamhetsstöd och finns på två kontor, i Karlstad och Stockholm.
   

  

 Enheterna för digitalisering och it ansvarar bland annat för utveckling och förvaltning av den bakomliggande it-infrastrukturen och skapar förutsättningar för morgondagens digitalisering. I det ingår bland annat användarstöd, hantering av hårdvara, applikationer samt system för våra användare som finns på hela myndigheten.
   

  

 Vi erbjuder flexibel arbetstid och möjlighet att till del arbeta på distans. Det finns möjlighet att ta ut friskvårdstimme och du får även ett friskvårdsbidrag. För dig som statligt anställd finns förmånliga semestervillkor.
   

  

 Alla vi som arbetar på Myndigheten för civilt försvar förväntas och ska bidra till ökad jämställdhet och likabehandling för en arbetsmiljö och ett samhälle fritt från diskriminering.
   

  

 Läs mer om vår organisation, förmåner och hur det är att arbeta hos oss
   

  

 Vill du veta mer?
   

  

 Har du frågor är du välkommen att kontakta enhetschef Peter Aronsson. Fackliga företrädare är Nicklas Bergqvist (Saco-S), Anna Anelius (ST) och Ann-Britt Paradis (SEKO). Samtliga nås via växelnummer 0771-240 240.
   

  

**Välkommen med din ansökan senast den 30 april 2026**
 Anställningsform Tillsvidare med provanställning Anställningens omfattning Heltid Tillträde Enligt överenskommelse Löneform Månadslön Antal lediga befattningar 1 Sysselsättningsgrad 100% Ort Karlstad eller Stockholm Län Stockholms län Land Sverige Referensnummer 2026/91 Kontakt
   

  

* Peter Aronsson, 0771-240240
