title: AI Engineer, Software Development Life Cycle
description:
As an AI Engineer, Software Development Life Cycle, you build and improve the systems that allow AI to generate and evolve software.
 



  





 Your goal is to make AI-driven development reliable, fast, and scalable.
 



  





**Responsibilities** 




 Your work includes:
 



  




* building and improving our context and harness for coding agents
* developing prompts, skills, and automation workflows
* designing development pipelines and tooling
* creating evaluation frameworks
* testing new models and capabilities



  





 You continuously experiment and iterate to improve automation performance.
 



 We want to use the best coding agents on the market and make them build the Pit way.
 



  





**What Success Looks Like** 




  




* coding agents reliably generate high-quality systems
* automation significantly reduces development time
* improvements in models translate into real productivity gains



  





**Qualifications** 




**Required** 




  




* 5+ years of professional software engineering experience spent building production systems in TypeScript/Node.js
* All-in on coding agents since at least Claude Opus 4.1 (August 2025). You should be using them daily and have strong intuition about what works and what does not
* Experience building harnesses, skills, or tooling around coding agents to improve their reliability and output quality
* Actively using more than one coding agent (Claude Code, Codex, Gemini, or others) and able to compare their strengths and weaknesses
* Demonstrated ability to iterate quickly, run experiments, and translate results into production improvements
* Clear, direct communication style. You write well and explain technical decisions to non-technical stakeholders



  





**Preferred** 




  




* Experience building evaluation frameworks or benchmarks to measure AI system performance
* Deep understanding of software development lifecycle practices, including testing, CI/CD, code review, and deployment
* Background in developer tooling, internal platforms, or infrastructure that other engineers depend on



**Not a Fit If** 




  




* You use coding agents casually but have not thought deeply about how to make them reliable and consistent at scale
* You are primarily a data scientist or ML researcher looking for a model training role
* You get attached to particular solutions or approaches. The state of the art moves fast and we need people who follow the research, run experiments, and go where the data leads rather than defending what worked last month



  





**About Pit** 




**Where intent becomes reliable systems** 




 Our vision is a world where the friction between an idea and a production-ready system is zero.
 



 Our mission is to help companies run their operations on custom software they can trust.
 



  





**Our Principles** 




**1. Start With the Customer** 




 Everything we build serves someone. We stay close to real users and workflows to understand their constraints and outcomes, testing against reality rather than our own taste. Technical elegance is nice, but without user value it is redundant work. We do not build features to feel productive. We build them because they create clear, durable value for the people using what we make.
 



  





*The customer is not a stakeholder to satisfy. They are the reason we exist.* 




  





**2. Think Like an Owner** 




 We take extreme ownership of our work and our mistakes. When pressure hits, we don’t point fingers or hide. We flag problems early, make a plan, and focus on the solution. We believe accountability is the fastest way to learn and improve.
 



  





 Speak up. If something is broken, unclear, or heading in the wrong direction, say it directly, early, and to the right person. We hold strong opinions but remain willing to change our minds when presented with better arguments. Silence is not neutrality; it is a choice that lets problems compound. We do not punish people for raising hard things. We expect it.
 



  





**3. Set the Standard** 




 Quality compounds, but so does mediocrity. We hold exceptionally high standards in our product, code, design, and hiring. We do what’s right, even when nobody’s watching. We will take shortcuts, but conscious ones. We document them so they don’t become debt nobody owns.
 



  





*The bar is not what we produce today. It is what we commit to produce every time.* 




  





**4. Build Lego Blocks, Not Artworks** 




 We do not build in silos. We maintain a big-picture view of the product, the architecture, and the company to ensure our decisions are scalable and durable. We choose the right level of complexity to solve root causes, not surface symptoms. “Good enough and fast” is a legitimate choice, but only when it makes the next thing easier to build, not harder.
 



  





 That is the standard. Everything we ship should compound. Every decision we document should make the company smarter. Our job is not just to solve today’s problem well. It is to leave the platform, the culture, and the codebase better than we found them.
 



  





**5. Win Together** 




 No one carries the weight alone. When the load is heavy, we rally beyond role boundaries because we care about each other’s performance and well-being. High talent density only works if we operate as one unit.
 



  





 Act with good intent. Assume your colleagues are trying their best. Give feedback to help, not to score points. Challenge decisions openly before they are final, then commit fully once they are. We do not play politics. We do not undermine quietly. We trust each other enough to be honest, and we expect the same in return.
 



  





**6. Empower People with Technology** 




 Technology is powerful and comes with real societal changes. We don't pretend otherwise and we take that seriously. Every solution we ship should make organizations and the people in them more capable, not just more efficient.
 



  





 We think about where the human goes, not just where the workflow goes. Technology done right lifts the ceiling on what people can focus on.

title: Data Management Specialist
description:
*Are you ready to strengthen data management and empower business units to take ownership of their data?*
 As a Data Management Specialist your main responsibility will be to implement our Data Governance Policy throughout the organization.
   

  

 Our approach is based on a decentralized data governance model, meaning each business area is responsible for its own data. A key focus in this role is to reinforce data stewardship and accountability across different business units.
   

  

 This position offers a rare chance to engage in data management at the leading insurance company in the Nordics, where data is integral to both analytical and operational processes.
   

  

**About The Role**
 As a Data Management Specialist, you will collaborate with various business stakeholders, IT, architecture, security, and analytics teams to ensure data is trustworthy, thoroughly documented, and available when required. This role combines governance, collaborative efforts, and hands-on work to enhance how data is organized, described, and managed in day-to-day work.
   

  

 Key responsibilities include:
   

  

* Drive the rollout and practical application of the Data Governance Policy throughout the company.
* Assist business units in managing their data assets, which includes overseeing documentation, maintaining quality, and handling the data lifecycle.
* Enhance approaches to metadata, data documentation, and information structure to foster transparency and encourage data reuse.
* Advise stakeholders on topics such as data stewardship, access controls, and standards for documentation.
* Work together with business and technology teams to boost data quality, refine information models, and achieve greater consistency across all data areas.
* Help create actionable guidelines and procedures that make data management more effective.


**We offer**
 While we set high expectations for you as an employee, we also expect you to set high expectations for us as your employer. Here are some of the benefits of working at If:
   

  

* An including work environment where everyone is welcome
* Career and development opportunities in the biggest insurance company in the Nordics
* Social activities, as well as highly skilled professional environment
* Possibility of a hybrid workplace
* A health-promoting workplace with e.g., fitness programs and various sports activities
* Attractive insurance benefits and pension


**About The Team**
 You will join Digital Sales and Customer Experience within Business Area Private, focusing on Data Management as a key enabler of digital transformation.
   

  

 We work across business and IT to strengthen data ownership, quality, and accessibility, ensuring data can be trusted and used effectively. Guided by If’s core values, we collaborate to turn data into a strategic asset that supports better decisions and future customer needs.
   

  

**Who Are You**
 We are looking for a team member who is enthusiastic about data and eager to contribute to digital transformation within a collaborative, cross-functional environment. You thrive working across business and IT, value open communication, and are motivated by creating clarity around complex topics. Your background demonstrates a strong interest in data and a proactive approach to supporting organizational goals.
   

  

 In addition, we expect the following:
   

  

* Collaborative and open-minded, able to work effectively in a Nordic cross-functional team
* Experienced with metadata management, data documentation, data quality, or information modeling (an advantage)
* Familiar with modern data platforms; experience with Databricks is a strong plus
* Skilled at contributing to or leading cross-organizational data or governance initiatives
* Demonstrates a keen interest in the full lifecycle of data, from daily operations to analytics and value creation
* Excellent communication skills, with the ability to simplify and clarify complex subjects
* Fluent in English


**Additional Facts And The Recruitment Process**
**Application deadline:** 
 Screening and interviews are conducted on an ongoing basis. The deadline to apply is 10th of May 2026.
   

  

**Application** 
 : Please submit your CV via our website. You do not need to attach a cover letter, but feel free to include a few lines in your CV explaining why you are interested in the position.
   

  

**Location:** 
 Any of If’s locations in the Nordics
   

  

**Start date:** 
 Upon agreement
   

  

 If you have any questions about the position, you are welcome to contact Frej Nielsen, Data Governance Lead, at mobile +4541885152 or e-mail frej.nielsen@if.dk.
   

  

 At If, we aim to create a workplace with equal opportunities for all. We encourage everyone to apply regardless of gender, age, background, or any disability. We also recommend that you do not include a photo in your CV.
   

  

*Requirement for working in this position is passing fitness and propriety (fit and proper) assessment. This requirement is based on Chapter 6, Section 9 of the Insurance Companies Act.*
 We look forward to your application!
   

  

 Union contacts:
   

  

 Forena: Carina Lidgren, carina.lidgren@if.se, +46 733 154361
   

  

 SACO: Oskar Nordström, oskar.nordstrom@if.se, +46 733 864214

title: Senior Workplace Engineer (Tech Lead) – Entra ID, Solna
description:
PostNord är igång med en strategisk transformation rörande våra katalogtjänster (Microsoft Active Directory och Azure AD/Entra ID) och bygger en modern, säker och långsiktig plattform internt. Nu söker vi en erfaren Workplace Engineer som vill leda arbetet och forma vår framtida identitets- och katalogarkitektur.
   

  

 Det här är en central och högt prioriterad roll där du får möjlighet att driva förändring, påverka tekniska beslut på både operativ och strategisk nivå, och bli en viktig del av vår långsiktiga arkitektur.
   

  

**Om rollen**
 Som Senior Workplace Engineer (Tech Lead) För Directory Services Har Du End-to-end-ansvar För PostNords AD- Och Entra ID-plattform – Från Målbild Och Roadmap Till Design, Implementation Och Stabil Drift. Du Säkerställer Kontinuerlig Förbättring Och Vidareutveckling Av Tjänsterna Enligt En Modern Och Säker Identitetsarkitektur. I Uppdraget Ingår Att
   

  

* Förvalta och vidareutveckla plattformen (miljö, beroenden, risker) med fokus på stabil drift och förbättringar.
* Ta fram och äga en 3–5-årig roadmap för AD/Entra ID (målbild, prioriteringar, teknisk skuld, livscykel).
* Sätta designprinciper/standarder och säkerställa best practice, säkerhet och efterlevnad.
* Vara teknisk huvudansvarig i förändringar: design, implementation, felsökning och stabil drift.


**Mandat och samarbete:** 
 Du tar dagliga tekniska beslut inom plattformens scope, driver förbättringar och agerar rådgivande i arkitektur- och säkerhetsfrågor kopplade till identitet. Du arbetar nära IAM-teamets produktägare och Workplace Team Lead kring planering och prioritering, samt samverkar med säkerhet, infrastruktur och applikationsteam. I rollen ingår att stötta teamet genom coaching, onboarding och kompetensutveckling.
   

  

 ,
   

  

**Skall-krav (obligatoriska)**
* Minst 10 års erfarenhet av IT-drift/förvaltning i enterprise-miljö.
* Mycket god kompetens i AD DS och Azure AD/Entra ID i hybridmiljö (design, implementation, felsökning).
* Stark kompetens inom IAM (identitetslivscykel, autentisering/auktorisation och åtkomststyrning).
* Stark analytisk förmåga (rotorsaksanalys samt risk- och konsekvensbedömning).
* Erfarenhet av system-/lösningsarkitektur för plattformstjänster (säkerhet, skalbarhet, HA).
* Vana att arbeta i hybrid/distribuerade team och samverka tvärfunktionellt.
* Erfarenhet av att driva vidareutveckling och förändringar i förvaltning (planering, genomförande och stabilisering i drift).
* Självgående och strukturerad, med god prioriterings- och leveransförmåga.
* Mycket god kommunikation på svenska och engelska, i tal och skrift (tekniska och icke-tekniska målgrupper).


**Bör-krav (meriterande)**
* Erfarenhet av agila arbetssätt (t.ex. SAFe, Scrum eller Kanban).
* Erfarenhet från post/logistik, e-handel eller retail.
* Erfarenhet av att leda, coacha och utveckla kollegor.


**Utbildning och certifieringar**
* Relevant utbildning inom IT/systemvetenskap – eller motsvarande erfarenhet.
* Meriterande certifieringar: AD/AAD/Entra ID (t.ex. AZ-104, AZ-500, SC-900, SC-200, MS-100).


**Du ska må bra**
 Vi är ett modernt kundorienterat företag som tänker lika mycket på våra anställda som på våra kunder. Hos oss erbjuds du ett omväxlande arbete i en internationell miljö med ständigt nya utmaningar och snabba beslut. Förutom schyssta anställningsvillkor enligt kollektivavtal erbjuds du:
   

  

* Flexibel hybrid arbetsplats. Se filmen om vårt kontor.
* Goda utvecklings- och karriärmöjligheter
* Goda försäkrings- och tjänstepensionsvillkor
* Friskvårdsbidrag samt möjlighet att träna på Arkens gym och simhall
* Personalförmåner genom PostNord Plus - vår personalstiftelse


**Vad väntar du på?**
 Välkommen med din ansökan. Urval sker löpande så ansök så snart som möjligt. Som en del av rekryteringsprocessen kan vissa tjänster kräva en bakgrundskontroll. Om du går vidare till ett steg där en bakgrundskontroll är aktuell kommer du att informeras i förväg.
   

  

 Om du har frågor eller funderingar, vänligen maila Susanne.Wetterstrand@postnord.com
   

  

 Vi ser fram emot att höra från dig!
   

  

 Här kan du läsa mer om våra fackliga kontakter

title: Product Experience Specialist (APAC)
description:
**TL;DR**
 We're looking for Product Experience Specialists to deliver world-class support and shape the future of Lovable from the front lines. You’ll troubleshoot real user problems, capture high-signal insights, and turn feedback into product gold. This role is for someone who’s user- and product-obsessed, someone who cares deeply about helping others succeed and wants to build support processes that scales with quality.
   

  

 This is a contractor position requiring availability during APAC business hours to provide seamless support coverage for our global user base.
   

  

**Why Lovable?**
 Lovable lets anyone and everyone build software with any language. From solopreneurs to Fortune 100 teams, millions of people use Lovable to transform raw ideas into real products - fast. We are at the forefront of a foundational shift in software creation, which means you have an unprecedented opportunity to change the way the digital world works. Over 2 million people in 200+ countries already use Lovable to launch businesses, automate work, and bring their ideas to life. And we’re just getting started.
   

  

 We’re a small, talent-dense team building a generation-defining company from Stockholm. We value extreme ownership, high velocity and low-ego collaboration. We seek out people who care deeply, ship fast, and are eager to make a dent in the world.
   

  

**What We’re Looking For**
* User-First Mindset: You instinctively advocate for users and always look for ways to improve their experience. You sweat the details because they matter.
* Crystal‑Clear Communicator: Whether it’s a concise chat reply or detailed bug report, you communicate warmly, clearly, and precisely.
* Sharp Problem Solver: You stay calm under pressure, think clearly in messy situations, and move fast to get users unblocked even if it is something we haven’t seen before.
* 3 yrs experience in B2C Saas customer support using tools like (e.g. Intercom)
* Bonus: Experience using Lovable


**What You’ll Do**
* Become a Lovable expert: Understand every part of our product
* Provide Delightful Support: Solve a wide range of user problems with speed, warmth, and clarity.
* Troubleshoot and escalate effectively: Investigate bugs, edge cases, and unexpected behavior, partnering with engineering when needed to get users unblocked.
* Capture and share insights: Spot patterns in feedback and flag what matters most to the product and engineering teams.
* Improve our support stack: Keep help docs sharp and find ways to automate the repeatable stuff without losing the human touch.
* Be the Voice of the Customer: Take extreme ownership in making sure user feedback drives product direction.


**About Your Application**
* Please submit your application in English. It’s our company language so you’ll be speaking lots of it if you join.
* We treat all candidates equally - if you are interested please apply through our application system.

title: Customer Service Agents (Multilingual)
description:
At Mercell, we're on a mission to revolutionize public procurement, making it accessible and effortless for everyone involved. Imagine a world where public buyers and visionary suppliers come together seamlessly to make a great deal easier and shape the future. That's what we're all about.
 



 With a dynamic culture built on continuous growth, trust, and collaboration, Mercell offers an environment where your talents can thrive. You will be part of an international environment with ambitious and dedicated colleagues who are passionate about what they do and supported to be themselves.
 



 Together, let's shape the future and create real value for society, one innovative solution at a time.
 



  





**Your Mission** 




  





 We are hiring five (5) Customer Service Agents to join Mercell and play a key role in ensuring a smooth and reliable experience for our customers across Europe, including public buyers and suppliers navigating complex public procurement processes. You will act as a trusted first point of contact for customers using our platform.
 



 Your mission is to provide timely, accurate, and solution-oriented support, helping customers resolve issues, understand functionality needs, and successfully complete their procurement activities. This role reflects Mercell’s commitment to operational excellence and customer focus combining responsiveness, product knowledge and empathy to deliver high-quality service at scale.
 



 Our Customer Service & Support, is a team of over 60 professionals responsible for ensuring a smooth experience for our public tendering customers across Europe. Our area of expertise extends from supporting the software platforms, to understanding the public procurement process, all the way to anticipating customers' needs and using modern technology to answer them.
 



 We embrace a hybrid way of working offering flexibility to work from home, while also encouraging strong in-person collaboration, learning, and team spirit.
 



  





**Core Responsibilities** 



* Handle and prioritise customer inquiries across phone, email, and digital channels, documenting all cases accurately in Jira and relevant support systems.
* Actively listen, provide clear and professional responses, and follow up to ensure full resolution, maintaining ownership throughout, even when escalation is needed.
* Investigate platform-related issues, guide customers through solutions efficiently, and escalate complex cases to the right teams while keeping customers informed.
* Support onboarding and basic product guidance for new customers where relevant, ensuring a smooth start with the platform.
* Collaborate with internal teams to identify recurring issues, contribute insights for product and process improvements, and keep knowledge base content up to date.
* Contribute to meeting customer satisfaction and SLA targets consistently across all markets.



  





**Required Qualifications** 



* Proven experience (ideally 2+ years) in customer service, support, helpdesk, or a similar client-facing role.
* Strong communication skills with the ability to explain technical topics clearly and simply.
* Structured and organized approach to successfully navigate multiple priorities simultaneously.
* Problem-solving mindset and ability to stay calm under pressure.
* Comfortable working with support systems, CRM tools, and digital platforms.
* Professional fluency in Swedish and English, as well as minimum of one of the following languages: Norwegian, Danish, Finnish (both written and spoken).



  





**Preferred Qualifications** 



* Experience supporting public sector customers.
* Basic knowledge of procurement processes.
* Previous work experience in a SaaS environment.



  





**Start date:** 
 As soon as possible
 



**Duration:** 
 Full time
 



**Workplace type:** 
 Hybrid - working onsite at the office and from home, balancing flexibility with collaboration
 



**Location:** 
 Sweden, Stockholm
 



**Application Deadline: 10.05.2026.** 
 However, do not wait to submit your application - we will read applications and talk to potential candidates as we receive them

title: ServiceNow-specialist
description:
Svenska kraftnät är en nyckelaktör i energiomställningen. Vår IT-division växer för att möjliggöra en fördubblad elproduktion och en fossilfri framtid. Med den senaste tekniken ökar vi både infrastrukturens kapacitet och utvecklingstakten inom digitalisering och processer.
   

  

 Sök jobbet som ServiceNow-specialist! Här erbjuds du ett av Sveriges viktigaste IT-jobb, i vilket du varje dag kommer att bidra till Sveriges elförsörjning.
   

  

**Om tjänsten**
 Som ServiceNow-specialist ansvarar du för att utveckla, konfigurera och underhålla Svenska kraftnäts ServiceNow-plattform, säkerställa en stabil drift och optimera systemet för att möta verksamhetens behov.
   

  

 Du är delaktig och bidrar till att analysera och optimera ITSM applikationen, egenbyggda applikationer samt till teamets kontinuerliga förbättringsarbete. Du samarbetar nära ITSM-processledare och andra intressenter för att utveckla nya funktioner och förbättra befintliga processer.
   

  

 Du får möjlighet att specialisera dig inom ServiceNow och påverka plattformens utveckling. Här finns stora möjligheter att arbeta med olika moduler, driva förbättringsinitiativ och utvecklas i samarbete med erfarna kollegor. Rollen ger en central position i Svenska kraftnäts digitalisering och utveckling av användarstödet
   

  

 Som ServiceNow-specialist tillhör du enheten IT Driftprocesser och leverans, en del av IT Infrastruktur och drift. Enheten består idag av processledare som arbetar med våra operativa ITSM processer, förvaltningen av ServiceNow samt våra uppdragsledare. Teamet präglas av samarbete och kunskapsdelning i en dynamisk miljö.
   

  

 Här får du möjlighet att utvecklas i en snabbföränderlig miljö och vara med och påverka utvecklingen av ServiceNow-plattformen. Du blir en del av ett engagerat team där kunskapsdelning och kompetensutveckling står i fokus.
   

  

**Om dig**
**Skallkrav:**
 För att trivas i rollen ser vi att du är:
   

  

* Samarbetsinriktad, van vid att hantera olika intressenter och skapa goda relationer.
* Nyfiken och drivs av att lära dig nya saker och utvecklas inom ServiceNow
* Strukturerad och har en god helhetssyn, med förmåga att prioritera efter verksamhetens behov.
* Självständig, ansvarstagande och kan driva arbetet framåt utan detaljstyrning.
* Kommunikativ och tydlig i både tekniska frågor och interaktioner på olika nivåer, med ett lösningsfokuserat och serviceinriktat arbetssätt


 Vi lägger stor vikt vid dina personliga egenskaper.
   

  

 Vidare ser vi att du har eftergymnasial examen inom IT, systemvetenskap eller motsvarande utbildning eller kompetens förvärvad på annat sätt. Du har även:
   

  

* Minst tre års aktuell och relevant erfarenhet av ServiceNow-plattformen och ITSM applikationerna
* Aktuell och relevant erfarenhet av CMDB/CSDM
* Förståelse för hur ServiceNow standardapplikationer fungerar och används i sin standarduppsättning
* Erfarenhet av App Engine och egenbyggda applikationer
* Certifikat: Certified System Administrator
* Mycket god förmåga att uttrycka dig i tal och skrift på svenska och engelska


 Det är
 **meriterande** 
 om du har:
   

  

* ITIL-certifiering på minst foundation-nivå
* Erfarenhet av Catalog Builder, Flow Designer, Workspace, Employee Center, App Engine, rapportmotorn, CMDB/CSDM
* Använt agila arbetssätt
* Erfarenhet av Integration HUB
* Arbetat i on-prem miljö


**Bra att veta**
* Tjänsten är placerad i Stockholm/Sundbyberg
* Möjlighet till distansarbete upp till 50 %
* Sista ansökningsdag är den 4 maj 2026. Vid din ansökan önskar vi ditt CV men inget personligt brev behövs, istället du får svara på ett antal frågor.
* Tjänsten är en tillsvidareanställning.
* Förmåner | Svenska kraftnät


**Vid frågor, kontakta gärna**
* Nickoletta Pihl, rekryterande chef, 010 475 97 33
* Victoria Waltenberg, rekryterare, 010 350 90 45
* Annika Ingeborn, SACO, 010 475 87 72
* Erica Midfjäll, ST, 010 475 87 31


 Du når oss också via e-post: fornamn.efternamn@svk.se
   

  

 Jobba här – bli en viktig del av vår energiframtid | Svenska kraftnät
   

  

 Vi undanber oss direktkontakt med bemannings- och rekryteringsföretag samt säljare i samband med rekrytering, vi har upphandlade avtal som gäller för Svenska kraftnät som statlig myndighet.
   

  

 Övrig information
   

  

 Vi ställer höga krav på våra medarbetares säkerhets- och sekretessmedvetenhet. Innan ett beslut om anställning fattas kommer en säkerhetsprövning enligt säkerhetsskyddslagen (2018:585) att genomföras i de fall befattningen innebär hantering av säkerhetsskyddsklassificerade uppgifter eller deltagande i säkerhetskänslig verksamhet. Om anställningen avser befattning i säkerhetsklass kommer säkerhetsprövningen även att innefatta en registerkontroll och, i vissa fall, en särskild personutredning. För anställning på Svenska kraftnät kan det vara ett krav på svenskt medborgarskap i vissa befattningar. Med anställningen följer en skyldighet att krigsplaceras. För mer information om säkerhetsprövning Svenska kraftnät arbetar för att främja mångfald och motverka diskriminering och ser gärna sökanden med olika bakgrund och erfarenheter till våra rekryteringar. Lär känna Svenska kraftnät och hur det är att arbeta hos oss: Lär känna oss på Svenska kraftnät

title: Fullstack Product Engineer
description:
**TL;DR** 
 - We’re seeking exceptional Fullstack Product Engineers to help build the future of AI. You will work across our entire stack to build features that will empower the next generation of creators and builders.
   

  

**Why Lovable?**
 Lovable lets anyone build software with plain English. From solopreneurs to Fortune 100 teams, millions of people use Lovable to transform raw ideas into real products - fast. We are at the forefront of a foundational shift in software creation, which means you have an unprecedented opportunity to change the way the digital world works. Over 2 million people in 200+ countries already use Lovable to launch businesses, solve complex problems, and bring their dreams to life. And we’re just getting started.
   

  

 We’re a small, talent-dense team building a generation-defining company from Stockholm. We value high ownership, high velocity and low-ego collaboration. We seek people who care deeply, challenge us, and are driven to build something of lasting impact.
   

  

**What We’re Looking For**
* 5+ years of experience building and shipping full-stack products
* Fluent in modern frontend (React/TypeScript) and backend development
* Solid understanding of systems design, performance tradeoffs, and scalable architecture
* Strong product sense and ability to make well-reasoned technical decisions, knowing when to prioritize speed and when to invest in foundational work


**What You’ll Do**
**In one sentence** 
 : Do all it takes to build a generational product and scale the core experience of lovable products
   

  

* Implement and maintain features across the full stack: frontend, backend and infra
* Own systems end-to-end: architecture, implementation, deployment, and iteration
* Collaborate closely with ML, design, and product teams to translate capabilities into intuitive, mind-blowing user experiences
* Drive the full development lifecycle, from technical planning to production launch and post-release improvements
* Contribute to shaping our technical direction, eng culture, and product strategy


**Our tech stack**
 We're building with tools that both humans and AI love:
   

  

* Frontend: React
* Backend: Golang and Rust
* Cloud: Cloudflare, GCP, AWS, Many LLM providers
* DevOps & Tooling: Github Actions, Grafana, OTEL, infra-as-code (Terraform)


 And always on the lookout for what's next!
   

  

**How We Hire**
* Fill in a short form then jump on an intro call with a recruiter.
* Complete a quick live coding exercise.
* Show us how you approach problems during several technical interviews.
* Tell us about your most impressive project.


**About Your Application**
* Please submit your application in English - it’s our company language so you’ll be speaking lots of it if you join
* We treat all candidates equally - if you’re interested please apply through our careers portal

title: Sveriges utrikes underrättelsetjänst söker lokalsamordnare/projektledare
company: Kommittén för bildandet av en utrikesunderrättelsetjänst
description:
Vill du vara med och bidra till den svenska underrättelsereformen? Nu bildas Sveriges utrikes underrättelsetjänst (UND) som en del i reformen.  Vi bygger upp en helt ny myndighet som kommer att bidra till att stärka det svenska underrättelsesamhället.
   

  





**Beskrivning**




 Vi söker nu en lokalsamordnare/projektledare inom lokal för att medverka i utvecklingen av myndighetens nya lokaler. Du rapporterar till enhetschef för lokalförsörjning.
   

  





**Arbetsuppgifter**




 Som lokalsamordnare/projektledare medverkar du i de stora och tidskritiska lokalprojekt som är nödvändiga för att etablera myndigheten i dess initiala tillväxt. Ditt arbete kommer att vara av både strategisk och mycket operativ karaktär. Du medverkar i planeraring och genomförande av myndighetens egna arbeten för färdigställande lokaler såsom inredning och utrustning av lokalerna och arbetet med myndighetens flyttar.
   

  





 Enheten kommer initialt att ha få medarbetare varför alla i gruppen kommer att få medverka i planering och genomförande av de arbeten som vi för tillfället behöver prioritera. Det kan till exempel vara kravställning och upphandlingar av inredning och utrustning inom lokalområdet, iordningsställande av lokaler, planering och medverkan i flyttaktiviteter. Du kan också komma att få rollen som projektledare för mindre till medelstora verksamhetsanpassande insatser inom lokalområdet. Din roll kommer alltså initialt att vara mycket varierande. I takt med att myndigheten och dess lokalbestånd växer kommer också Lokalförsörjningsenheten att behöva växa och formaliseras. Här kommer det då att finnas möjlighet att mer inrikta din roll mot någon del i verksamhet.
   

  





 Då du kommer verka i en miljö där det inte finns historiska erfarenheter och dokumentationer att luta dig emot förväntas du kunna utveckla dokumentation och mallar för ditt arbete. Det innebär att du är med och utvecklar myndighetens framtida arbetssätt och rutiner.
   

  





**Kvalifikationer**




 Du har erfarenhet av arbete med säkerhetsklassade lokalprojekt på myndighet där statligt fastighetsbolag varit fastighetsägare/hyresvärd. Du har vana vid att iordningsställa lokaler baserat på verksamhetens behov där nybyggnation eller omfattande renoveringar/verksamhetsanpassningar av fastigheter genomförts. Du har vana att leda och samordna leverantörer och entreprenörer. Du har grundläggande kunskap om de kravställningar Säkerhet, It och Service har på lokaler och är van att samarbeta med dem i arbetet med lokalfrågor. Du har erfarenhet av LOU och är van att kravställa, genomföra upphandlingar och förvalta avtal.
   

  





 Som person är du initiativtagande och har förmågan att se när något behöver göras eller rättas till. Du är mål- och resultatinriktad samt har ett strukturerat och prestigelöst arbetssätt. Du tycker om att samverka med andra medarbetare och yrkesgrupper.
   

  





 Vi fäster stor vikt vid personliga egenskaper.
   

  





**Övrig information**




 Anställningen är en tillsvidareanställning. Initialt anställs du i den kommitté som har i uppdrag att bilda myndigheten. Tjänsten tillsätts under förutsättning att erforderliga beslut fattas. 
   

  





 För anställningen krävs svenskt medborgarskap och säkerhetsprövning kommer att göras innan anställning. 
   

  





 För frågor om tjänsten kontakta Joakim Pettersson, telefon 08- 405 10 00.
   

  





 Välkommen med ansökan senast 15  maj 2026.
   

  





 Avdelningen för säkerhet, lokal och beredskap har en central roll i att skapa förutsättningar för att myndigheten har den säkerhet och säkerhetsskydd som verksamheten kräver. Avdelningen ansvarar för ledning och samordning av myndighetens säkerhets- och säkerhetsskyddsarbete vilket innefattar regelverk och vägledningar inom området samt genomförande av utbildningar. Uppföljning, utveckling och kontroll i nära samverkan med verksamheten är viktiga uppgifter för avdelningen. Avdelningen kommer att bestå av medarbetare inom säkerhet och säkerhetsskydd samt ha en enhet för lokalförsörjning och en funktion för beredskap. Ytterligare enheter inom avdelningen kan komma att bli aktuella.
   

  





 Enheten för lokalförsörjning ansvarar för och förvaltar myndighetens lokaler vilket bland annat innebär att ansvara för lokalplanering, upphandling inom lokaler, flyttplanering, inredning och egen lokalrelaterad utrustning. Enheten har en stor och viktig uppgift i att den nya myndigheten får en god lokalförsörjning både från start och under uppbyggnadsfas. Enhetens arbete präglas av att det är projekt- och processorienterat.
   

  





  

 ­
   

  





  

 ­
   

  





  

 ­
   

  





  

 ­
   

  





  

 ­
   

  





  

 ­
   

  





  

 ­
   

  





  

 ­
   

  





**Sveriges utrikes underrättelsetjänst (UND)** 
  är en ny myndighet som ska inleda sin verksamhet den 1 januari 2027 och därefter successivt växa.
   

  





 UND kommer att vara en nationell underrättelseresurs som i fred, kris och krig stödjer svensk utrikes-, säkerhets- och försvarspolitik. Genom att upptäcka, identifiera och förvarna om yttre hot kommer myndigheten att främja Sveriges nationella säkerhetsintressen och våra allierades säkerhet. Myndighetens uppgift är att stödja regeringen, Regeringskansliet och andra myndigheter.
   

  





 Myndigheten kommer vara lokaliserad i Stockholmsområdet.

title: Product Lead Expansion - Area Avanza International
description:
**Building a European Presence — Denmark as the First Step in Our International Expansion Strategy**
 At Avanza, we’ve spent over 20 years building Sweden’s best platform for savers. Now, we’re asking ourselves: If we were to build that same trust and magic today, using the technology and AI of 2026, what would it look like?
   

  

 We are taking our first big step outside of Sweden, starting with Denmark. We aren’t just "copy-pasting" our Swedish success; we are building a brand-new, international platform from the ground up - leveraging on our Swedish success. Our goal is to move from being a world-class platform to being a
 **true financial partner** 
 for our customers—building something that doesn't just hold their money, but proactively helps them grow it.
   

  

 To do this, we are creating a dedicated, cross-functional International Area. We are now looking for a
 **Product Lead Expansion** 
 to join this Area and help us define the next generation of Avanza.
   

  

**The Mission: Building a Platform for “European Expansion”**
 In this role, you will lead the product vision for our expansion journey. You will build on the core DNA and trust that made us a leader in Sweden, but you’ll have the freedom to design a new experience optimised for the Danish market and built on an AI-first foundation.
   

  

 We want to move past traditional banking interfaces to create a proactive, personal "financial co-pilot" that helps customers make better decisions every day. Denmark is our first destination, but you will be building the modular blueprint for everything that follows.
   

  

 You can be based in Stockholm or Copenhagen. You will report to the Head of Business Development and travels will occur on a monthly basis.
   

  

**Your focus will be to**
* Lead International Product Strategy: Partner with your team to define our trajectory as a "financial partner" for the Danish market, balancing local relevance with global vision.


* Drive Product Excellence: Collaborate within our autonomous, cross-functional area to ensure we build a platform that is intuitive, transparent, and delivers a superior user experience.


* Champion an AI-First Foundation: Oversee the development of agentic features that automate complex financial tasks and provide high-level personalization, ensuring the product is intelligently designed at its core.


* Scale with Strategic Purpose: Leverage your experience in international expansion to build a robust platform optimised for Denmark today, while maintaining the architectural flexibility required for future markets.


**Who You Are**
 We are looking for a senior leader (Director or VP level) who excels in the
 **"Zero-to-One"** 
 phase. You are a product-led strategist who balances a high-quality craft with a
 **pragmatic approach** 
 to problem-solving.
   

  

 You are a
 **collaborative leader** 
 who values the collective success of the team over individual ego. Your experience has taught you when to be hands-on to unblock your team and when to steer strategically. You bring a
 **solution-oriented mindset** 
 to complex challenges, navigating the intricacies of international scaling with both resilience and adaptability.
   

  

**We believe you have**
**A Strategic & Visionary Mindset:** 
 You possess the foresight to see where the industry is heading and the ability to translate that into a bold, actionable product strategy. You don’t just follow trends; you define the future of how people manage their financial lives.
   

  

**User Advocacy & Design Precision:** 
 You are a product leader at your core. You care deeply about the nuances of the user journey—from the initial onboarding to the clarity of complex investment concepts. You understand that building trust requires a commitment to excellence in every detail.
   

  

**International Growth Expertise:** 
 You have a proven track record of navigating the complexities of scaling products across borders. You know how to balance global efficiency with the local nuances required to build market-leading products.
   

  

**Senior Product Leadership:** 
 You have experience leading and maturing product organisations in modern, high-growth tech environments. You excel at creating clarity, setting a high bar for quality, and empowering your teams to reach their full potential.
   

  

**Technical & AI Insight: Y** 
 ou have a sophisticated understanding of how AI can fundamentally simplify and enhance the user experience, moving beyond the hype to create real customer value.
   

  

**Qualifications of Interest:** 
 Experience within the financial sector or specific insights into the Danish market are considered a strong advantage.
   

  

**Communication:** 
 Fluency in English is essential for our global collaboration. Swedish is a welcome addition but not a barrier to entry.
   

  

**Why join us?**
 This is a rare opportunity to build a
 **greenfield** 
 platform within a company that already has the trust and resources of a
 **market leader** 
 . You’ll have the autonomy of a dedicated international domain, combined with a culture that truly cares about its people.
   

  

 We succeed when we work together, stay curious, and keep our focus on what’s best for the customer.
   

  

**What Success Looks Like**
 We have many customers and they love the product!
   

  

**How To Apply**
 If you are ready to help us build a Platform for
 **“European Expansion”** 
 we’d love to hear from you!
   

  

 We review applications on an ongoing basis, so don’t wait too long to apply.
   

  

 If you have any questions about the role, feel free to reach out to Monia Letmark, Talent Acquisition Partner, at monia.letmark@avanza.se.
   

  

 Ready to get started?
 **Click the “Apply”** 
 button below.
   

  

 (P.S.We kindly but firmly say no thanks to recruitment agencies and advertising sales calls.)
   

  

 Avanza är Sveriges ledande plattform för sparande och placeringar. Vi drivs av att förändra branschen genom att utmana de stora bankerna och försäkringsbolagen på den svenska sparmarknaden. Vi vill vara tjänsten som förenklar och förbättrar spararnas ekonomi, oavsett om man älskar aktier eller bara vill ha ett bra sparande. Vår vision är att skapa en bättre framtid för miljoner människor. Därför står våra kunders bästa alltid i fokus, precis som det borde vara. Affärsidén är enkel – mer till dig, mindre till banken. En idé som gett oss Sveriges nöjdaste sparare 15 år i rad.

title: Senior Data Engineer to ICA Bank
description:
Do you want to build and operate a modern, scalable data platform at the heart of bank and insurance business? At ICA Banken & ICA Försäkring, we are expanding our Cloud Data Platform team and are looking for a Senior Data Engineer to play a pivotalrole in shaping our data ecosystem!
   

  

 In this role, you will work end-to-end with production-grade data pipelines and data products that enable secure, reliable, and scalable access to data across the organisation—driving business decisions, regulatory reporting, and advanced analytics, including AI/ML use cases.
   

  

**About The Role**
 As a Senior Data Engineer, you will be part of the Data department within IT building a modern data platform on Google Cloud Platform (GCP). You will contribute to a target architecture based on Data Mesh principles, where data products are owned by domains and governed by design.
   

  

 Your main responsibilities include, among other things:
   

  

* Designing and evolving scalable batch and streaming data pipelines on GCP
* Developing and modelling large-scale analytical datasets in BigQuery with high performance and cost efficiency
* Implementing data contracts, transformation layers, and CI/CD pipelines using DBT, Terraform, and GitHub
* Embedding governance, security, and compliance by design across the data lifecycle


 You will be collaborating closely with engineers, architects, and business stakeholders to turn requirements into robust technical solutions
   

  

 You will also act as a senior technical contributor, sharing knowledge and helping to raise engineering standards across the team.
   

  

**Are you the one we are looking for?**
 We are looking for someone with strong hands-on experience as a Senior Data Engineer, preferably in cloud-native and regulated environments. You have:
   

  

* Proven experience building production-grade data pipelines on GCP (BigQuery, Dataflow, Pub/Sub)
* Strong experience with streaming architectures (Kafka or equivalent) and APIs
* Proficiency in Java and Python
* Solid data modelling skills and experience optimizing large-scale analytical workloads
* Hands-on experience with DBT, CI/CD, and modern engineering practices


 Experience with Data Mesh, data governance, or banking/financial services is considered a plus. English is required; Swedish is an advantage.
   

  

 We are looking for you who is analytical, structured, goal-oriented, passionate about data and driving positive change in the organization.  We hope you like structured problem solving and enjoy braking down complex problems. You have a mentoring mindset and can work effortlessly with different stakeholders and across teams to bring to explain technical concepts and align expectations.
   

  

**Why choose ICA**
 Every day is an exciting challenge at ICA Banken & ICA Försäkring. Why? Because our entire industry is changing – and that change brings exciting opportunities where traditional ways of working are challenged. This means we must constantly develop, for real, both as individuals and as a business. We combine innovation and digitalisation and, together, create smart and practical solutions that customers may not even know they need yet.
   

  

 Learn more about life at ICA Bank here.
   

  

**What happens next?**
 We welcome your application as soon as possible, as we are doing an ongoing selection.
   

  

 The last day to apply is 2026-05-21.
   

  

 For questions regarding the position, contact Raijo John, the recruiting manager, on 079 074 92 87. For questions regarding the recruitment process, please contact the responsible recruiter Bojana Mijocevic on 076 695 15 33.
   

  

 ICA aims to reflect our customers and society, and therefore strives to hire people with diverse backgrounds, skills, knowledge, and experience. We value good working conditions and aim for completely smoke-free workplaces. If required by the role, you will need to undergo assessments, background checks, and drug testing prior to employment.
   

  

 Read more about what it’s like to work at ICA.

title: Data Scientist, Merchant
description:
**About Wolt**
 At Wolt, we create technology that brings joy, simplicity and earnings to the neighborhoods of the world. In 2014 we started with delivery of restaurant food. Now we’re building the delivery of (almost) everything and you’ll find us in over 500 cities in 30 countries around the world. In 2022 we joined forces with DoorDash and together we keep on dreaming big and expanding across the globe.
   

  

 Working at Wolt isn’t always easy, but it’s definitely exciting. Here you’ll learn more, build more, and ship more than in most other companies. You’ll be challenged a lot, but also have a lot of fun on the way. So, if you’re a self-starter with drive and entrepreneurial spirit, this could be the ride of your life.
   

  

**About Merchant Group At Wolt**
 Wolt as a platform focuses on serving three main groups: customers, couriers, and merchants. In a nutshell, the Merchant Group strives to make Wolt an integral part of our Merchant’s daily business. Their core mission is to provide merchants with self-service tools and automation that are useful, efficient, reliable, and delightful to use.
   

  

**About The Merchant Analytics Team**
 Merchant Analytics is an embedded analytics function within the Merchant Group. The team works to unlock insights related to the marketplace and turn them into actionable recommendations that drive the success of merchants at Wolt. While keeping merchants at heart, the analytics team focuses on all kinds of analytics projects that can benefit merchants while ensuring a seamless consumer experience and also supporting Wolt’s marketplace strategy.
   

  

 What you’ll be doing
   

  

 Your role involves diving into our data to solve crucial business problems. The scope of this role ranges from diagnosing problem areas to identifying solutions to designing experiments and ultimately influencing decision-making. This is a rare, operational, and actionable data-driven experience. When you join this team, you will be driving action from the frontlines, rather than just doing yet another analytics role.
   

  

 Our humble expectations
   

  

* 3+ years of experience in an analytics or data science position
* Proficiency in SQL and Python/R, and AI IDE tools
* Hands-on experience in designing and analysing A/B testing, coupled with knowledge of quasi-experimental methodologies
* A strong grasp of core concepts and models for causal inference, enabling you to expose complex cause-and-effect relationships within data
* Prior experience building intuitive data visualizations and dashboards that influence business decisions, utilizing tools like Tableau, Mixpanel, Looker, or similar


 What we offer
   

  

* The online delivery platform that Wolt is building will offer you interesting and complex challenges together with the opportunities to create a big impact with your skills. Lots of geolocational and temporal data in real-time combined with differences in the economics and dynamics of the cities we operate in make Wolt both a challenging and so interesting company to practice analytics.
* You can choose the location from our tech hubs in Berlin, Helsinki, and Stockholm. You have the chance to decide the ways of working: a hybrid, at the office, or remote within the location above. 💙
* You would get to work in a company culture where we take ownership beyond the obvious, do common things uncommonly well, we think big but stay humble, do right by people, we treat others kindly and justly, recognize that if we don’t learn, we won’t stay still but fall behind and keep in mind that Luke was Yoda’s greatest achievement.


 Next steps
   

  

 The position will be filled as soon as we find the right person, so make sure to apply as soon as you realize you really, really want to join us!
   

  

 For any further questions about the position, you can turn to Senior Talent Acquisition Partner - Zhanna Filintseva via zhanna.filintseva@wolt.com
   

  

 Our Commitment to Diversity and Inclusion
   

  

 We’re committed to growing and empowering a more inclusive community within our company, industry, and cities. That’s why we hire and cultivate diverse teams of people from all backgrounds, experiences, and perspectives. We believe that true innovation happens when everyone has room at the table and the tools, resources, and opportunity to excel.

title: Manager Specialty Engineering
description:
MilDef, en global ledare inom ruggade IT-lösningar, expanderar sitt team i Stockholm (Rosersberg) och söker nu en engagerad ledare för vårt Specialty Engineering team och som som vill vara med och forma framtidens försvarssystem.
   

  

 Vi erbjuder en dynamisk och trevlig arbetsmiljö i helt nybyggda lokaler.
   

  

****Din nya utmaning****
 Som
 **Manager Specialty Engineering** 
 på MilDef får du en nyckelroll i att leda och utveckla vår Specialty Engineering-funktion. Du ansvarar för att säkerställa en effektiv tillämpning av Integrated Logistics Support (ILS), Technical Documentation, System Safety och Cyber Security i våra projekt. Rollen innebär både strategiskt och operativt ansvar, där du skapar struktur, metodik och förutsättningar för hög kvalitet i våra leveranser.
   

  

 Du arbetar nära projekt, produktutveckling och andra ingenjörsfunktioner för att säkerställa säkra, driftsäkra och väl dokumenterade systemlösningar. Med fokus på kompetensutveckling, samverkan och ständiga förbättringar bidrar du till att stärka MilDefs tekniska förmåga och långsiktiga konkurrenskraft.
   

  

****Huvudsakliga arbetsuppgifter****
* Leda och utveckla Specialty Engineering-teamet med ansvar för kompetens, kapacitet och framtida behov
* Etablera, förvalta och vidareutveckla processer och arbetssätt inom ILS, teknisk dokumentation, systemsäkerhet och IT-säkerhet
* Säkerställa att teamet efterlever relevanta standarder, regelverk och kundkrav
* Samordna specialty engineering-aktiviteter i projekt för att möjliggöra säkra och kvalitativa leveranser
* Driva metod- och arbetssättsutveckling för ökad kvalitet, effektivitet och enhetlighet
* Arbeta tvärfunktionellt för att integrera specialty engineering i projektgenomförande och produktutveckling
* Bidra till MilDefs övergripande affär och tekniska utveckling genom ett aktivt och närvarande ledarskap


****Det här bidrar du med****
* Flerårig erfarenhet av metod- och processutveckling inom ILS, teknisk dokumentation eller systemsäkerhet
* God förståelse för supportability-, tillförlitlighets- och säkerhetsprinciper i tekniska system
* Erfarenhet av att arbeta med standarder, regulatoriska krav och kundkrav i komplexa miljöer
* Dokumenterad ledarskapsförmåga
* Relevant ingenjörsutbildning eller motsvarande erfarenhet


****Lär känna oss****
 På MilDef blir du en del av ett företag som värdesätter praktiskt engagemang, gemenskap och utveckling av ledande försvarsteknik. Hos oss får du möjlighet att utveckla nya färdigheter, bidra i tvärfunktionella projekt och göra en konkret skillnad för vår fortsatta framgång. Vi uppmuntrar kontinuerligt lärande, samarbete, och erbjuder goda möjligheter till karriärutveckling. Vi är stolta över att aktivt främja hälsa och balans mellan arbete och privatliv. Det gör vi bland annat genom att erbjuda attraktiva förmåner samt hälsofrämjande initiativ.
   

  

 Vill du veta mer om MilDef, våra produkter och vår kultur? Läs mer här MilDef.com
   

  

 För mer information om rollen, vänligen kontakta Viktor Attoff, Head of Projects & Solutions, på viktor.attoff@mildef.com eller Norea Wiklund Mafi, HR.
   

  

**Viktig information**
 Vi genomför drogtester på alla våra framtida kollegor innan anställning.
   

  

 På grund av verksamhetens karaktär kräver våra uppdrag att du måste vara svensk medborgare och klarar vår säkerhetsprövning.
   

  

***MilDef - WE ARMOR IT.***
*MilDef is a global systems integrator and full-spectrum provider specializing in rugged IT for military, government and critical infrastructure sectors. MilDef provides hardware, software, and services that shield and protect critical information streams and systems, when and where the stakes are the highest. MilDef’s products are sold to more than 200 customers through companies in Sweden, Norway, Finland, Denmark, United Kingdom, Germany, Switzerland, the United States and Australia, and through partner networks in more than 40 countries. MilDef was founded in 1997 and is listed on Nasdaq Stockholm since 2021.*
**We kindly decline contact from advertising and recruitment sales.**

title: People Business Partner- Stores and Customer Service
description:
**Looking for a workplace for the future?**
 At Telenor, you own your career. Here, you’ll have the opportunity to make the most of your dreams and expertise while contributing to technological innovations that are barely even imagined today. Innovations that we know will change the map for how we communicate and live our connected lives in the future. Are you looking for a workplace where you can make a difference in what matters most – relationships between people? Then you are welcome to Telenor.
   

  

 We are now looking for
 **People Business Partner** 
 to join our
 **People** 
 team.
   

  

**How You’ll Make a Difference With Us**
 As a
 **People Business Partner** 
 , you will play a key role in shaping the people experience in some of our most customer‑facing parts of the business. Acting as the primary HR partner to our
 **Stores** 
 and inhouse
 **Customer Service** 
 , you will work close to the business in a broad, hands‑on role where your impact is visible every day.
   

  

 You support and challenge leaders in their day‑to‑day people agenda, while also bringing our long‑term people strategy to life where the customer experience is created. Beyond the annual HR processes, you partner closely with leaders to translate business priorities into actionable people plans – ensuring we build the right capabilities, leadership and culture to deliver outstanding customer experiences.
   

  

 In addition, you will take on the important role of process owner for Work Environment (arbetsmiljö) at Telenor Sweden. This means driving structure and quality through up‑to‑date policies, routines and governance, ensuring compliance across the organization. You will combine reporting and follow‑up with a strong coaching mindset, supporting leaders to understand their responsibilities and apply best practices in everyday work.
   

  

 This is a role for you who enjoy being close to business, making things happen and creating real value for both leaders, employees and customers.
   

  

**Are you the one we’re looking for?**
 We need someone who’s always on their toes! You have a genuine desire to learn and develop so we can continue to meet our customers’ ever-changing needs – today and tomorrow.
   

  

 You thrive in environments where customer focus, high pace and continuous change go hand in hand. You have the ability to operate both independently and collaboratively, and you bring strong stakeholder management skills. You build trust quickly and are confident in coaching, challenging and supporting leaders through everyday people topics as well as more complex challenges, while moving effortlessly between themes and priorities.
   

  

 For this role, we are looking for someone with:
   

  

* Experience in HR, including working as a People Business Partner for at least 5+ years
* Experience of working as a People Business Partner or equivalent in Retail or other distributed, customer‑facing organizations
* Experience leading union negotiations and are confident in Swedish labor law
* Experience supporting change, transformation and/or project‑driven organizations
* Experience from work environment (arbetsmiljö) governance or as process owner for work environment
* Strong communication skills in Swedish and English


**Apply today!**
 Will you take the next step in your career with us? We look forward to your application! We review applicants on an ongoing basis, so don’t wait—reach out today.
   

  

 If you have any questions or want to know more, feel free to contact the hiring manager
 **Olof Tydén** 
 at olof.tyden@telenor.se Please note that we cannot accept applications via email. Last application date is
 **May 10th** 
 .
   

  

**Our promise to you**
**We are better together.**
 Here, you’ll be part of a family-like and inclusive culture, built on strong shared values and leadership that empowers you with both trust and confidence. We believe in enabling each other to act and make decisions, while always having each other’s backs through ups and downs.
   

  

**We support relationships and societies.**
 Telenor plays a vital role in the society, giving your work a greater purpose. Every day, we create value for millions of people and maintain a customer-first approach where human relationships are at the heart of everything we do.
   

  

**We make room for life.**
 Work from home up to two days a week, if your role allows it. The rest of the time, we create magic together at the office. Leadership based on trust and flexible working hours helps you balance work and life. We support you through every stage of life with our benefit package, including collective agreements, occupational pensions, wellness allowances, and customized insurance solutions tailored to your needs.
   

  

**We invite you to a career in motion.**
 Your development is at the center of our culture. We dedicate at least 40 hours per year for you to deepen your expertise, explore new areas, and develop in your role. Through Telenor Academy and other learning initiatives, you’ll have the tools and freedom to advance your career. If you want to broaden your horizons, we are present throughout the Nordics.
   

  

**Good to know**
 As part of Telenor’s policy, we conduct background checks on final candidates for all recruitments.

title: Fintech Co-Founder / CEO (100 % remote) (m/f/d)
description:
We are looking to hire ambitious entrepreneurs to start and scale their own startups.
   

  

 We are serial entrepreneurs, for example Paul Müller (founder Adjust, €1.2B exit) and Petter Made (founder SumUp, €8B) who are eager to support outlier personalities and serial entrepreneurs to build €1B+ companies.
   

  

 Our offer:
   

  

* A salary while you build your startup as you will directly be employed by us. Alternatively, you can opt for up to €500k in funding.
* 1:1 sparring with unicorn founders on a weekly basis
* Community: Access to the top 0.1% of founders, peers and investors
* Team building: Hiring top notch talent supported through our network (over 50,000 professionals)
* Distribution: Support in reaching product-market-fit and building up a sales force / marketing machine
* Funding support for securing a multi-million euro funding round within 12 months (on average, EWOR Fellows raise > €2M after our Grand Pitch)


 One of our fellows set a record for Europe’s largest pre-seed round by a first-time founder, securing a €12M pre-seed investment.
   

  

**Tasks**
* You will own, build, and run your startup in fields such as Fintech
* You will embark on an extensive personal development journey crafted by unicorn founders and follow a fully customised programme enhancing your goal, time, and energy management
* You will receive support in hiring through our network to over 50,000 professionals and advice as well as best practices from serial entrepreneurs
* You will receive intensive coaching to make your startup ready to raise millions in funding
* You will iterate your product with us until having reached product-market-fit and receive support in building up a sales force or creating a marketing engine respectively


**Requirements**
* You are based in Europe or the Americas or open to relocate
* You are willing to take full responsibility for your own startup and scale it to €100M+ in revenues
* You have excellent communication skills in the English language


 Join us and build a €1B+ company with us!

title: Engagement Manager SMB
description:
**About Us**
 Legora is on a mission: to redefine how legal work gets done. From the very start we have been very clear about the fact that we are not building a solution for lawyers, we are building it with them, because it is the only way to make sure it gets done the right way; working side-by-side every step of the way.
   

  

 Our AI-native workspace empowers legal professionals not just to work faster - but to ask better questions, unlock new insights. Every day, we push the boundaries of legal tech to make complex processes smarter, faster, and more human. From thousands of documents analysed in minutes to intelligent workflows designed in collaboration with leading practices, we’re turning possibility into reality.
   

  

 Today we are trusted by global firms like Cleary Gottlieb, Goodwin, Bird & Bird and Linklaters in over 40 countries, but we have no plans on stopping here. We ship fast, we iterate effectively, and we scale rapidly - not by accident, but by design.
   

  

 When you join Legora, you become part of a team that believes "good enough" isn’t good enough and that the way to win is together, by empowering lawyers to do their best work with technology that truly understands them. If you’re excited by building from first principles, working with exceptional people, and accelerating change in a high-stakes, high-impact domain—then this is the moment and the place.
   

  

**We’re not just shaping the future of legal tech — we’re defining it. Ready to join us in building the intelligent future of law?**
**The role**
 Legora is scaling rapidly across EMEA, serving hundreds of small- and mid-sized law firms and corporate accounts. As our customer base in this segment is rapidly growing, we’re looking for a driven and commercially minded Engagement Manager to join our SMB post-sale team, managing a large number of accounts end-to-end and delivering consistent, high-quality outcomes at scale.
   

  

 As Engagement Manager, SMB, you will own a large portfolio of SMB accounts from onboarding through renewal and expansion, executing data-driven engagement playbooks with autonomy. You will lead platform demos, drive product adoption, and build meaningful customer discussions, all while collaborating closely with cross-functional teams and reporting progress and outcomes to Engagement leadership.
   

  

 You will be a valued member of Legora’s SMB engagement team and a hands-on contributor to how our SMB customers adopt, retain, and grow with the platform.
   

  

**What You Will Be Doing**
* Manage a large number of SMB customers end-to-end, driving onboarding, adoption, retention, and expansion with real commercial accountability.
* Execute account management playbooks with autonomy, using behavioral and usage data to inform segmentation, prioritization, and engagement activities that improve activation, retention, and growth.
* Lead platform demos and ongoing product training for customers at scale, creating effective feedback loops that surface actionable insights and drive continuous improvement.
* Leverage health scoring, engagement metrics, and operational dashboards to manage account outcomes in a predictable and measurable way.
* Lead renewal and expansion conversations with confidence, diagnosing customer needs and tailoring messaging to drive commercial outcomes across the portfolio.
* Collaborate cross-functionally with product, sales, and support teams, communicating status, progress, and outcomes to Engagement leadership to ensure insights inform broader strategy.
* Build and maintain meaningful relationships both vertically and horizontally across a large number of SMB accounts, leveraging enablement materials and self-serve resources to drive consistent product adoption at scale.
* Share insights and contribute to the ongoing evolution of the SMB Engagement playbook, helping refine best practices and scalable approaches across the team.


**Who You Are**
* Experienced in customer-facing or post-sale roles within B2B SaaS environments, ideally with exposure to legal, professional services, or similarly complex enterprise workflows.
* Comfortable executing processes and playbooks with autonomy, with an appreciation for how automation and scalable approaches drive efficiency.
* Comfortable with data and technology, skilled at defining metrics, using tools effectively, and operating from structured dashboards.
* Commercially minded with the ability to diagnose customer needs and tailor messaging to drive renewal and expansion, skilled at engaging stakeholders across multiple levels of seniority.
* Motivated by ownership and delivering measurable results, eager to grow within a high-impact team.
* Open to relocating to Stockholm or currently based there, with a desire for close, in-person collaboration in a high-performance office environment.


**What We Offer**
* The opportunity to join and grow within Legora’s SMB post-sale engagement team in EMEA.
* A role with real ownership of customer outcomes and visibility across product, go-to-market, and support functions.
* Collaboration with leadership and cross-functional teams to build systems that shape customer outcomes.
* A fast-paced, entrepreneurial environment where excellence is rewarded, and growth is exponential.
* Competitive compensation, meaningful equity participation, and a Stockholm office designed for focus and high performance.


**Legora is an Equal Opportunity Employer**
 At Legora, we believe great teams are built on diversity of thought and experience. We’re proud to be an equal opportunity employer and committed to creating an inclusive, high-performance culture where everyone can do their best work. We welcome people of all backgrounds and don’t discriminate based on race, color, religion, national origin, gender, gender identity or expression, sexual orientation, age, disability, veteran status, or any other characteristic protected by law.

title: Avtalscontroller/ Leverantörsansvarig IT
description:
**Till vår kund söker vi nu en avtalscontroller/leverantörsansvarig IT.** 




  





**Beskrivning av uppdraget:** 




 Uppdraget spänner över strategisk, taktisk och operativ nivå i tjänstestyrnings- och samverkansmodellen, där Driftpartner är klassad som en partnerskapsleverantör.
 



  





 Rollen ansvarar för att det strategiskt viktiga IT-avtalet med Driftpartner styrs så att det skapar maximalt värde för verksamheten över tid. Det innebär att:
 



  




* Säkerställa att leveransen motsvarar avtalad kvalitet, kostnad och säkerhet.
* Stötta och koordinera interna roller så att vi möter Driftpartner som en samlad, professionell beställare.
* Driva utveckling och förbättringar i samverkan med Driftpartner på strategisk, taktisk och operativ nivå.



  





  





**Huvudansvar:** 



* Förvalta avtalet med Driftpartner, inklusive bilagor, tjänstekataloger, SLA/KPI:er och pris-/volymmodeller.
* Tolka avtalsvillkor och säkerställa att de tillämpas konsekvent i verksamheten.
* Förbereda och ta fram förslag till avtalsändringar (nya tjänster, förändrade SLA, prisjusteringar, volymmodeller).
* Bevaka avtalsperiod, options- och uppsägningspunkter samt förbereda underlag för beslut om förlängning, ny upphandling eller avveckling.
* Samla in, kvalitetssäkra och analysera leverantörsrapporter (SLA, KPI, incident- och problemstatistik, ändrings- och releaseutfall).
* Göra aggregerad analys för hela avtalet samt per tjänsteområde (drift, servicedesk, arbetsplats, nät, lagring m.m.).
* Identifiera avvikelser och brister i leveransen och initiera åtgärdsplaner tillsammans med interna roller och Driftpartner.
* Följa upp åtgärdsplaner och säkerställa att överenskomna förbättringar genomförs.
* Samla in, kontrollera och analysera fakturor, volymer, rabatter och viten mot avtalade villkor.
* Identifiera fel, avvikelser och risker för över- eller underutnyttjande av avtalet.
* Ta fram finansiella uppföljningar (spend, kostnadsdrivare, besparingsutfall) som underlag till IT-ledning, ekonomi och verksamhet.
* Initiera och driva ekonomiska regleringar (viteskrav, krediteringar, prisjusteringar) tillsammans med ekonomi.
* Vara kontaktperson mot Driftpartner på taktisk och operativ nivå.
* Planera, leda eller samordna taktiska forum (kvartalsvis): aggregerad leverans- och ekonomiuppföljning, prioritering av större förbättrings- och utvecklingsinitiativ, avtalsfrågor.
* Stötta tex tjänsteansvariga och gruppchefer på operativ nivå i arbetet kring incidenter, fakturor, SLA, KPI uppföljning.
* Säkerställa att Driftpartner bidrar med omvärldsbevakning, innovationer och förbättringsförslag och att dessa kopplas till regionens mål och planer.
* I samverkan med strategisk nivå bidra till en långsiktigt värdeskapande relation med Driftpartner.
* Identifiera och konsolidera risker kopplade till Driftpartner-avtalet (försörjningsrisk, säkerhet, kapacitet, beroenden, efterlevnad av krav).
* Stödja juridik och IT-ledning vid oenigheter och tvister genom att:
* Ta fram dokumentation, historik och sakunderlag.
* Föreslå möjliga lösningar ur avtals- och leveransperspektiv.
* Ta fram sammanvägda lägesbilder och beslutsunderlag till strategiskt forum (CIO/IT-chef m.fl.):
* Leveranskvalitet, ekonomi, risker, efterlevnad.
* Behov av större avtalsändringar, förlängning/omförhandling, upphandling.
* Översätta övergripande mål och strategier till konkreta krav och prioriteringar i samverkan med Driftpartner och interna roller.



  





  





**Kompetens- och profilkrav:** 



* Erfarenhet av större IT-drift-/outsourcingavtal och leverantörsstyrning.
* Mycket god förmåga att förstå och tillämpa komplexa avtal.
* God finansiell förståelse (kostnadsmodeller, fakturagranskning, viten, regleringar).
* God förståelse för IT-tjänster inom drift, applikation, arbetsplats, nät och lagring.
* Stark kommunikativ förmåga, både skriftligt och muntligt, på svenska och engelska.
* Möjliggörande: kommunikation - Kommunicerar enkelt och tydligt med fokus på mottagarens förutsättningar och behov, samt krav på svenska i tal och skrift.
* Möjliggörande: samarbete - Van vid att samarbeta med personer med olika roller och kompetenser. Kommunikativ
* Strategiska: förändringsagent - Ett inlyssnande och coachande förhållningssätt för att skapa insikter hos andra och sig själv
* Drivande: relationsbyggande - Mycket god förmåga att dela med sig av kunskap. Ordningsam, strukturerad och kunna arbeta självständigt
* Drivande: initiativtagande - Ordningsam, strukturerad, självgående och drivande
* Strategiska: problemlösning - Lösningsfokuserad och analytisk
* Hög integritet då kunden arbetar med kritisk verksamhet och känslig information



  





**Obligatoriska krav:** 



* Du ska ha minst fem (5) års dokumenterad erfarenhet av arbete som avtalscontroller, contract manager, vendor manager eller motsvarande roll med ansvar för uppföljning och styrning av externa avtal.
* Du ska ha erfarenhet av minst två (2) uppdrag avseende förvaltning eller uppföljning av större (Avtalsvärde minst 100 MSEK) IT-drift-, outsourcing- eller infrastrukturtjänsteavtal.
* Du ska ha minst fem (5) års dokumenterad erfarenhet av fakturagranskning, pris- och volymkontroll, SLA/KPI-uppföljning samt hantering av avvikelser, viten eller krediteringar.
* Du ska ha minst fem (5) års erfarenhet av avtalsutveckling och leverantörsstyrning, inkluderande att driva avtalsändringar, förbättringsåtgärder, leverantörsdialoger samt ta fram beslutsunderlag till ledning.



  





**Mervärdeskrav:** 



* Du ska ha erfarenhet av minst fyra (4) uppdrag avseende förvaltning eller uppföljning av större (Avtalsvärde minst 100 MSEK) IT-drift-, outsourcing- eller infrastrukturtjänsteavtal.
* Du ska ha erfarenhet av minst två (2) uppdrag avseende förvaltning eller uppföljning av större (Avtalsvärde minst 250 MSEK) IT-drift-, outsourcing- eller infrastrukturtjänsteavtal.



  





  





**Placeringsort:** 
 Stockholm
 



**Omfattning:** 
 Heltid
 



**Start:** 
 2026-05-18
 



  





**Ansök senast 2026
 *-05-07***




***Urval av kandidater sker löpande och annonsen kan tas bort tidigare.***




  





  





**Om Agiremus:** 




 Sedan 2015 har vi hjälpt flertalet medarbetare att komma ut på arbetsmarknaden samt att nå sina karriärmål runtom i Sverige. Genom att skapa och bibehålla meningsfulla relationer med våra samarbetspartners kan vi presentera en bred rad av arbetsmarknadens mest attraktiva karriärmöjligheter för våra medarbetare och kandidater. Agiremus verkar inom de flesta branscherna, både inom privat och offentlig sektor.
 



  





 Vi erbjuder:
 



 Agiremus erbjuder dig som konsult en spännande och utmanande arbetsplats där du ges möjlighet att utvecklas inom din roll. Vi bryr oss om dig som och strävar efter långsiktiga samarbeten. Som konsult hos oss ges du, förutom spännande uppdrag, möjlighet att dela din resa med andra konsulter. Med jämna mellanrum anordnar vi tillfällen för er att träffas genom olika aktiviteter. Självklart kommer du även att ha en engagerad kontaktperson hos oss som finns där som bollplank och stöd. Vi erbjuder dig även goda personalförmåner som:
 



  




* Anställning med fast månadslön
* Semester enligt semesesterlagen
* Tjänstepension
* Heltäckande sjuk och olycksfallsförsäkring dygnet runt, årets alla dagar
* Friskvårdsbidrag m.m.



  





 Välkommen med din ansökan!

title: Senior Solution Architect / Deputy Domain Architect, Customer Lifecycle Management | SEB, Solna
description:
SEB is more than just a bank with an IT function. We are a progressive tech company powered by innovation and fueled by collaboration. In Business Enabler Solutions, architecture plays a key role in enabling long-term transformation across some of the bank’s most important capabilities.
   

  

 We are now looking for a Senior Solution Architect / Deputy Domain Architect to join the Customer Lifecycle Management area, with primary focus on Customer MDM and KYC Assessment.
   

  

**About The Role**
 In this role, you will help shape the target architecture for Customer Lifecycle Management in a landscape with high business impact, regulatory requirements, and complex dependencies across customer, compliance, payments, and core modernization.
   

  

 You will work with some of SEB’s most important architecture topics, including:
   

  

* Coexistence and transition between existing customer registry solutions and a target customer master data architecture.
* Scope and responsibility boundaries between Group, SEB AB, and subsidiaries.
* Controlled and licensed use of external data.
* Separation of facts, assessments, and suspicion.
* Architecture with clear accountability, ownership, and legal responsibility.
* Support for strategic initiatives such as core ledger renewal and the payments roadmap.
* Enabling a target state with multiple CRM solutions and a consistent customer view within SEB AB.
* Supporting group-level aggregation and reporting needs across Finance and Risk while maintaining clear legal-entity accountability and domain boundaries.


 You will collaborate closely with architects, product owners, business stakeholders, and engineering teams to:
   

  

* Define architectural direction and principles for the area.
* Support initiatives and deliveries with clear decision-making and structure.
* Drive clarity in complex cross-domain questions.
* Strengthen long-term architecture while supporting practical transition steps.
* Create alignment across stakeholders and teams.


 This role is about shaping direction and creating clear architectural guardrails for a critical domain.
   

  

 To thrive in this role, we believe you have
   

  

* Several years of experience working as a solution architect, domain architect, or enterprise architect.
* Strong ability to drive architecture in complex environments with many stakeholders and dependencies.
* Experience from areas such as customer lifecycle management, KYC, onboarding, master data, compliance, or core banking transformation.
* A solid understanding of domain boundaries, ownership, and accountability.
* The ability to balance long-term target architecture with pragmatic delivery needs.
* Strong communication skills and the ability to explain complex topics in a clear and credible way.
