This is a full-time consultant position in**Gothenburg** through Incluso. Start is in **May 2026, 24 months limited contract**to begin with. This role is 100% onsite in**Gothenburg.**


Please submit your CV as soon as possible since we will review the applications on an on-going basis.


For more information about this role, please contact **Kanika Singhal**recruiter at Incluso.

title: Visual Designer
description:
We are looking for a Visual Designer with a strong eye for detail and a solid understanding of retail design. Someone who can turn creative ideas into clear, functional and well-crafted visual executions across channels. If this sounds like the next step in your career, apply now!

**ABOUT THE ROLE**


As a Visual Designer at Fjällräven, you’ll be part of the Creative Operations team, working closely with global designers, copywriters and creative leads to bring cohesive brand experiences to life. Your focus will be on translating ideas into tangible, high-quality retail executions, both in physical spaces and across digital touchpoints. From seasonal campaigns to in-store storytelling, your work will bridge brand and commerce in a way that feels natural, functional and enduring.


This role is hands-on and collaborative. You’ll contribute to shaping creative ideas and follow them through to production, ensuring consistency and quality across all outputs. Working across own retail and wholesale environments, you’ll help create connected experiences that reflect Fjällräven’s identity and meet real business needs.


The position is based in Stockholm, Sweden and reports to the Global Visual Designer. This is a full-time temporary role for two years.

**WHAT YOU WILL DO**

*In more detail you will focus on the following:*

* Develop and execute creative ideas for retail marketing content for own retail and retail channels
* Translate seasonal campaign ideas into in-store and digital executions
* Create retail marketing materials such as window posters, signage, POS, shelf labelling and packaging
* Develop content for digital signage, floor stickers and other in-store communication formats
* Collaborate closely with Head of Wholesale, Visual Merchandising and Retail Concept teams to meet retail requirements
* Support creation of campaign guidelines and retail brand experience content
* Work hands-on with design and production from concept to final delivery
* Stay informed on best practices in retail storytelling, content and brand experience

**WHO YOU ARE**


We think you could be a great match for the position if you possess the following traits and capabilities:

* A degree in Visual Design, Graphic Design or equivalent practical experience
* 5+ years of experience working with retail marketing design, either in-house or at an agency
* Experience delivering cross-channel campaigns and brand experiences, ideally in outdoor, lifestyle, or sport industries
* Strong visual design skills with a sharp eye for detail and consistency
* Proficiency in tools such as Figma and Adobe Creative Cloud
* A solid understanding of retail design, visual merchandising and user-centered design principles
* A collaborative mindset and ease working across disciplines and teams
* Experience in photo editing, and video editing skills being nice-to-have
* Fluency in English; additional languages are a plus

**HOW TO APPLY**


Please submit your CV and portfolio through our application portal. The application deadline is 7th of May, and we review applications on an ongoing basis, so we encourage early submissions.


This is a full-time temporary position for two years based in our office in Solna. Our office policy allows for one work-from-home day per week; on the remaining days we work from the office.


We look forward to your application!

title: Data Scientist/Dataanalytiker
description:
Tullverket är en myndighet med enorma dataresurser och stora ambitioner att nyttja denna som en strategisk tillgång i vårt uppdrag att skapa ett tryggt och säkert samhälle.



För att säkerställa att vi nyttjar vår data på ett effektivt och värdeskapande sätt söker vi nu förstärkning i vårt Tullverksövergripande utvecklingsområde Data och analys. Vi söker dig som är en analytisk och nytänkande data scientist med stor passion för AI och avancerad analys som vill vara med och bygga upp och utveckla myndighetens förmåga inom området.



Utvecklingsområde Data och Analys bistår Tullverkets samtliga staber, avdelningar, utvecklings- och leveransområden med kunskap, kompetens och produkter inom datahantering och -analys, baserat på BI- och AI-teknik. Vi arbetar med förvaltning och innovation samt bedriver förutsättningsskapande utvecklingsarbete inom området. Arbetet utförs i agila team med tvärfunktionell kompetens (IT, juridik, säkerhet, dataanlytiker, verksamhetsexpertis etc.) som är verksamma i ett av utvecklingsområdets tre leveransområden; *Data – Styrning och tillgängliggörande, BI – Uppföljning och analys samt AI – Avancerad analys.*


**Om tjänsten**



Vill du vara med i arbetet med att utveckla en av Sveriges äldsta myndigheter och skapa förutsättningar för att ta Tullverket in i den datadrivna eran?



Som Data Scientist på Tullverket arbetar du både strategiskt och operativt med att identifiera, utveckla och implementera avancerad analys och automatiserade analysflöden med hjälp av moderna metoder och verktyg inom AI.



Du arbetar med att bygga upp och utforma myndighetens AI-förmåga för ökat värdeskapande genom att driva metodutveckling inom området utifrån ett verksamhetsperspektiv. Du ingår i ett agilt leveransteam inom leveransområde *AI – avancerad analys* där du tillsammans med bland annat ML-utvecklare och verksamhetsrepresentanter utvecklar, tillämpar och förvaltar lösningar som använder avancerad dataanalys och maskininlärning för att skapa nytta för myndigheten och dess intressenter. Härigenom bidrar du till Tullverkets digitala utveckling och effektivisering av befintlig verksamhet.



En central del av din tjänst kommer bestå av samverkan och omvärldsbevakning samt att ta del av relevant forskning inom området för att se hur det kan nyttjas praktiskt för att skapa nytta hos Tullverket. Du fungerar som expertstöd för Tullverkets samtliga verksamheter och projekt samt arbetar löpande med kompetensutveckling för såväl chefer som medarbetare.



I din tjänst kommer du vidare arbeta med det arkitektoniska arbetet som leveransområdet leder genom att ta fram och underhålla nya teknologier inom datahantering, analyslösningar och AI. Häri ligger också etiska överväganden samt arbete med dokumentation av våra AI-lösningar och dataskydd.



Vi söker dig som har relevant arbetslivserfarenhet inom machine learning, utveckling i Python och databearbetning. Vi ser gärna att du har erfarenhet av avancerade analyser av strukturerad och ostrukturerad data med bland annat statistiska modeller och nätverksanalyser. Inom det agila teamet för leveransområde AI utvecklar du till exempel bildanalysmodeller för scanning, textanalys av deklarationer, eller prediktiva modeller för riskbedömning.



Du kommer vara en del av ett strategiskt viktigt område som är under uppbyggnad och kommer kunna vara med och forma såväl din egen roll som våra arbetsprocesser och inriktning. Vi är i ett expansivt och spännande skede.


**Är du den vi söker?**



Vi söker dig som har:


* Eftergymnasial utbildning inom t.ex. datavetenskap, AI, statistik, matematik eller annan utbildning alternativt erfarenhet som arbetsgivaren bedömer som relevant för tjänsten
* Minst 2 års erfarenhet av att arbeta som Data Scientist eller i en liknande roll
* Gedigen kunskap i programmeringsspråk som Python eller R
* Förmåga att arbeta med databaser och använda SQL för att extrahera och bearbeta data
* Erfarenhet av att utveckla och implementera maskininlärningsmodeller
* Praktisk erfarenhet av deep learning-ramverk (t.ex. PyTorch, TenserFlow)
* Kunskap om NLP (Natural Language Processing)Kunskap av versionshantering (t.ex. Git)
* Kunskap om statistiska metoder, hypotesprövning och prediktiv analys
* Förmåga att uttrycka dig väl i tal och skrift på svenska och engelska
* Svenskt medborgarskap


**Det är meriterande om du har:**


* Erfarenhet av att arbeta med datahanteringsplattformar
* Kunskap om containerteknologier (t.ex. Docker)
* Erfarenhet av MLOps och att sätta ML-modeller i produktion
* Erfarenhet av generativ AI on-prem/cloud
* Erfarenhet av bildanalys
* Erfarenhet av att arbeta i regulatoriska miljöer med höga säkerhetskrav
* Tidigare erfarenhet från myndighet eller offentlig verksamhet
* Erfarenhet av agilt arbetssätt


**Personliga egenskaper**



Vi söker dig som är ansvarstagande med förmåga att driva processer framåt och säkerställa leveranser av hög kvalitet. Du är systematisk i ditt arbetssätt och har förmåga att ta initiativ, se möjligheter och sätta igång aktiviteter, samtidigt som du är lösningsfokuserad och nytänkande. Du är också nyfiken och vill förstå Tullverkets verksamhet, processer och ramverk för att kunna tillämpa dina kunskaper på bästa sätt så att de verkligen gör skillnad.



Det är viktigt att du har förmåga att se till helheten, kan identifiera och ta tillvara på synergieffekter för att nå gemensamma mål. Du är initiativtagande och självgående med ett stort driv att skapa värde baserat på din förmåga. Du är duktig på att kommunicera och förklara komplexa lösningar, analyser och resultat på ett enkelt och tydligt sätt för både uppdragsgivare och medarbetare utan specialistkunskap inom området.



Arbetet innebär många kontakter inom Tullverket vilket förutsätter att du som person är bra på att skapa goda relationer, kommunicera och förmedla budskap på ett tydligt sätt. Är du dessutom en prestigslös och respektfull lagspelare som drivs av att lösa utmaningar, då hoppas vi att du söker till oss!



För dig är Tullverkets värdegrund; Helhetssyn – Nytänkande - Ansvarstagande, något helt naturligt.



Vi lägger stor vikt vid personlig lämplighet!


**Vi erbjuder dig**



Genom att jobba på Tullverket har du ett viktigt jobb där du bidrar till ett tryggt och säkert samhälle. Vi värderar trivsel och kompetensutveckling högt och vi strävar efter att du som anställd hos oss ska kunna ha en bra balans mellan arbete och fritid. Hos oss får du såväl trygga anställningsvillkor och våra förmåner omfattar bland annat friskvårdsbidrag, subventionerade läkemedel och goda semester- och pensionsvillkor.


**Övrigt**



Referensnummer: TV-2026-09360.



Placeringsort: Stockholm, Göteborg, Malmö, Luleå, annan placeringsort (av Tullverkets befintliga) kan vara möjlig enligt ök.



Anställningen är en tillsvidareanställning och kan komma att inledas med 6 månaders provanställning och individuell lönesättning tillämpas.



Tillträdesdag: Snarast.



Vi ställer höga krav på våra medarbetares säkerhets- och sekretessmedvetenhet. Innan beslut om anställning kommer du att få genomgå drogtest och bakgrundskontroll. Säkerhetsprövning med registerkontroll enligt säkerhetsskyddslagen genomförs före anställning, då tjänsten är placerad i säkerhetsklass. Tullverket är en totalförsvarsmyndighet och vid anställning kan du komma att krigsplaceras i Tullverket.



Tullverket värdesätter de kvaliteter som tillförs verksamheten genom att ha en jämn könsfördelning samt etnisk mångfald.


**För mer information och ansökan**



Upplysningar om tjänsten kan lämnas av Johann Selles, 070-322 12 99 eller Veronica Nyberg, 076-696 38 42. För frågor om rekryteringsprocessen går det bra att ringa Tullverkets PA-support, 060-67 25 85. Fackliga företrädare är för OFR-P/TULL-KUST, Ulf G Persson, 040-661 33 21 eller Elisabeth Eriksson, 08-405 00 69 och för Saco-S, Katarina Hernhut, 08-456 52 65.



Din ansökan, med ett **medföljande personligt brev samt CV/meritförteckning**, ska ha inkommit till Tullverket **senast den 15 maj**. Samtliga handlingar ska vara på svenska. Du ansöker via det elektroniska ansökningsformuläret här nedan.



Vi undanber oss all kontakt med bemannings- och rekryteringsföretag samt försäljare av platsannonser.


*Tullverket är en statlig myndighet som kontrollerar flödet av varor över Sveriges gränser. Med visionen att bara godkända varor ska passera gränsen hindrar vi olagliga varor från att komma in i landet och bidrar till ett tryggare samhälle. Vi förenklar handeln med andra länder och lägger grunden till ökad tillväxt och konkurrens på lika villkor. Tullverket, som grundades 1636, har i dag cirka 2 700 anställda och leds av generaltulldirektör Johan Norrman.*

title: Critical Environment Technician
description:
**Overview**  

As a Critical Environment Technician (CET) in Microsoft’s Cloud Operations & Innovation (CO+I) team, you will maintain the critical infrastructure that keeps our Datacenters up and running. This could be anything from coordinating with supplier/vendors, recognizing safe versus unsafe work environment, having a hands-on understanding of how critical environment equipment works, performing various types of maintenance, responding to onsite incidents while coordinating with other critical facilities professionals, and using telemetry and other platforms to monitor equipment performance and operations.


Microsoft’s Cloud Operations & Innovation (CO+I) is the engine that powers our cloud services. As a CO+I Critical Environment Technician, you will perform a key role in delivering the core infrastructure and foundational technologies for Microsoft's online services including Bing, Office 365, Xbox, OneDrive, and the Microsoft Azure platform. As a group, CO+I is focused on the personal and professional development of all employees and offers training and opportunities including Career Rotation Programs, Diversity & Inclusion training and events, and professional certifications.


Our infrastructure is comprised of a large global portfolio of more than 200 datacenters in 32 countries and millions of servers. Our foundation is built upon and managed by a team of subject matter experts working to support services for more than 1 billion customers and 20 million businesses in over 90 countries worldwide.


With environmental sustainability and optimization at the forefront of our datacenter design and operations, we continue to grow and evolve as we meet the ever-changing business demands that hold Microsoft as a world-class cloud provider.


Microsoft’s mission is to empower every person and every organization on the planet to achieve more. As employees we come together with a growth mindset, innovate to empower others, and collaborate to realize our shared goals. Each day we build on our values of respect, integrity, and accountability to create a culture of inclusion where everyone can thrive at work and beyond.

 **Responsibilities** **Responsibilities:**

* Serve as an operations specialist in one major area of CE operations (e.g., electrical, mechanical, controls, generators) and works on advanced tasks independently.
* Inspect and supervise critical environment-related facility equipment (e.g., controls, heating, ventilation, and air conditioning [HVAC], mechanical systems), building, and grounds regularly for unsafe or abnormal conditions and escalate per applicable policies and standards.
* Utilize internal computerized maintenance management system (CMMS) to track all equipment assets and to complete work order requests for maintenance work.
* Safely and quickly respond to and lead onsite incident response teams for all abnormal conditions that impact operations, and coordinates with other critical facilities professionals to perform corrective repairs, without supervision.
* Enhance, develop new or follow preexisting emergency operating procedures (EOPs), methods of procedure (MOPs), and standard operating procedures (SOPs) in relation to CE operations and incidents.
* Under minimal oversight, perform various types of maintenance (e.g., planned, predictive, corrective) and repairs following methods of procedure (MOPs), and standard operating procedures (SOPs) for one or more types of equipment (e.g., electrical, mechanical, cooling systems), correct procedures.
* Have a hands-on understanding of how equipment works and how to troubleshoot equipment, systems, subsystems, and components independently within their trained discipline.
* Provides consultation to lower-level colleagues in troubleshooting systems and problems.
* Understands, follows, and ensures safety and security requirements (e.g., job hazard assessments [JHAs], environmental health and safety (EH&S), toolbox talks), and business processes and procedures to properly perform work in a safe, quality, and reliable within Microsoft requirements.
* Embody our culture and values

  

**Qualifications** **Required Qualifications:**

* High School Diploma, GED, or equivalent AND mission critical services work/applied learning experience (e.g., high availability assembly/manufacturing/critical infrastructure environments such as data centers, oil and gas refineries, hospitals, pharmaceutical, manufacturing, or related fields)
	+ OR equivalent experience.
* Ability to work shifts, including shift assignments during non-standard business hours that may include evening, nighttime, weekends, and/or holidays

**Background Check Requirements:**


Ability to meet Microsoft, customer and/or government security screening requirements are required for this role. These requirements include, but are not limited to the following specialized security screenings:

* Microsoft Cloud Background Check: This position will be required to pass the Microsoft Cloud background check upon hire/transfer and every two years thereafter.


While not required, we also look for the following **Preferred Qualifications****:**

* High School Diploma, GED, or equivalent AND mission critical services experience (e.g., high-availability assembly/manufacturing/critical infrastructure environments such as data centers, oil and gas refineries, hospitals, pharmaceutical, manufacturing, or related fields)
	+ OR Associate's Degree or technical trade certification (e.g., military, trade school), or higher-equivalent education AND mission-critical services experience (e.g., high-availability assembly/manufacturing/critical infrastructure environments such as data centers, oil and gas refineries, hospitals, pharmaceutical, manufacturing, or related fields)
	+ OR equivalent experience.

  

  

This position will be open for a minimum of 5 days, with applications accepted on an ongoing basis until the position is filled.

  

Microsoft is an equal opportunity employer. All qualified applicants will receive consideration for employment without regard to age, ancestry, citizenship, color, family or medical care leave, gender identity or expression, genetic information, immigration status, marital status, medical condition, national origin, physical or mental disability, political affiliation, protected veteran or military status, race, ethnicity, religion, sex (including pregnancy), sexual orientation, or any other characteristic protected by applicable local laws, regulations and ordinances. If you need assistance with religious accommodations and/or a reasonable accommodation due to a disability during the application process**.**

title: AWS Marketing Manager, Europe North, AWS, Europe North Marketing
description:
**DESCRIPTION**
---------------


Amazon Web Services Europe North (Nordics, Benelux and Baltics) is seeking a results-driven Account-Based Marketing (ABM) Manager to design and execute high-impact ABM programs for enterprise customers within a designated field territory. This role combines strategic thinking with hands-on execution to drive measurable business outcomes through targeted marketing initiatives.  

  

The Account-Based Marketing Manager will own the end-to-end execution of territory ABM programs, working backwards from customer needs to create data-driven, multi-channel campaigns that accelerate pipeline and revenue growth. This role requires strong project management skills, analytical capabilities, and the ability to influence cross-functional stakeholders.  

  

Key job responsibilities  

* Design and execute territory-specific ABM campaigns (1:1, 1:few) that align with global frameworks and drive measurable business impact
* Partner with sales teams to translate account priorities into effective marketing programs
* Analyze customer data, buying signals, and market trends to inform campaign strategy and optimization
* Execute multi-channel programs (events, digital, direct) that deliver personalized account experiences
* Partner with regional marketing teams to ensure ABM programs complement broader field marketing efforts
* Drive operational excellence through standardized processes, documentation, and best practices
* Track and report on program performance, using data to optimize and scale successful approaches
* Manage program budgets effectively, demonstrating frugality while maximizing impact
* Collaborate with global ABM community to share learnings and adopt proven practices

  

About the team  

Diverse Experiences
  

Amazon values diverse experiences. Even if you do not meet all of the preferred qualifications and skills listed in the job description, we encourage candidates to apply. If your career is just starting, hasn’t followed a traditional path, or includes alternative experiences, don’t let it stop you from applying.
  

  

Why AWS?  

Amazon Web Services (AWS) is the world’s most comprehensive and broadly adopted cloud platform. We pioneered cloud computing and never stopped innovating — that’s why customers from the most successful startups to Global 500 companies trust our robust suite of products and services to power their businesses.  

  

Work/Life Balance
  

We value work-life harmony. Achieving success at work should never come at the expense of sacrifices at home, which is why we strive for flexibility as part of our working culture. When we feel supported in the workplace and at home, there’s nothing we can’t achieve.
  

  

Inclusive Team Culture
  

AWS values curiosity and connection. Our employee-led and company-sponsored affinity groups promote inclusion and empower our people to take pride in what makes us unique. Our inclusion events foster stronger, more collaborative teams. Our continual innovation is fueled by the bold ideas, fresh perspectives, and passionate voices our teams bring to everything we do.  

  

Mentorship and Career Growth  

We’re continuously raising our performance bar as we strive to become Earth’s Best Employer. That’s why you’ll find endless knowledge-sharing, mentorship and other career-advancing resources here to help you develop into a better-rounded professional.
**BASIC QUALIFICATIONS**
------------------------

* 5+ years of professional marketing experience across campaigns, operations and programs, preferably in a BtoB environment.
* Experience with marketing technologies, martech stack, across marketing automation (Marketo), social media platforms, CRM (Salesforce.com), data analysis and reporting tools.
* Ability to juggle multiple priorities, roll up your sleeves and make things happen in a fast-paced, dynamic environment. This is a very operational role.
* Experience using data and metrics to drive improvements.
* Fluency in English is mandatory. Superior oral and written communication skills with an innate attention to detail.
* Bachelor’s degree in business, marketing, technology, or relevant field of study.


- - 5+ years of professional marketing experience across campaigns, operations and programs, preferably in a BtoB environment.  

- - Experience with marketing technologies, martech stack, across marketing automation (Marketo), social media platforms, CRM (Salesforce.com), data analysis and reporting tools.  

- - Ability to juggle multiple priorities, roll up your sleeves and make things happen in a fast-paced, dynamic environment. This is a very operational role.  

- - Experience using data and metrics to drive improvements.  

- - Fluency in English is mandatory. Superior oral and written communication skills with an innate attention to detail. Swedish is an extra plus.  

- - Bachelor’s degree in business, marketing, technology, or relevant field of study.**PREFERRED QUALIFICATIONS**
----------------------------

* Experience driving direction and alignment with large cross-functional teams and agency partners
* Experience designing and executing joint marketing plans with strategic alliance partners with global footprint
* Swedish language is an extra plus.

  

Amazon is an equal opportunities employer. We believe passionately that employing a diverse workforce is central to our success. We make recruiting decisions based on your experience and skills. We value your passion to discover, invent, simplify and build. Protecting your privacy and the security of your data is a longstanding top priority for Amazon. Please consult our Privacy Notice (https://www.amazon.jobs/en/privacy\_page) to know more about how we collect, use and transfer the personal data of our candidates.  

  

Our inclusive culture empowers Amazonians to deliver the best results for our customers. If you have a disability and need a workplace accommodation or adjustment during the application and hiring process, including support for the interview or onboarding process, please visit https://amazon.jobs/content/en/how-we-hire/accommodations for more information. If the country/region you’re applying in isn’t listed, please contact your Recruiting Partner.

title: Engineering Manager
description:
**At OMATEQ we specialize in providing highly skilled technology professionals to mid-sized companies with proprietary software.** Our clients trust us because we not only master software development but also bring leadership and product expertise grounded in deep technical understanding. Whether stepping in as a software developer, engineering manager, or interim CTO, we combine technical excellence with business awareness to set both long-term strategy as well as create immediate impact. With an average of 10 years of experience, we bring depth, reliability, and problem-solving ability to every engagement.We are now looking for a **Engineering Manager**to strengthen our team of experienced professionals. At OMATEQ, you’ll work in challenging and dynamic environments where your expertise meets innovation head-on. You’ll help our clients drive technology strategy, scale engineering organizations, and deliver impactful software – taking on roles such as **Engineering Manager or interim CTO.**

  

Who Are You?

  

* 7+ years of professional experience with a strong background in software development.
* Previous **people leadership experience** – you have managed teams and/or coached engineers with a formal personnel responsibility.
* Ability to move seamlessly between roles – from **hands-on technology leadership** to **strategic product and organizational management**.
* Solid experience in modern software engineering practices, cloud-native development, and scaling technical platforms.
* Strong communication and stakeholder management skills – able to bridge technology and business.
* Curious, pragmatic, and **prestigeless** – you see opportunities in both interim CTO assignments as well as impactful manager.
* A friendly mindset and a desire to be in an environment where what matters is how you treat people and what you deliver.
* Fluency in Swedish, both spoken and written.


The Environment

  

* Be part of a consulting company with a strong reputation for **craftsmanship and long-term expertise**.
* Collaborate with **senior colleagues** who share your interest in business development with technology as the main driver.
* Opportunity to **shape how we work** and influence the growth of OMATEQ’s tech management offering.
* Work on meaningful, cutting-edge projects in a variety of industries.
* Hybrid work model with flexibility and a purpose-driven culture.
* **Generous compensation** and full ownership of your professional journey.

title: Junior DevOps Engineer
description:
**About FirstVet** 




  





 FirstVet is the first truly digital veterinary clinic. We let pet owners meet with licensed veterinarians via their mobile or computer — and we don't stop there. We've expanded to include an e-commerce platform, offering a comprehensive solution for pet owners across 7 markets in Europe and North America. Our mission is simple: to make quality veterinary care accessible to every pet and pet owner, wherever they are.
 



 We're a tech-driven company at heart, and the engineering team plays a central role in how we deliver on that mission. If you're passionate about building reliable, scalable infrastructure and want to do it in a place where your work genuinely matters, we'd love to hear from you.
 



  





**The role** 




  





 In this role, you will support our product teams in maintaining and continuously improving the infrastructure that underpins our services. You'll be joining a small, two-person DevOps team — which means real ownership and broad exposure across everything we do. While the DevOps team is small, you'll work closely with engineers across our four product teams, so collaboration and communication are a big part of the role. We're in an exciting phase where the business continues to grow and scale internationally, while at the same time we're focused on maturing and hardening the technological foundation we've built. Our current focus is on operational excellence: strengthening our security posture and ensuring our infrastructure is as robust and reliable as it can be. Alongside the day-to-day, we'd love for you to bring your own perspective — identifying gaps and proactively driving improvements.
 



  





**Your responsibilities** 




  




* Help maintain and improve the infrastructure, tooling, and delivery pipelines that allow our product teams to develop and operate their services in an efficient and independent way
* Contribute to our ongoing security and compliance work, building infrastructure that conforms to industry best practices
* Develop and improve our CI/CD pipelines as well as other automation tasks
* Maintain and evolve our shared infrastructure component library, internal CLI tooling and AI platform
* Drive initiatives to improve our observability foundation, enabling teams to better understand and operate their services
* Proactively identify areas for improvement and take ownership of driving them forward
* Share best practices and spread knowledge to other members of the team



  





**The person we are looking for** 




  





 We are looking for a junior DevOps Engineer who is curious, collaborative, and genuinely excited about taking ownership. You don't need to have all the answers on day one — what matters more is that you're motivated to learn, you spot things that could be better, and you do something about them. You're comfortable supporting engineers across different teams and you understand the value of enabling others to work more independently. When you encounter a complex problem, you dig in, take ownership, and see it through to a solution.
 



  





**Desired qualifications** 




  




* Some hands-on experience with cloud infrastructure, ideally on AWS
* Familiarity with orchestration and containerization concepts such as Kubernetes, Docker, ECS or similar
* Experience with or exposure to CI/CD pipelines and an understanding of how they work
* Programming or scripting skills in a language such as TypeScript, Python, Bash or similar
* Experience with or a keen interest in infrastructure as code frameworks such as Terraform, Pulumi or similar
* A collaborative and communicative approach to working with engineers across teams
* Fluency in English, written and spoken



  





**What we offer** 




  





 At FirstVet, you'll be joining a team that genuinely cares about what it's building and how it builds it. We value collaboration, trust, and giving people the space to do their best work. This role comes with real ownership from day one and plenty of room to grow. We offer a highly flexible, hybrid remote work environment — work from our Stockholm office or remotely, it's up to you. And of course, it goes without saying that an interest in animals is highly desirable. We're a pet-oriented organisation and it's not unusual to run into our office dogs or for a cat to join our Hangout calls!

title: Solutions Architect
description:
**AddanEx JOB POSTING:**




**Title:** 
 Solutions Architect - KYC
 



**Location:** 
 Stockholm, Sweden (2-3 days onsite per week)
 



**Type:** 
 Contract
 



**Start Date** 
 : ASAP / May - June
 



**Duration:** 
 12 Months + extensions
 



**Utilisation:** 
 40 Hours per week
 



**Languages:** 
 English
 



  





**Job Summary / Key Skills:**




 You will define and drive a clear, future-ready architecture across topics such as:
 


* Transition between KURRE and GCM
* Ownership boundaries across group, parent entity, and subsidiaries
* Controlled use of external data
* Separation of verified data, assessments, and suspicion
* Accountability, decision ownership, and legal responsibility in architecture

 Working with architects, product owners, and engineering teams, you will:

 This role focuses on setting direction and establishing strong architectural guardrails, not just supporting individual solutions.
 



  





 Requirements

* Solid understanding of ownership, domain boundaries, and accountability
* Ability to balance long-term vision with pragmatic delivery
* Experience in regulated environments
* Strong communication and stakeholder management skills



  





 Please apply directly or send your CV to applications@addanex.com for further information!

title: Senior Solution Consultant
description:
We are in Business for People, empowering people in service organisations with innovative Enterprise and Business software solutions. We’ve innovated and taken a new approach to delivering ERP that works for people. Self-driving, adaptive and intuitive software that is changing the way people work. Our solutions empower individuals and teams and deliver a better people experience so people can spend time on meaningful high value work they live for.
   

  





 Read more on our website about how we transform work and how people feel about it, so our customers and their people can thrive.
   

  

  

  




**Job Description**

**Our role in Solution Consulting is to partner with our customers to understand their strategic business and financial challenges, and to clearly articulate how Unit4’s solutions enable measurable, value‑driven outcomes.**




 To shape the right solution, you will lead in‑depth discovery and value‑based discussions, gaining a deep understanding of customers’ financial, operational, and organizational priorities. You will challenge perspectives when needed and act as the customer’s voice throughout the sales process.
   

  





 You will engage as a trusted advisor to senior stakeholders, including CFOs and finance leadership teams, helping them connect business strategy, financial governance, and transformation goals to long‑term value creation.
   

  





 Working closely with Account Executives as a strategic counterpart, you will shape deal strategy, build compelling business cases, and clearly communicate the financial and operational impact of Unit4’s world‑class solutions.
   

  





 As part of a modern and evolving buying journey, you will contribute to executive‑level presentations, solution workshops, and value‑focused demonstrations, ensuring clarity, relevance, and impact at every stage.
   

  

  

  




**Qualifications**

 You are likely to succeed in this role if you:
   

  




* Bring a strong academic foundation in Economics, Industrial Engineering and Management, Industrial Economics, or a related field.
* Have several years of senior professional experience in roles such as Controller, Finance Manager, Financial Analyst, or similar, with deep exposure to financial governance, business processes, systems, and executive stakeholders.
* Are comfortable engaging in strategic, value-based conversations with senior decision-makers, including CFOs and finance leadership, and can translate complex business challenges into clear, outcome-driven solutions.
* Have experience leading high-impact solution workshops, executive presentations, and demonstrations, with a strong focus on business value and long-term customer success
* Are passionate about solutions and value creation, and act as a trusted partner to Account Executives, shaping deal strategy, challenging assumptions, and clearly articulating the value of Unit4’s world-class solutions.
* Work confidently both independently and collaboratively, taking ownership at a senior level while contributing to a broader, cross-functional go-to-market team.
* Communicate with impact and credibility, and speak fluent Swedish and English, both spoken and written.


**Additional Information**

 Join Unit4 and be part of one of the most exciting journeys in the cloud ERP software space. We’re a fast-paced, high-growth, people-centric company, delivering enterprise software for a great people experience, and offering our own people a host of benefits and development opportunities. Grow with us At Unit4, we offer:
   

  




* A culture built on trust - giving you freedom and autonomy to be successful.
* Balance - with our uncapped time off policy, remote working opportunities and Global Wellbeing Days when the whole company can switch off and prioritize well-being.
* Talented colleagues, role models and mentors - work, learn and be inspired by some of the best talent in the software industry.
* Commitment to sustainability - with initiatives such as our Act4Good program, a way for everyone at Unit4 to come together and engage in actions that benefit society and the planet.
* A safe and inclusive working environment – supported by our Employee Resource Groups, which are open to all and include Women at Unit4, Pride at Unit4, Mental Health and Access at Unit4, and People of Color at Unit4.

title: Security Engineer
description:
**About Us**
 Velory is transforming how companies buy, manage, and reuse IT. Our platform automates the entire IT lifecycle from procurement to end-of-life helping companies operate smarter and save both time and money.
   

  

 A core part of Velory is our network of IT retailers. They are not just partners they are essential to how we deliver value.
   

  

 Through Velory, customers purchase hardware via IT retailers, making them a critical part of our product and delivery. At the same time, retailers are a powerful growth engine. By reselling Velory as part of their offering, they bring new customers, new revenue, and help us scale across markets.
   

  

 We’ve already proven that this model works. Now, we’re scaling it across Europe.
   

  

 We’re looking for someone who wants to take ownership of that journey building strong relationships, driving initiatives forward, and creating long-term value together with our customers and partners.
   

  

****What You Will Do****
 Are you passionate about cybersecurity and eager to help build secure, scalable systems in a high-growth environment?
 **Velory** 
 is looking for a talented
 **Security Engineer** 
 to join our team in Stockholm.
   

  

****Who You Are****
 To excel in this role, you should embody Velory's core values and bring a creative, innovative spirit to our team:
   

  

* Show ownership: Look at the big picture and take the initiative to contribute where needed.
* Manage speed: Eliminate obstacles to maintain a high, sustainable pace.
* Represent quality: Aim high, sweat the details, and iterate.
* Earn trust: Be communicative, transparent, and follow through on commitments.
* Deliver wow: Go beyond expectations in a creative and unexpected way.


**Required Skills**
 To succeed at Velory, you embody our values and bring initiative, ownership, and creativity:
   

  

* Show ownership – See the bigger picture and step in where needed
* Manage speed – Remove blockers and maintain momentum
* Represent quality – Aim high, sweat the details, iterate fast
* Earn trust – Communicate openly and follow through
* Deliver wow – Go beyond expectations in impactful ways
* A relevant university degree or equivalent professional experience


 At least 5+ years proven experience in cybersecurity, security engineering, or IT security
   

  

* Strong understanding of network, cloud, endpoint and application security
* Experience with vulnerability management and security best practices
* Knowledge of IAM, MFA, access controls and zero-trust principles
* Familiarity with SIEM, EDR, logging, and incident response processes
* Fluent in English, written and spoken


****Nice to Have****
* Experience with AWS, Azure, or Google Cloud security
* Experience securing SaaS platforms and modern workplace environments
* Previous scale-up or startup experience


****What We Offer****
* A unique opportunity to grow and learn in a fast-paced scale-up environment.
* Hands-on experience in a fast-paced and innovative environment.
* A collaborative and inclusive work culture.
* Flexible work arrangements.
* Full time permanent employment, 40 hours per week
* Located in the vibrant city of Stockholm.


****This Is Velory****
 Velory enables companies to buy and manage their IT in an automated, secure and circular way.
   

  

* IT Lifecycle Management: streamlining IT workflows from purchase to end of life.
* Employee Empowerment: unleashing productivity from the first day to the last
* Velory is headquartered in Stockholm, Sweden.


****Join Us****
 At Velory, you’ll be more than just an intern – you'll be a key player in our mission to revolutionize the digital landscape. If you’re ready to bring your creativity, skills, and passion to our team, we’d love to hear from you!

title: ERP Consultant
description:
At
 **Arcwide** 
 , we are more than just a consultancy – we are a team driven by
 **commitment, teamwork, excellence, and passion** 
 . As the largest
 **IFS Partner globally** 
 , we deliver world-class IFS Cloud solutions that transform businesses, and we’re on a mission to continue setting the standard for excellence. We are currently searching for motivated and dedicated individuals who are ready to take that next step of their career.
   

  

**What You Can Expect From The Role**
* Deliver expert consultancy on IFS Cloud ERP implementations, with a focus on Supply Chain, Manufacturing or Finance modules.
* Work closely with clients to gather business requirements, map processes, and design effective ERP solutions tailored to their operational needs.
* Configure and customise IFS Cloud modules to meet functional specifications.
* Support clients through all phases of implementation: from discovery and design to testing, training, and go-live.
* Act as a trusted advisor to clients, providing insights and recommendations to optimise business performance through IFS solutions.
* Collaborate with cross-functional project teams, ensuring seamless integration between business processes and the ERP system.
* Contribute to internal knowledge sharing and continuously develop your expertise in IFS Cloud and industry best practices.
* Support post-implementation reviews and provide ongoing client support where required.


**What We Will Look For In Your CV**
* Proven experience in implementing or supporting IFS Cloud or similar ERP systems in a consultancy capacity.
* Deep knowledge and hands-on experience in ERP module areas Supply Chain, Manufacturing or Finance modules.
* Strong business process understanding and the ability to translate requirements into effective ERP configurations.
* Excellent communication and interpersonal skills, with the ability to build trust and influence stakeholders at all levels.
* Fluent in English (written and spoken).
* Strong analytical and problem-solving abilities, with attention to detail.
* Willingness to travel to customer site as required by project demands.
* Ability to work independently and as part of a collaborative team in a dynamic, fast-paced environment.


**Why You Will Enjoy Working At Arcwide**
* Competitive Salary - where you are rewarded for both your individual and company performance.
* Benefits Packages - you will also have access to excellent benefit packages including holidays, private healthcare insurance, pension contributions, wellness programmes, mobile phone and laptop, and much more!
* Hybrid working – where each team has autonomy to determine their in-person and remote working schedule.
* Continuous learning – we understand that it is imperative to invest in our people’s development and we ensure that you are always progressing in your career or learning development.
* Equal & inclusive culture – we are committed to having a diverse and inclusive workforce where each individual feels they belong and can thrive in a work environment with a strong sense of community.


**About Arcwide**
 As the demand for IFS Cloud consulting continues to grow worldwide, Arcwide strategically positions itself as the largest preferred IFS partner by combining the world-class business consultancy of BearingPoint with the best-in-class cloud technology and innovation of IFS, to implement digital business transformation globally, delivering more value, faster. Arcwide is an IFS Platinum Channel & Services Partner that offers a full range of services and support to their customers worldwide. Arwcide has more than 500+ professionals in 23 offices in 16 countries, who collectively have hundreds of years of IFS experience in delivering business and technology transformations. To learn more about our company, click here.
   

  

**Equality And Inclusion**
 Arcwide is an equal opportunities employer. We are committed to having a diverse and inclusive workforce where everyone feels they belong. Fostering a work environment with a strong sense of community and where everyone can thrive is a core pillar of our business. We are focused on attracting and retaining the best people with the right skills and the desire to deliver excellent results, regardless of background. In return, we will provide a working environment in which everyone feels valued and can fulfil their potential, where their talents are fully utilised and company goals are met. We celebrate the strength that comes from our similarities and our differences through local initiatives which promote inclusion, outreach, and respect.

title: Solution Architect – Finance & Accounting
description:
**Job Description**

 H&M Group is on a journey to meet and exceed our customers’ expectations today and tomorrow. Through collaboration, innovation, and technology, we challenge ourselves and the industry. Our tech organisation delivers solutions across the entire value chain for all our brands – from product creation to logistics and sales, both in store and online. Finance is a key enabler in this transformation. We are now looking for a
 **Solution Architect within Finance & Accounting** 
 who wants to help shape scalable, compliant, and futureproof financial solutions in a global retail context.
   

  





 As
 **Solution Architect – Finance & Accounting** 
 , you are responsible for the solution architecture supporting Finance Accounting and Tax across H&M Group’s global operations. You work closely with Finance & Accounting Business and Tech colleagues to ensure that financial transactions are correctly reflected, compliant, and scalable. The role combines
 **hands on architectural work** 
 with
 **advisory responsibility** 
 . You both design solutions and act as a trusted advisor, guiding teams and stakeholders toward the target architecture while ensuring alignment with enterprise standards, security, and data governance. You are part of a broader Solution Architect community and contribute to shared standards, patterns, and ways of working.
   

  





  

  





**WHAT YOU’LL DO:**




 As a Solution Architect within Finance & Accounting, you will
 **both perform and advise** 
 across the solution lifecycle:
   

  




* Design and advise on solution architecture aligned with finance strategy, business goals, and regulatory requirements.
* Translate business and technical needs into clear architectural designs and decision support for teams and stakeholders.
* Design, validate, and advise on accurate endtoend financial flows across:
	+ Sales (all channels)
	+ Procurement and sourcing
	+ Warehousing and supply chain
* Design integrations and advise on best architectural choices between accounting solutions
* Analyse existing solutions, identify gaps, risks, and technical debt, and both drive and recommend improvements toward the target state.
* Ensure and advise on compliance with accounting standards, tax regulations, data privacy, and security requirements.
* Apply holistic thinking to identify interdependencies across teams and initiatives.
* Create and maintain solution roadmaps and transition architectures, and guide teams in their implementation.
* Provide architectural guidance, coaching, and advisory support to delivery teams and stakeholders.
* Contribute to architecture standards, patterns, and best practices within the Architecture Community.
* Support and advise in technology evaluation and selection to ensure alignment with enterprise architecture.



  

  





**WHO YOU’RE:**




 You are a collaborative and structured architect who can bridge business and technology. You are comfortable in complex, global environments and can explain architecture in a clear and pragmatic way.
   

  





 You bring:
   

  




* Experience as a
 **Solution Architect** 
 , within
 **Finance, Accounting, or closely related domains.**
* Solid understanding of
 **accounting principles** 
 ,
 **financial reporting** 
 , and
 **tax related processes** 
 .
* Experience working with
 **SAP** 
 and/or other finance and accounting systems.
* Understanding of how business operations impact accounting outcomes.
* Ability to translate complex business flows into clear solution designs and architecture artefacts.
* Experience from largescale agile organisations.
* Strong communication and stakeholder management skills.
* Experience from retail, ecommerce, or global organisations is an advantage.
* Exposure to cloud platforms, data, or automation within finance is a plus.



 Education & background
   

  




* Bachelor’s degree in Computer Science, Engineering, or a related field – or equivalent practical experience.
* Experience documenting and communicating architecture across business, process, information, application, and technology perspectives.



  

  





**Ways of Working & Behaviours**




 Our values guide how we work. In this role, we especially value:
   

  




* **Holistic thinking** 
 – seeing the bigger picture across business and technology.
* **Ownership and commitment** 
 – taking responsibility for architecture quality.
* **Curiosity** 
 – interest in both finance and technology, and continuous learning.
* **Communication** 
 – explaining complex topics in a clear and inclusive way.
* **Collaboration** 
 – working closely with business, tech, and partners.


**Additional Information**

***Please note***
 : As our culture and teamwork are very important to us, four days (80%) per week of in-office presence in our office are required.
   

  





 This is a full-time position with placement in
 **Stockholm** 
 .
   

  





  

  





**WHO WE ARE:**
  

 Shaping the future of fashion with people, data, and tech. The fashion and retail industries are going through a transformation, driven by customers' technology and sustainability expectations. At H&M Group, we want to shape the future of fashion and lifestyle by harnessing the power of smart tech and data. With our 74-year history of innovation, we understand the need to collaborate and co-create with engineers and tech specialists around the world to achieve our vision.
   

  





  

  





**WHAT WE OFFER!** 
  

  

 You are joining a unique value-driven culture, a large tech network and community where you can be yourself. Besides the obvious perks such as staff discount card, flexible work life, learning communities, wellness benefits, parental benefits etc. There are endless opportunities to experiment and grow in any direction that you want, and when you grow, we grow. Being a major player gives us countless opportunities to make a real impact and shape the future.

title: Kommunikationsansvarig till Kunskapsskolan
description:
Kunskapsskolan i Sverige, där även Kunskapsgymnasiet ingår, startade sina första skolor år 2000 och har idag 29 grundskolor och sex gymnasier med 1 350 medarbetare och 14 400 elever. Kunskapsskolan ägs av grundaren Peje Emilsson med familj.
   

  





 På Kunskapsskolans grund- och gymnasieskolor arbetar vi för att varje elev ska nå så långt som möjligt. I en miljö där varje elev får rätt stöd och utmaningar skapar vi en skola där både elever och medarbetare trivs och utvecklas. På Kunskapsskolans huvudkontor arbetar vi mycket nära skolorna för att stötta dem i det viktiga arbete de gör varje dag.
   

  





 Kunskapsskolans huvudkontor söker Kommunikationsansvarig för grundskolan
   

  





 Vi på Kunskapsskolans kommunikationsavdelning söker en social och nyfiken kollega, som älskar att arbeta kreativt i ett litet team. Kommunikationsavdelningen består av sex medarbetare och i denna roll är du en av två kommunikationsansvariga, som samarbetar tätt med kommunikationsansvarig för gymnasiet och de övriga medarbetarna i teamet. Du rapporterar till kommunikationschefen. 
   

  





 Du kommer att utveckla och driva Kunskapsskolans contentstrategier för grundskolan, i linje med vårt varumärke. Ditt dagliga arbete innebär att du skapar engagerande innehåll (text, bild och enklare video) anpassat för olika plattformar. Du ansvarar för övergripande planering, leder vårt regelbundna contentmöte och följer upp insatser. Vidare hanterar du betald annonsering via kampanjer i Google Ads och Meta Business Suite och jobbar med SEO och löpande publicering på webbplatsen. Du har även ett ansvar för publicering, moderering, sponsring och tillväxt i sociala kanaler. I rollen ingår också att koordinera med interna intressenter, hålla i vårt interna some-nätverk och arbeta med andra utbildande insatser tillsammans med kollegorna på avdelningen. 
   

  





 Profilen vi söker:
   

  





 Vi söker dig som är social och nyfiken, och som stortrivs med kreativt samarbete i ett litet team där alla bidrar och hjälps åt. Du är självgående och ansvarstagande, med förmåga att planera och prioritera ditt arbete i samverkan med andra. Du är lyhörd och trivs med många kontaktytor. 
   

  





 Kvalifikationer och erfarenhet:
 


* Eftergymnasial utbildning inom företrädesvis kommunikation.
* Några års arbetserfarenhet inom kommunikation, gärna i en koordinerande eller ansvarig roll.
* Är en skicklig och kreativ contentproducent som älskar det operativa hantverket i att skriva, fota eller filma, med känsla för språk och tonalitet och en förmåga att bygga berättelse kring våra skolor.
* Van vid att arbeta i CMS-verktyg, sociala medier och verktyg som t.ex. Canva eller Adobe Creative Cloud.
* God kunskap om Google Ads och Meta Business.
* God kunskap om SEO, digital synlighet och optimering.
* Är väl bekant med AI-verktyg och använder dem naturligt för att snabba upp produktion.



 Tjänstens utformning och placering
   

  





 Tjänsten är en tillsvidaretjänst på heltid med sex månaders provanställning. Tillträde sker från den 10 augusti eller efter överenskommelse.
   

  





 Din arbetsplats är på Kunskapsskolans huvudkontor på Medborgarplatsen i Stockholm, där vi tillämpar hybridmodell med möjlighet att jobba hemifrån ett par dagar i veckan.  
   

  





 Rekryteringsprocessen 
   

  





 Ansökan sker via länken nedan senast den 18 maj 2026. Urval sker löpande. 
   

  





 För att arbeta i skola krävs utdrag ur belastningsregistret. 
   

  





 Vid frågor, kontakta kommunikationschef Eleonor Otterdahl, på eleonor.otterdahl@kunskapsskolan.se.
   

  





  

  

  





 Mer information om oss hittar du på vår hemsida, kunskapsskolan.se / kunskapsgymnasiet.se

title: Technical Co-Founder and Product Builder
description:
**Tech Co-Founder & Product Builder – Emplifier** 




  





**Build the future of AI-driven hiring with us** 




  





 At Emplifier, we are rethinking how companies hire, moving beyond CVs and towards data-driven, human-centric matching. Emplifier is an AI-based recruiting company combining an AI-driven platform that matches candidates based on capabilities and personality with human expertise. Our goal is simple: to help companies hire co-workers who fit the role and thrive in the company culture while reducing time-to-hire. We are now looking for a Tech Co-Founder & Product Builder to take ownership of our product and introduce new features at a rapid pace in order to scale Emplifier.
 



  





**About the role** 




 We launched the MVP in 2025 and have gained traction with satisfied customers. The next step is to scale faster and introduce new features at a rapid pace. This is a role for someone who wants to build features from scratch, be part of a fast-moving startup, and, as a co-founder, be part of strategic decision-making.
 



  





**In close collaboration with the rest of the team you will:** 



* Own the technical architecture, development, and roadmap
* Keep up to date with the cutting edge of AI and software development, proposing new solutions
* Build and scale the platform introducing new features on a continuous basis, using AI in all processes for high efficiency.
* Work closely with the team to translate user stories into product features
* Design and implement AI agents for matching, interaction, and decision support, and more
* Set up data architecture, integrating external and internal data,, and developing predictive models used in processes
* Implement solutions in compliance with regulatory and security requirements
* Be part of the management team and contribute to strategy, business decisions, and tactics



  
 



**Key requirements and nice to haves** 



* Has 3+ years of experience as a full-stack developer
* Is “AI-native,” with a track record of building AI agents with real value
* Has been part of development of SaaS solutions
* Has experience/training in predictive analytics and data-driven models
* Is comfortable using tools like Claude to structure and build software
* Has an educational background equivalent to MSc in Engineering, Computer Science, or similar
* Has proven strong skills in problem-solving and decision-making
* Has an interest in business drivers and processes
* Speaks and understands English and Swedish fluently



  





**Why Emplifier?** 




 Opportunity to become a co-founder and shape the company in a scale-up phase. Be part of reshaping the talent market, assisting companies to form strong teams, and enabling candidates to be evaluated based on their skills and motivation rather than CVs. Work at the intersection of AI, data, and human decision-making. Collaborate with a team with deep industry experience in recruitment. As a technical co-founder, you will be offered shares in the company.
 



  





**Please apply with the link below:** 




  





  https://app.emplifier.ai/candidate/job/emplifier-18/tech-co-founder-and-product-builder-1
 



  





 For questions please contact hellen@emplifier.ai

title: Senior Software Engineer
description:
I'm working with one of Europe's most exciting startups whose product is a world first!
 



  





 Having launched in Sweden and multiple European markets with huge success, accruing over 150,000 customers and securing over €30 million of investment along the way, they are in a fantastic position to continually develop their cutting-edge product & further increase scalability, whilst further leveraging AI & LLMs to optimize their comprehensive applications!
 



  





  





  





 Headquartered in Stockholm, they have a super collaborative & fluent tech team, as they are growing, they are looking to bring in a lead software engineer as they build a new team focused on the core engineering geared towards scalability, security, infrastructure and robustness!
 



  





 This is a permanent role, based out of the Stockholm HQ (hybrid)
 



  





**About the Role** 




  





 Build and enhance a genuinely meaningful product with endless opportunity, you'll work on a diverse range of software engineering challenges, building and optimizing features of the product, as-well-as ensuring a robust, scalable and secure application & infrastructure.
 



  





 You'll work closely with the CTO, head of product, and other senior engineers in a fluid environment, with huge scope to play a key part in this companies endless growth trajectory, as they expand into new markets, develop new features and drive technical innovation!
 



  





**Tech Stack:** 




  




* TypeScript/Javascript; Node JS, React, React Native, GraphQL
* AWS, Terraform, DynamoDB, MongoDB, NoSQL, Contentful



  





**Qualifications:** 




  




* 7+ years of experience as a backend-focused software engineer
* 5+ Years Typescript/Javascript
* Extensive experience within AWS Cloud, Terraform, MongoDB, DynamoDB, SQL
* Solid understanding on how to build scalable & robust applications and infrastructure
* Fluent in English (spoken & written)
* Passion for building a meaningful product as part of a super collaborative, kind and high-performing team!



  





 If this is of interest, please apply through the ad, or reach out to me directly for an informal chat!
 



  





 l.healy@tenthrevolution.com

title: Acne Studios Global Digital Commerce Director
description:
Acne Studios is a progressive luxury house and through collaboration and curiosity, we set high aspirations and strive for excellence. We value everyone's contribution and embrace feedback to develop ourselves and others. We aim to minimise our environmental impact across all our operations and to address societal challenges in the way we conduct our business.
   

  

 As Global Digital Commerce Director at our Stockholm office, you will shape and lead Acne Studios' global digital commerce agenda at a critical stage of our growth. This is a senior, high-impact leadership role with global scope, responsible for accelerating revenue, elevating the digital customer experience, and strengthening our omnichannel ecosystem.
   

  

 You will own the global e‑commerce and marketplace business end to end. You will operate at the intersection of brand, culture, technology, and commerce. Always ensuring our digital presence is premium, relevant and unmistakably Acne Studios. You will succeed by navigating a complex organisation, balancing priorities across multiple HQ stakeholders, and partnering closely with regional teams to drive alignment and commercial impact.
   

  

 CULTURE OF COLLABORATION
   

  

 We firmly believe that when you feel supported, included, and trusted, it enables you to enjoy your work and thrive in it. You will be a part of a team of colleagues with diverse roles and backgrounds, each with their unique skills and experiences.
   

  

**What You Will Do**
 As Global Digital Commerce Director, your main contribution will be to set the long‑term vision and lead the evolution of Acne Studios' global digital commerce and marketplace business, positioning it as a key growth engine and a benchmark for luxury digital experiences. Reporting to the Chief Customer Officer, you will play a vital role in accelerating global revenue growth, strengthening omnichannel excellence, and future‑proofing our digital capabilities by:
   

  

* Defining and leading a global e‑commerce and marketplace strategy that accelerates growth, scalability and long‑term value creation
* Owning the global e‑commerce P&L with full accountability for revenue growth, profitability and commercial performance
* Driving step‑change improvements in UX, site performance, content, and campaigns through advanced analytics, experimentation and customer insight
* Shaping a demand‑led, curated online assortment in close partnership with Buying and Merchandising to maximise relevance and conversion
* Leading performance marketing, CRM, and social commerce to significantly grow customer acquisition, loyalty and lifetime value at scale
* Orchestrating a seamless, premium, and brand‑defining omnichannel customer journey across all digital and physical touchpoints
* Building and deepening strategic partnerships across platforms, technology providers and global marketplaces to expand reach and capability
* Leading, inspiring and scaling a high‑performing global digital commerce organisation with strong commercial and creative capability
* Driving alignment, clarity and momentum across HQ functions and regions within a complex matrix organisation


**Who You Are**
 You have high aspirations and focus on details that create substantial impact. You enjoy working as a team and you embrace feedback to develop yourself and others. You are curious and thrive in a dynamic environment. Cooperation, respect, and clear communication are important, along with your ambition to learn and grow. If these qualities speak to you, we would love to have you on our team.
   

  

**Specific Personal Qualities For This Role**
* You are a commercially driven, culturally fluent leader with strong strategic judgement and executional strength
* You thrive in fast-paced, international environments and are skilled at aligning diverse stakeholders around shared goals
* You bring a deep interest in pop culture, digital trends, and contemporary media, and understand how culture shapes brand relevance and consumer behaviour in luxury


**Specific Experience And Knowledge For This Role**
* Bachelor's degree in Business, Economics, Marketing, Digital Commerce, or a related field is required
* Master's degree or MBA in strategy, digital business, or international management (strongly preferred)
* 8+ years' senior leadership experience in e‑commerce, ideally within luxury or premium consumer brands
* Proven experience operating in complex, global organisations with multiple HQ stakeholders and regional markets
* Strong understanding of omnichannel commerce, luxury consumer behaviour, and global e‑commerce dynamics
* Solid track record in digital marketing, CRM, and performance-led growth
* Experience with platforms such as Salesforce Commerce Cloud, BI tools, PIM, and OMS
* Fluent in English


 What matters most to us is not whether you master all the listed knowledge and skills. We are dedicated to recognising the potential in each individual. We embrace diversity of people as well as ideas and viewpoints and encourage everyone's individual expression of their own identity.
   

  

 A background check will be conducted on the final candidate as part of our standard recruitment process.

title: Software Architect / AI Architect
description:
**TL;DR —** 
*We need one person to own how A.Engineer is built in the future. The architecture, security, and interoperability, from publicly available free tier to enterprise deployments.* 




  





**ABOUT A.ENGINEER** 





 A.Engineer is an agentic AI platform that automates the manual work of structural and civil engineering. In contrast to many AI solutions, A.Engineer does not give answers, it does the job. Calculations, fully automated agentic workflows, and report generation, inside a single intelligent workspace. Engineers work faster without sacrificing control: every AI step is fully auditable, and every output is verified by a professional engineer.
 





 We are a start-up born inside Tyréns Group's innovation programme Tyréns NEXT, combining the resources and domain depth of one of Europe's leading engineering consultancies with the speed and ambition of a founding team. We launched across Europe in late 2025 and are now aiming to scale the business globally.
 





 Research shows that 40–80% of engineering work is still manual. A.Engineer will change that.
 




  






 www.a.engineer
 




  
 



**THE OPPORTUNITY** 





 This is the defining technical role at A.Engineer. You will design and own the architecture of a platform that serves individual engineers for free, professionals on a credit card subscription, and large enterprise clients simultaneously. You make the decisions that determine how we scale, how we secure sensitive engineering data, and how we integrate with the tools the industry already relies on. There is no one else to delegate this to, it is yours.
 




  





**WHAT YOU'LL DO** 



* Own the end-to-end technical architecture — data layer, APIs, and front-end delivery — across consumer (free), professional (pro), and enterprise tiers.
* Make the calls on security posture: data residency, multi-tenancy, RBAC, and compliance with enterprise requirements (such as GDPR, ISO 27001, SOC 2).
* Define interoperability standards: how A.Engineer talks to 3rd party engineering systems and data within the wider AEC ecosystem.
* Set engineering culture: code review standards, documentation practices, and the technical bar as the team grows.
* Collaborate with development team to ensure the architecture enables both fast iteration today and reliable scale tomorrow.



  





**WHAT WE'RE LOOKING FOR** 



* 7+ years of full-stack engineering, with real experience designing systems that handle enterprise-grade load and compliance requirements.
* Entrepreneurial mindset and skillset with strong ability to execute.
* You love programming with modern AI driven methods and are not afraid to get. hands on whatever comes across during our journey.
* Deep familiarity with cloud infrastructure (AWS, Azure, or GCP), microservices, and API design patterns.
* Proven track record building and securing products that handle sensitive professional data.
* Experience with tiered access models: you have shipped freemium-to-enterprise products before.
* Strong opinions on what good architecture looks like, and the humility to know when you're wrong.
* Bonus: background in AEC, construction tech, or another regulated professional services domain.



  





**WHAT WE OFFER** 



* Genuine core team status. You set the future technical direction, not implement someone else's.
* The backing of Tyréns Group: deep engineering domain expertise, and established network in the AEC sector.
* A product that is already live and used by professional engineers. You're building on something real and impactful from day one.
* Hybrid working from Stockholm, flexible hours, and a flat team with no bureaucratic friction.



  





**HOW WE HIRE** 



* **1. Apply** 

  Apply here or send your CV + a short note on why this role fits you to aengineer@tyrens.se
* **2. Intro call** 

  30-45 min with the venture lead: we want to understand what drives you.
* **3. Skills & Culture interview** 

  A focused conversation on your craft and how you approach hard problems.
* **4. Offer** 

  Fast decisions. We respect your time.



  





*We review applications on a rolling basis and if moving forward we are aiming to respond within 2 business days.* 




  





 ...
 



 About Tyréns NEXT
 



*A.Engineer is a product developed and owned by Tyréns Group, one of Europe’s leading engineering consultancies with more than 3000 employees. Tyréns NEXT is the innovation and digital development arm of the Tyréns Group. Tyréns NEXT combines advanced technology with sustainable design thinking and develops next generation tools that support a smarter and more resilient built environment.* 




  





*Tyréns Group is an Equal Opportunity Employer* 




*At Tyréns Group, we believe great teams are built on diversity of thought and experience. We’re proud to be an equal opportunity employer and committed to creating an inclusive, high-performance culture where everyone can do their best work. We welcome people of all backgrounds and don’t discriminate based on race, color, religion, national origin, gender, gender identity or expression, sexual orientation, age, disability, veteran status, or any other characteristic protected by law* 
 .

title: Senior AI/Python Developer
description:
***Location***
*: Can be in Stockholm or Helsinki* 




  





**The company** 




 Netigate is an international SaaS company helping organisations make sense of their employee and customer feedback. For nearly two decades they have been building experience management tooling — surveys, analytics, and insights — for companies across Europe. Today the company employs 130+ people with offices in Stockholm, Helsinki, Rotterdam, Frankfurt, and Warsaw.
 



  





 Over the past year Netigate has made a deliberate shift: they are transforming from a survey and reporting platform into an AI-driven insights engine. The ambition is clear: they want to be at the cutting edge of how feedback data is collected, processed, and turned into actionable intelligence.
 



  





**The role at a glance** 




 Netigate is looking for someone who sees AI not as hype, but as a powerful tool to create real and lasting impact. Someone who thrives in agile, fast-paced environments where creativity and new ideas can flourish. Driven by curiosity, always looking for smarter ways to solve problems — and able to bring others along on the journey. The company wants someone who takes ownership from day one, leading the way rather than waiting for direction, and who is eager to shape both product and technical direction beyond simply building features.
 



  





**Key responsibilities** 



* Build smart, scalable, and production-ready AI-driven services using Python
* Apply the latest AI tools like Claude, Cursor, and GitHub Copilot in daily workflow
* Design and optimise hybrid retrieval systems (vector + BM25) to power LLM-based agents and data lake exploration
* Work closely with the main development team (React, Node.js) to bring AI capabilities into the product experience
* Take the lead on new AI initiatives — prototype, test, build, and continuously improve
* Leverage Azure cloud infrastructure (including pipelines and Infrastructure as Code) to deploy and manage work
* Stay on top of the evolving LLM/AI landscape and help the team stay ahead of the curve
* Build modern agents using LangGraph, MCP, and gRPC with a mixture of proprietary and open models
* Work on scalable data services using Kafka, RabbitMQ, and various ELT platforms
* Build and deploy with GitHub Actions, Azure stack, ArgoCD, and Argo Workflows — supported by an SRE function



  





**Your profile** 



* 5+ years of experience with Python; you're not just fluent, but persuasive
* Solid experience working with GenAI tools like Claude, Cursor, or GitHub Copilot
* Strong background in modern data retrieval — vector databases, embedding stores, and hybrid search engines
* You understand how to index, query, and surface relevant data from large-scale data lakes, optimising retrieval for LLMs and intelligent agents
* Solid grasp of APIs, microservices, and scalable backend architecture
* Hands-on experience with Azure or a comparable cloud platform
* Fluent in English and a strong communicator — comfortable explaining complex ideas clearly
* Collaborative, humble, and invested in team success as much as your own



  





**Bonus** 



* Word2Vec, CBOW, LSTM, ML, RNNs, NLTK, and other NLP technologies
* Apache Flink, Spark, Superset, and ELT/ETL tooling such as Airflow, Meltano, or strong Postgres knowledge



  





**What you can expect** 



* Be part of an ambitious, product-led company with a strong and genuine AI agenda. This is not a checkbox, it is the core of what they are building
* Collaborate with experienced engineers, designers, and product minds
* Flat structure, open culture, and leadership that listens
* An inclusive and supportive environment where diversity and creativity are celebrated
* Real opportunities for professional growth within an international company that is actively expanding
* Impact is valued over title — creativity and ownership matter more than seniority
* A team that knows how to celebrate — from summer festivals to end-of-year events, they invest in team culture.



  





 Sound interesting? Then hit "apply"!
 



  





 For more information or questions, contact
 *zoe.lepluart@ninox-limited.com
 
 .*

title: Lösningsarkitekt till Kammarkollegiet - Arvsenheten
description:
**Bygg framtidens teknik med Professional Galaxy AB**
**Professional Galaxy är ett IT- och teknikkonsultbolag som tillhandahåller högspecialiserad kompetens inom IT, mjukvaruutveckling, SAP, inköp, elektronik och mekanisk konstruktion. Vi samarbetar med erfarna seniora experter och levererar strategiskt värdeskapande kompetens till komplexa och analytiskt krävande projekt. Vårt fokus ligger alltid på hög kvalitet, professionalism och tydliga, mätbara resultat.**
**Vi söker en erfaren lösningsarkitekt för ett konsultuppdrag inom digitalisering och utveckling av komplexa informations- och dokumentflöden inom offentlig verksamhet.**
**Uppdraget syftar till att analysera nuläge, definiera målbild och ta fram en genomförbar lösningsarkitektur för en verksamhet där processer idag är delvis manuella och systemfragmenterade.**
**Rollen innebär nära samarbete med verksamhet och intressenter samt samordning av pågående digitaliseringsinitiativ i en större systemmiljö.**
 Om uppdraget
   

  

 Uppdraget innebär att:
   

  

* Kartlägga nuläge för processer och informationsflöden
* Identifiera informationsägarskap och behov av informationsklassning
* Analysera affärshändelser och datakopplingar
* Utvärdera befintligt systemstöd och föreslå framtida lösning
* Identifiera möjligheter till digitalisering av manuella moment och dokumentflöden
* Samordna och analysera utvecklingsinitiativ i komplexa miljöer
* Föreslå integrationslösningar för ökad digitalisering
* Ta fram målbild, gap-analys och lösningsförslag
* Föreslå införandeplan och bedöma digitaliseringsgrad
* Identifiera möjlig tillämpning av AI, exempelvis för dokument- och datatolkning


**Lösningen ska tas fram enligt etablerade arkitekturprinciper och följa gällande krav inom IT, säkerhet och integration.**
 Uppdragsinformation
   

  

* Plats: Stockholm (på plats)
* Start: 2026-05-18
* Slut: 2026-09-30
* Omfattning: 100% (ca 320 timmar)
* Option: Möjlighet till förlängning


 SKA-krav
   

  

* Minst 5 års erfarenhet som lösningsarkitekt eller IT-arkitekt
* Erfarenhet av att kartlägga och analysera verksamhetsprocesser
* Erfarenhet av att dokumentera arkitektur och beslut (Word, Visio, PowerPoint)
* Erfarenhet av fakturerings- och dokumentflöden samt digitala standarder
* Erfarenhet av AI-tillämpningar i tekniska lösningar är meriterande
* Kännedom om gemensamma digitala tjänster och infrastruktur inom offentlig sektor är meriterande
* Förståelse för ärendehantering och diarieföring
* Mycket goda kunskaper i svenska, i tal och skrift


 BÖR-krav (meriterande)
   

  

* Erfarenhet av integrationsdesign (REST, SOAP, JSON, XML, asynkrona flöden)
* Erfarenhet av komplexa integrationsmiljöer med både äldre och moderna system
* Kunskap om säkerhet och identitet (OAuth2, OpenID Connect)
* Erfarenhet av loggning, monitorering och spårbarhet i distribuerade system
* Erfarenhet av AI-lösningar i arkitekturarbete och systemdesign
